title: Yummy tea!
text: Luckily I purchased this on a lightning deal for $14.99 I think. I’m disabled and I live in a fixed income so I’m very thrifty with my money.  I really enjoy this tea and I have found that I can re-brew the tea leaves 2-3 times with no loss of flavor. As a matter of fact I prefer the second brew better every time. It’s always smoother. I read somewhere in a review that you should always brew uuur tea for 30-60 seconds and throw that tea out and then brew it the desired amount of time.  Yes, it removes about 90% of the caffeine, but it leaves such a very smooth tasting tea behind.  Sometimes I just mix all 3 brews together in one big Lifefactory glass jar and drink it that way throughout the day. Others I just drink them one after the other. It’s yummy tea.

I brewed 1 tsp for 5 minutes and I brewed it that way 2 more times so I managed to get 3 servings out of the 1tsp.  I’m very pleased with this purchase and I will definitely be trying more of their loose leaf teas.

title: OMG- purple tea! Color me happy!  Yum yum yummy!!
text: Found a yummy tea to match my tumbler!  Lol. Seriously this is my favorite fruit/berry tea. First time I’ve tried it. I purchased it as an add on item.  What a truly pleasant surprise.  I questioned whether I would really get 15-30 servings out of it given the size of the bag, but I’m pleased to say that I measured it out with my teaspoon to be 15 servings so by brewing it twice I will get 30 servings.  I brewed mine the full 5 minutes. Obviously as would be expected the second brew is weaker, but I just mix the 2 brews together in the tumbler shown in the pic. I brew 8 ounces of water. I even tried to make a 3rd brew using 6 ounces of water, but the result was dismal.  I suppose you could still add it to the first two brews if you like s weaker version, but my granddaughter and I decided not to. Sophia age 8 is living this tea as much as I am.  She’s new to loose leaf tea and I’ve now created a little tea monster that my daughter Samantha will have to deal with when I leave. Poor Sam!  Seriously folks of you like fruity, aromatic tea then this tea is for you!  While I was measuring the tea out by teaspoon Sophia actually asked me if she could use the tea bits as potpourri in her room!  It smells divine.  I started to tell her that it would be very expensive potpourri, but let’s face it folks there is even more expensive potpourri than what this costs me so yes- you can use it to make your house smell heavenly too!  Drink up you tea lovers drink up!  I’m raising my purple tumbler to you in a friendly tea toast and please reply to me with the names of your favorite teas and tea makers so that my g baby Fi and I can try them too as well as your favorite kettles, cups, and loose leaf tea holders.  FYI:  I read a review on here yesterday stating that ALL teabags are held together using polymers that scientists are now trying to determine if those polymers cause cance etc. something along those lines anyways.  The reviewer stated that yhst was why they had turned to lease leaf only. As a person who lost both of my parents to pancreatic cancer 22 years apart and has been tested and now knows that I carry an inherited dna gene I urge everyone to begin limiting your exposure and therefore your risk to all things known or suspected to cause cancer. Happy drinking everybody!

title: My nearby grocery had this...LOVE IT
text: I highly recommend this for those with allergies. It bakes and makes pancakes very nicely. You just have to know what to add in to make it tasty. My default add-ins for any recipe tend to be vanilla extract, about 1/4 to 1/2 tsp sea salt (depending on recipe), baking soda, baking powder and Nutritious Yeast (adds buttery flavor to anything and a good oil like organic non-GMO canola or organic coconut oil (especially delicious for pancakes, donuts or any fried sweets). I usually mix this flour as half of what the recipe calls for with half of another alternative like tapioca (aka cassava), arrowroot flour or coconut flour.

It also helps my iron absorption but do not take with medications since there are small amounts of other vitamins that can interact with meds. Be sure to check with your doctor, first.

title: Now Tastes Sweet With Natural Flavors...AKA GMOs?

I have a severe anaphylactic soy allergy, so I realized I may have reacted to the 'natural flavors' now used in this product. Never buying this again. Instead, I'm buying their powdered wheatgrass, which only contains the ONE ingredient. Simple, effective and GMO-free.

title: Overpriced With No Noticeable Difference
text:
I have tried four other reishi products on the market to figure out the differences on my own. Here is what I found.

Red reishi is very different from other kinds of reishi. The extraction process and mg content always differs according to manufacturer. Out of the four I have tried, the ground organic reishi was the one that I could feel a noticeable difference. However, there are two studies that suggest daily dosages of GROUND reishi for more than a month can cause liver failure. Other studies show that red reishi majorly benefits liver issues. So I chose this tea thinking, hey, its a tea bag, right? So maybe this product is exempt.

Wrong. It comes beautifully packaged in these tiny powdered tea packets, so what I got was basically a quarter of the amount of reishi I actually got when I ordered the organic ground version from another company. Plus, it is still GROUND, posing a possible health risk if used in larger amounts (which I feel I need for the allergies I'm using it for). So if you're looking mainly for the health benefits, you are basically paying for the other added ingredients in the packet to make the bitter reishi powder palatable, such as licorice and stevia. The taste is good, but if I wanted good taste, I'd head to the grocery store. 1000 mg of reishi in these tiny packs is just not going to cut it.

I will be going back to my organic ground reishi, albeit with a tea strainer of some kind. If you're going for taste, this tea is nice. Other than that, you are just buying the pretty packaging in my honest opinion.

How can I ever go back to mediocre when I've discovered this candy bar!  I'm truly amazed.  Ate half the bar in one sitting and had to really make myself wrap up the rest for later!

title: So happy I found this coffee!
text:
I was going to have to give up coffee all together until I found Puroast coffee. From New Orleans, I've been drinking coffee since I was 4 years old, dark roast coffee and chicory and I know what good coffee should taste and smell like. I tried the Puroast French Roast coffee in desperation and was so happy I did. Beautifully full bodied and rich tasting, sans the chicory of course, but I can live with that. I also tried their Expresso style, and didn't really care for it, but that is just my taste. If that is your style, then just see for yourself. I also get the k-cups for when I am at work.
I would highly recommend this brand. Find the style you like, you won't be disappointed.

title: Only coffee I can drink!

title: I am not making claims that it cured me but its funny to me that I don't have it anymore after ...
text: After I started using this product, I never broke out again in adult acne or rosacea. I am not making claims that it cured me but its funny to me that I don't have it anymore after I stopped using nasty prescription creams and steroids on my delicate face. Go natural!! It usually beats out anything man made. It also taste great and softens my body all over. And my doggies love to eat it while I am using it. We share.

title: Great variety for kids and adults alike!
text: This is a super great variety pack. I got this for when my grand kids come to visit. It's nice to have a choice of things for snack time and Keebler has some of the best. We make a game out of choosing and they love it. These would be great to have around during the school year as well to pack in with lunches or have as an after school snack. I have even brought some in to work occasionally when I get a (typically salty) craving in the afternoons. Highly recommend!

title: Not just for steak!
text: I love this Grillaholics Twisted rub and seasoning. It works great on all food types, I especially like to use it on chicken on the grill. The garlic butter seasoning is savory and perfectly seasons everything. I love that this is in a sizeable container as well and it should last me for months. Highly recommend for anyone who grills!

title: Delicious and makes a great gift!
text: I actually wanted this for myself and I am happy I got it. I love the variety of chocolates and treats. They were fresh and rich and honestly I think there are as good, if not better than the other named brand chocolates on the market today. The double silk truffles were to die for with a close second with the mints. I also loved the gift box, so this would make an amazing gift for someone special in your life for any occasion (Valentine's, birthday, Mother's Day).  Highly recommend!

title: As good or better than the named brands!
text: We drink a lot of hot chocolate during the winter months. Especially when my two grandchildren are visiting, I must make 4-5 cups a day for them (and me and my husband). I wasn't sure what to expect of this brand as I had never heard of it before. Typically drinking Swiss Miss or Hersheys or Nestles, it was nice to try something different. This is a great variety pack. Although I truly prefer the dark chocolate packets the best, they are all good. I always use some milk and whipped cream in mine, makes it a little more hearty, but even without it, the flavor of this Total Indulgence is great. Highly recommend!

title: I really liked these!!
text: I typically do not like super spicy/hot foods. So, when I ordered these, I expected to basically let my husband, children and friends try them. I actually was quite surprised that I didn't find them all that spicy at all and I liked them! Although I didn't eat a whole lot of these, surprisingly I was able to eat almost a whole bag. These chips come super fresh and flavorful and were quite the hit in my house! I highly recommend these, especially during Super Bowl time. The fact that you get 10 bags allows you to hand them out to friends while watching the game!

title: Wonderful, giftable box of yummy delight!
text: This is a wonderful gift box of fruits and nuts. I opened during an NFL playoff Sunday here at my house when I had 10 people here and it almost totally disappeared! I really liked the nuts and the dried apricots and I was disappointed that my guests did, too, lol. This was a fresh pack with great quality. It also comes in a great large gift package so it is a wonderful item to give to someone you love. I, and my football friends, highly recommend!!!!

title: Not for me, but the kids loved them
text: I honestly didn't care for the flavor of these. I found them a little too sour and almost gritty when eating them. However, I had them out over the holidays when my grandkids were here and they absolutely could not get enough of them. So, they would probably been pretty good for little bags in a lunch box for school or for the kids. I just didn't really like them.

title: Not entirely our cup of tea
text: Nice ground coffee, not really our taste though. It is a mild version of coffee, probably perfect for parties and stuff where folks don't like their java strong. When it comes to mornings, though, we prefer a stronger blend. Folgers does make a good cup of coffee, just not our taste or preferred blend. Nice value pack.

title: Great way to start the day!
text: I usually have at least one energy drink a day, typically in the morning before I go for my run. I am not a coffee drinker, so I am always in the market for a way to supplement my energy. I really like this Runa Bold as one of my new favorites. I love the tropical fruit flavor and when it's icy cold it's definitely just what I need to get my morning started. I love the boost it gives me. I also enjoy having one in the mid afternoon at work to help me through the remainder of the day. Highly recommend!

title: Absolutely my favorite!
text: I absolutely love frosted mini-wheats and have been eating them for years now. First of all they are good for you, high in fiber and whole grain. Secondly, they taste great. Just enough sweetness to make you feel like you are indulging (but you're not). I love that Amazon is selling these in bulk sizes which allows me to save about $5 from buying them at the local supermarket (and I get it delivered, with Prime, in two days!). Love, love, love!

title: Great fresh quality spice!
text: This is a nice larger size bottle of thyme. I use thyme for a lot of my cooking (soups, stews, gravies) so I  wanted a large size. I had never heard of Cerez Pazari before so I was pleasantly surprised. This thyme is a nice full size, smells and tastes super fresh. I am buying other CP products because I was so pleased with this one. I love the large size too. Highly recommend for every chef and kitchen.

title: Great tasting snack!
text: This was a great snack. Comes fresh in the pack and I loved the birthday cake flavor. I could see ordering a bunch of these for a child's birthday party as take away gifts. Crunchy and flavorful, but not overly sweet, this could become a favorite nighttime snack of mine. Highly recommend!

title: Amazing flavor for a low sugar product!
text: For a low sugar product, these are amazingly good! Great sour taste and my two grandsons just love them. I love that I can give them a treat which is not loaded with a lot of sugar, which is certainly a lot healthier for them in the long run. Highly recommend these are a great alternative to sweeter higher calorie treats (as good as Trolli or Black Forest gummies).

title: Lot's of colors, makes food look great and taste great!
text: I had my two grandsons here last weekend and we made cookies. I loved having these sprinkles available for decorating. I made little paper cup bowls filled with all six colors, shaped the cookies and let the boys do all the decorating. Great, vibrant colors and the cookies tasted terrific. This is a great pack of multiple colors which will definitely come in handy given the holidays are approaching. This should be a staple in every kitchen pantry, highly recommend!

title: Great for cooking/baking and home projects!
text: This a great food coloring set. I wanted this for a project I was doing with my two grandsons (making paper mache). The colors are vibrant and do not run when dry. I had plenty left to make some colorful blue and gold (yellow) cookies for back to school (school colors). Still have plenty to use around the holidays. This should be a staple in every baker's (or just a craftsman's) pantry. Will definitely come in handy for lots of uses. Highly recommend for everyone.

title: Great espresso for your Nespresso machine!
text: I love espresso and buy capsules for my Nespresso machine on a regular basis. Of course, I had been using Nespresso capsules and I find them super expensive (of course unless they are running a coupon or sale). This Ilan's brand is a great alternative. Same great taste and strength but at lesser of a cost than the Nespresso brand. I am sold on these and will be using them exclusively going forward. Highly recommend!

title: Another great McCormick product!
text: I have been using McCormick products for years now and always rely on them for quality and freshness. This paste is a new product for me. It;s a thicker version of their standard vanilla product. It has a thicker consistency and is surprisingly easy to use. I definitely prefer this to their standard vanilla and it seems to mix better in my cakes and cookies. I highly recommend everyone to try it and it will become a staple in your pantry.

title: Super fresh and fragrant!
text: I make a lot of soups and sauces and bay leaves are a staple in my pantry. This Bytewise organic product is great. Larger size, leaves are fresh (bottle comes shrink wrapped for extra freshness). I had never heard or used this brand before, but I really like this product so I will be buying more spices (hoping they are all as good as this one). Highly recommend if you are needing fresh and flavorful bay leaves.

title: Good ingredients but my grandkids did not like them
text: Tried these on my grandsons, twice while they were here (different flavors). The absolutely hated these, and wouldn't finish them. Although they may have good ingredients, if they don't taste good kids won't drink them. I will not be buying any more in the future.

title: Some like it hot (very hot)!!!
text: These peppers are probably some of the hottest chili peppers I have ever tried. I put these in my pepper grinder and thought we could use it in lieu of the red flakes we use on pizza. Just one little ground flake of this was too much for me. However, my nephew and my brother loved these. So, if you are in the market for really hot peppers (ghost) then these are for you. I will use a touch in my Italian sauces, where it can cook and minimize the heat a bit for me, though.

title: Not as good as the named brand, but not bad for the $$$
text: For the money a good alternative to Kellogg's Frosted Flakes. The package I received was fresh. I deducted  star because I did notice the flakes are smaller than the ones I am used to and I didn't seem to get as much 'frosting' as I am used to. I think most youngsters (children, teenagers) may not notice the difference, but I did. Great alternative to gift to a college student in dormitory life. Not sure I would order again, but honestly not bad.

title: Great protein drink, satisfies and is good for you
text: This is my new favorite mid-afternoon protein drink. I take it with me to work and have a tasty, satisfying treat that is good for me and satisfies my hunger and sweet cravings. When I am not working, I take a bottle of this and pour it in my Ninja along with some fresh blueberries and strawberries and some ice to make the most amazing smoothie. I love that something that tastes so good and gives me the nutrients that my body needs. Highly recommend this for everyone.

title: A little strong, but wonderful!
text: I love Nespresso! This double espresso is just perfect (albeit a bit strong). Full bodied, wonderful flavor and a great way to finish a dinner or just to have as a mid afternoon pick me up. True to other Nespresso blends, this variety is easy to make and just wonderful to savor! Be sure you like your coffee strong with this double variety.

title: An absolutely great variety pack of espressos!
text: I love Nespresso! This variety espresso pack is just perfect. All blends are terrific (although I do favor the medium blend). Full bodied, wonderful flavor and a great way to finish a dinner or just to have as a mid afternoon pick me up. True to other Nespresso blends, this variety pack is pleasing to all pallets and just wonderful to savor!

title: Another great Nespresso product!
text: I love Nespresso! This medium roast espresso is just perfect. Full bodied, wonderful flavor and a great way to finish a dinner or just to have as a mid afternoon pick me up. True to other Nespresso blends, this variety is easy to make and just wonderful to savor!

title: Great tasting and chock full of everything my body needs to start the day out right!
text: I loved this strawberry powder. I add it to my morning smoothie (which usually consists of berries, bananas and some kind of green. The strawberry powder is just the perfect addition to the drink and the antioxidants vitamins and minerals give my body the extra boost it needs in the morning. This is organic, non-GMO and rich in nutrients my body needs. I have been drinking this now daily for almost a month and I definitely notice a major difference in my health and well-being. Highly recommend!

title: Great rice!
text: I typically have been a steamed rice eater and I keep hearing about the benefits of brown rice so I thought I would try this. Great flavor, great texture, I was super impressed. Took a little longer to cook than my standard white rice, but it definitely has a unique flavor and the fact that I was eating something which was better for me is wonderful. It may be a little pricier than standard white rice, but the difference is noticeable and more nutritious. Highly recommend!

title: Great alternative to unhealthy snacks!
text: These are surprisingly good. I wasn't sure if I would like them, given that the main ingredient is chickpeas, but I did. I put them in the refrigerator and use them as a healthy alternative to any other unhealthy snack I would typically choose. I love the dark chocolate coating (which is high quality). My grandkids loved these too. Highly recommend!

title: Super great protein bars, great flavors and gluten free!
text: I had never tried Oatmega products before, so I wasn't sure what to expect. Boy, was I pleasantly surprised when I tried these. Wonderfully flavorful (I particular liked the white chocolate raspberry variety), these gluten free bars are amazing. I use these for a mid-afternoon pick me up at work (pack two in my bag before I leave the house in the morning) and they satisfy my cravings. Mostly all natural ingredients, they are tasty and good for you. This variety pack is wonderful, too, with lots of choices. I will be ordering another package in the next few days to replenish my stock. Highly recommend!

title: Another great Nature Valley product!
text: I love Nature Valley products and usually keep a variety of them in my pantry. These wafer bars were new to me and I wasn't sure what to think. When I got them my 7 year old grandson was here and he immediately asked me to try one. I was surprised that he really loved these and with the ingredients, I don't mind allowing him to have one. These make a great afternoon mid-day snack to help cure the sweetness and salt that I tend to crave. I love the peanut butter and chocolate. Highly recommend these for young and old alike.

title: Warning, highly addictive caramels!!!
text: These are amazing and highly addictive! Rich dark chocolate, smooth caramel, the sea salt adds a tang and leaves you craving more! I put these out after dinner last week and my guests went to town on them leaving only a handful for me. I have ordered more, even just to have in my pantry as they would be great to serve when guests stop by (if I don't eat them myself before hand, lol). Highly recommend these tasty caramels!

title: Wonderful lemon infused green tea!!!
text: I have been drinking green tea for years now and prefer it to black tea. I love this lemon green tea and it's flavor is bold and fresh (and quite different from plain green tea). I use my tea infuser to steep the loose leaves and it comes out great every time. A cup of this in the morning super charges my morning routines and gets me set for the day. I love drinking a cup also before I workout, too. Highly recommend if you are a fan of loose teas (I prefer it to bagged tea).

title: Makes a great sweet coffee blend drink!
text: I wasn't sure what to expect when I got these. I love a good coffee and I also love a great hot chocolate, but German Chocolate Cake? Actually, this was a great blend of both. However, it's not an everyday coffee for me, too overly sweet for morning/breakfast use. This does make, however, a great after dinner blend with dessert or even in the afternoon when you are craving something sweet. I really did like this.

title: My new favorite morning coffee!
text: Great tasting, full bodied, this is terrific blend. Packaged in a convenient 6 pack, this is an economical way to have access to some of the best tasting coffee you will ever have. I highly recommend this coffee for any time of day, not just morning!

title: Wonderful variety of sauces in one convenient pack!
text: This is a great variety pack of three pasta sauces. I typically make my own sauces when I could but, in a pinch, if I need a store bought sauce I reach for Barilla. Quality ingredients, great flavors, Barilla is the next best thing to homemade sauce. I love this variety pack which includes traditional flavors (like the basil and marinara) and my favorite the Calabrian (with a slight kick to it). You can't go wrong with any Barilla sauces, but this pack of three jars is a great one to keep in your pantry for a variety of flavors. Highly recommend!

title: Easy way to make excellent alfredo sauce!
text: I love alfredo sauce and have attempted to make it on my own with not so terrific results. This is relatively easy to make (just be sure to follow instructions). I use it with cooked chicken and shrimp along with some fresh parmesan and my guests and family both have raved about how good it is. I prefer to use it with fresh pasta (instead of boxed). This is definitely something I will be keeping in my pantry on a regular basis.

title: Great crispy crackers for many uses!
text: I really, really liked these crackers (and my guests did too). They are light, crispy and very flavorful. I especially liked the sesame and sea salt, went well with cheddar cheese. I highly recommend these for any dinner party or even as just a light snack when watching tv. This variety pack is great, too, something for everyone. Better than eating potato chips and much lighter and tastier!

title: My most favorite cup of coffee!
text: This is one of my favorite Keurig coffees. The caramel honey Starbucks flavor is full bodied, rich and has an amazing taste. I prefer to have this flavor mid-afternoon and I usually 'supplement' it with some shortbread cookies to give me the energy boost I need. To me, this home brew tastes just as good, if not better, than anything I can get at a Starbucks store and I can have it at home anytime I want it. I am hooked!

title: Not bad, but I have had better
text: Not overly thrilled with these. Flavor was good (as well as the ingredients) but they were overly dry and I found myself having to drink something with them to make them go down right. Not sure if they were overly stale or if they are all like this consistency. But, they are gluten and dairy free and vegan and high in protein. Maybe it was just a bad batch that I received?

title: Good low calorie refresher, not too crazy about the peach flavor
text: I usually love San Pellegrino products. Although I like quality of the drink and the fact that this is low calorie, I didn't like the taste of this peach flavor. It might be the taste of the can in there (kind of tinny) and I would definitely would have preferred it if these were bottled for sure. It might just be me, so please try these to see for yourself if you like it.

title: Good beef jerky, excellent lightly spiced, perfect for snacking
text: Great not-overly-spicy beef jerky. Perfect size for packing in my lunch bag for a mid afternoon snack. This is definitely one of my favorites. I did deduct a star because even though the flavor was great, I did find this pack a little on the dry side. I am going to order another package before month end and if I find the next package to be better, I will be adding to this review and changing it to a 5 star. My brother and nephew really love this jerky, too, and have been eating it for years, so I know it's got to be good!

title: Great mid-day pick me up!
text: I love Blue Diamond products and always have one kind or another in my pantry at all times. I really loves this almond and fruit variety. It satisfies all my mid afternoon cravings: salt and sweet. I love the dark chocolate coating on the almonds and I really love keeping the bag in the refrigerator so that the chocolate is cold when I eat these. I tend to make snack packs out of these, too, so I can have a snack at work (eating fruit and nuts instead of just salty chips). May not be the absolute healthiest snack you can have, but it is better than most. And Blue Diamond assures the quality and freshness. Highly recommend!

title: Great tasting healthy snack!
text: These are a great snack to have around. I tend to keep a bag of these in the refrigerator (I like them cold) and have some mid afternoon as a pick me up. Not only does it help satisfy my hunger cravings, it also satisfies my sweet cravings (but without all the negative impacts). These are sweet, healthy, fresh and my new favorite go to snack to keep around the house. I have also sent a few bags to my grandchildren to have as well (would rather have them eating blueberries and cranberries instead of chocolates or gummies).

title: Another great product from Jackie's Kitchen!
text: This is my second time getting a Jackie's Kitchen spice and I am just as happy with this one as I was the last. This minced onion is an absolute pantry essential for every cook to have. I used it most recently in a meatloaf and it was absolutely amazing (tasted like I had used fresh onions). Jackie's Kitchen products are fresh and reasonably priced and I highly recommend them for every kitchen. I will be trying more!

title: Great, fresh spice!
text: Thyme is a staple in my kitchen pantry. I use it in many meals, particularly love it in chicken and turkey dishes. This Jackie's Kitchen Thyme Leaves spice is great. It is fresh and a high quality and must have for any chef who truly cares about what they serve to their family and friends. to be honest, this is the first time I have ever tried Jackie's Kitchen spices and now I am planning to try some others (I need Rosemary). I will be purchasing more.

title: These are a hit with myself and my entire family!
text: These are absolutely some of my favorites. First, I love Junior mints and buy them for snacks quite often. Then, when you combine it with hot chocolate and K-Cup pods you have one of the most amazing hot drinks on the market today. I love making a cup mid-afternoon as a snack and pick me up. The mint is totally refreshing and the hot chocolate just cannot be beat for flavor. My grandson (age 5) begs for these when he visits. Total hit for my family! Thanks Keurig for another great product!

title: Not a big fan of these
text: First, these are tiny. I honestly after seeing them was afraid to let my smallest grandson (age 2) open one (afraid he might try to swallow it). Second, the chocolate is a small hollow egg and is not the highest quality (I thought the taste was kind of cardboardy). I will not be buying more of this, it's just a cheap product. With Easter coming, I will be purchasing much more quality chocolates.

title: Great alternative to traditional salt grinders!
text: I love using salt grinders and now I can step it up a bit with pink Himalayan salt. Colorful alternative in my pantry, I use this almost daily in my cooking and in spicing my dishes. All natural salt in a decorative container, the grinder works perfectly. I love putting it on the table for guests, too, as an alternative to their usual salts. The salt in this grinder is fresh and perfect for any pantry.

title: Read the other reviews, contains some scary ingredients.
text: To be honest, I was prepared to write a 4 star review until I read some other reviews on here about this containing carcinogens. To begin with, it's a nice large size of vanilla, perfect for keeping in your pantry for cooking and baking. I did use it in some cookies and they turned out delicious. However, now that I have read this contains some cancer causing ingredients, I have tossed the bottle and have returned to my McCormick's. I can't recommend this.

title: Great pasta!!!
text: Cooking Italian foods is my first love when it comes to my meal regimens. I have typically leaned towards using Italian made pastas as well, but I figured I would try this Skinner brand. Boy, was I pleasantly surprised. First, it is all organic and not made with preservatives. Second, the taste is great and the consistency (when I cook al dente) is just perfect. I have no complaints only kudos

title: Great fresh oregano, perfect larger size
text: Nice large size kitchen staple of Oregano leaves. I love cooking Italian and use oregano in everything I make. I love having the large size of spices as it seems to last me for a couple of months. I am also a die-hard fan of McCormick spices as they are only made with the freshest quality ingredients and my pantry is predominantly McCormick when it comes to spices. Anyway, no complaints, just perfection and I highly recommend for anyone's pantry.

title: These are great in all my recipes!
text: I should start with I use egg noodles a lot in my cooking and I usually use either Muellers or Pennsylvania Dutch brand in my recipes. This was my first time in using Skinner and they were really good. I made a batch of these noodles first to go with some Beef Stroganoff and they held up well and tasted great. I love that they are made with no preservatives or MSG and is non-GMO. Second time I used them was in some homemade chicken soup I made and same thing, kept their texture did not get soggy or limp and were extremely flavorful. I highly recommend Skinners for any of your recipes that call for egg noodles.

title: Compact
text: This is a great alternative to using sugar and avoiding artificial sweeteners. It is in a small compact container, easy to keep in my purse for when I am away from home I wanted to deduct a star only because of the way the product dispenses (squeeze) and how I can accurately measure how much to use, but I honestly think it's the way I do it. Hopefully others will not have this issue.

title: Great spice, satisfies the spicy urges my family gets!
text: I am not that fond of spicy hot foods. However, I have two sons, a nephew and a brother who have to use hot sauces on just about everything they eat. I love keeping this Frank's Redhot blend around for times when they visit. I particularly love using it when I bake chicken to be able to satisfy the spicy needs of my family by allowing me to sprinkle this on the top of their pieces while leaving mine alone. My brother especially raves about this, he tells me it's 'spicy and hot and the ranch blend makes it flavorful'. I also have brought this to the movies when we have gone to sprinkle on the popcorn they get. I always keep a container of this in my pantry. If there is anything negative, it's the sodium content in this. I wish they would work on that.

title: Wonderful easy to make Queso at a moment's notice!
text: This is an amazing product. Easy to make queso dip that always has my guests clamoring for my recipe. Spicy, but not overly so, and it really is a cloud pleaser. I always keep several of these on hand in my pantry in case some guests stop by unexpectedly. The creamy, warm dip tastes like I spent hours making it. Definitely need to keep some around for football, tailgating and just holiday entertaining!

title: Not my taste in snacks
text: These came fresh and crisp. Deducting a star simply because I didn't care for the taste of these (seemed like they were overly cheesy, kind of gritty and they left an aftertaste in my mouth). Based on the other positive reviews out here, I have deduced that it must be me. I usually like Stacy's snacks, so I can't deduct more than one star. Try them for yourself as I do tend to have some weird tastebuds some times. I really do like Stacy's products.

title: Not the best way to eat your peanut butter
text: Didn't like this at all. Terrible flavor. I do understand there are some health benefits with the additional protein, but I thought it tasted funny and I didn't like the consistency (greasy). I would much rather take my protein in a different powdered form and eat my peanut butter from Skippy.

title: So-so cereal with good health benefits
text: Ok, positives are the healthy benfits (protein and fiber). Negatives are the flavor (pretty bland), high caloric content and the cost of this cereal. So, although I like the benefits of this Mill Select, I found I needed to add fruit to make it palatable. Rating it as 4 stars because of the health benefits, but deducting one because of my negatives.

title: Great artificial sweetner, hard to tell the difference between using sugar!
text: I was a little skeptical of using this at first. I love to bake and I have used artificial sweetners in the past with poor results. I must say that the cookie recipe (chocolate chip) that I made using this Sugarly Sweet sweetner tasted just as good, or better, than my using standard sugar. I won't say that I will 100% change my baking habits, especially when it comes to baking for family and friends, but I will definitely be using this sweetner for myself as I have dietary concerns and certainly don't need unwanted calories. I am totally sold on Sugarly Sweet!

title: Solimo Lemonade mix
text: Easy to make, pleasant lemon taste, a good pantry staple to have around when guests show up. I am deducting a star because although it is lemon flavored, it's not as strong as I would have liked. When mixing, I have reduced the volume of water to help strengthen the flavor more to my liking. Sugar free so there is no need to worry about caloric intake. I still prefer Country Time lemonade mix as an alternative, but this is more reasonably priced. You will need to adjust the mixture to accommodate your own taste.

title: Great healthy cereal!!!
text: I love these little cereal packs. First, they are a perfect size whether for breakfast or even a mid-afternoon snack. Next, I love the variety in flavors so I can alternate them in my meal patterns. I also add some fresh fruit into these (blueberries, bananas) to give them an even better kick. No complaints, reasonably priced, chock full of antibiotics, healthy for you (although they could reduce the sugar) and they taste great!

title: My new favorite dijon mustard!
text: This is my new favorite go-to condiment. I love the seeds, the texture, the flavor, everything. I love using this in homemade salad dressings and I also use it in several chicken and fish recipes. I wasn't sure originally what I was going to do with 6 of these, but in having these for about a month now, I have gone through over two jars as I use a lot in my daily meal making. Great idea, great price, great product!

title: What a great ketchup from a surprising company!!!
text: I love this new Hellman's ketchup. Considering I only usually think of mayonnaise when I hear the name Hellmans, I was pleasantly surprised to try something new. Add to it there is no added sugar and it is sweetened by honey, you have a winner of a condiment. I am thrilled with this new ketchup and it will be a staple in my pantry from now on.

title: Great all natural breakfast or any time snack
text: Not as crazy about this Almond Cranberry variety of Wild Friends Foods as I was about the blueberry flavor (a little on the tasteless side). However, I love the all natural ingredients and whether I eat it for breakfast or keep one in my bag for a mid afternoon office pick me up, I feel good eating these oats.

title: Great organic, fun and healthy for you
text: I love keeping these Modern Oats products around especially when my grandchildren come to visit. They love the clever personalized packaging and I love the organic nature of these (to minimize their sugar intake. Of course, they are not the only ones who eat these, I take them a couple of days a week into the office for a midafternoon pick me up. The crunchiness helps satisfy my cravings and they help keep me away from unhealthy snacks. I really love these and always have some in my cupboard.

title: Great snack to keep around!
text: We love Sour Patch snacks and I always keep a bag (or two) in my household. I will say, if there is any downside to this at all, is that it's a 5 lb. bag. It makes it almost irresistible for my family (and grandchildren) to stop eating them, lol. I am not a big fan of the sour apple flavor, but the grandchildren love them.  So, what I have done is hide them and put small portions out to keep it under control. These make a great snack to put into little bags and include in lunch boxes as well.

title: Tasty, healthy and convenient!
text: I have to admit when I first saw this I wasn't sure whether I would like it. Honestly, after just one cup I was sold! These are great tasting, chock full of protein and come in a convenient package. These are great to carry to work or school and the tuna is fresh and tasty. I am currently on a diet (well, at least I am trying to lose some weight for an upcoming cruise) and having one of these along with fruits and fresh veggies in my work bag helps me to stay on track. I will be trying some of the other flavors as well, but this basil and olive oil is terrific!

title: Great organic green tea, one cup of day for good health !
text: Great organic tea with a light spicy taste. I really enjoy this in the afternoon, after work, as a relaxing way to end my work day. Steeps well, not too strong, full bodied and full of anti-oxidants. Nice to have in my pantry as a way to treat myself!

title: Did not like the flavor at all to this variety of V8 juice, switching back to the standard variety
text: I have to start by stating I absolutely love V8 juices. I love that I can get all my vitamins and nutrients in a single drink. However, I have to now say that I didn't like this Coconut Watermelon flavor at all. I found myself gagging to try to finish it. I thought it was just me, so I had my 22 year old son try it. Although he didn't seem to have the same intense reaction as myself, he told me 'he'd had better'. Sorry, V8, this flavor was just not something I liked at all. I am rating this as 3 stars simply because of the nutritional benefit and the fact that others might really like it.

title: Great staple to always keep on hand, much less work!
text: I have to start by stating I love to cook and it is probably my number one hobby in my life. Italian cooking for me is a passion, having gone to Italy several times and took cooking lessons with some of the best chefs. Of course, what is Italian food without loads of garlic. However, I must admit, prepping garlic for me has never been one of my favorite chores. I find it tedious and a lot of work to peel and chop garlic (not to mention the smell of garlic on my fingers which lingers through several hand washings). This Litehouse garlic allows me to have fresh garlic allows at my need and I can easily add it to my recipes without all the work. I have never used something like this before (only powdered garlic) and must admit it is so much better in recipes. Highly recommend that you keep a bottle of this handy in your pantry at all times. Getting this in a handy 6 pack is icing on the cake for me.

title: Rich chocolate taste, works perfectly in the Keurig
text: These are decent, well priced hot chocolate pods. To be honest, I had never used pods before for hot chocolate, so these were a first. I had my oldest grandson over when they first arrived and he was anxious to try them. They fit my Keurig perfectly and were a big hit. I brewed them and then topped each of our cups with some Reddi Whip and he absolutely loved it. I liked the flavor, not as high a quality as I usually enjoy in a Ghiradelli hot chocolate (what I usually keep in the house), but the novelty of using the Keurig to make these was great.

title: Great variety pack of espressos for Keurig!
text: I love my Keurig machine and using these pods. This sampler pack is great, giving me a variety of roasted coffees to help spice/jolt up my morning brews. I love the espressos, especially with a taste of caramel. I prefer to buy these 24 packs as they are far more economical. Nothing bad to say at all, nothing but good things. Love these!!!

title: Surprised to see Taster's Choice in the coffee pod business!
text: Good, average roasted coffee, great for my morning cup.Convenient pods, fit and work well in my Keurig. I am deducting one star simply because I have had better, especially at the cost of these. But, they do deliver a good coffee taste. I always thought of Taster's Choice as more of an instant coffee brew, but I was pleasantly surprised at the taste of this. If it were below $30 for the 96 pods, I would have given this a 4 star review.

title: Convenient, larger size bottle of Hidden Valley ranch!
text: This is a great ranch dressing. Although I prefer to make my own from scratch (well, maybe not from scratch but by using the packets), this bottle is a handy size to keep in the fridge. A little too big for my personal needs (I am a single female), this large size is perfect for a bigger household,  industrial/school, family barbecue use. Hidden Valley ranch style is one of my favorite dressings, and this is very convenient.

title: I had problems with taking this, but might not have the same effect on others.
text: Didn't really work for me. Not sure if it was the caffeine or the niacin, but I didn't like the way I felt after drinking this. I had it about 1/2 an hour before the gym and I found my heart racing and my fingers tingling when I began the treadmill. Although, in reading other reviews here, apparently it does the trick for others, so far be it from me to rate this less than three stars. I will say I liked the flavor and the fact that it is zero calories and does have some endurance nutrients in it. Just didn't sit well with my body and I was afraid to try any more. Might work well for others.

title: Great heart healthy snack for all ages!
text: These are absolutely fantastic tasting oven roasted almonds. I venture to say the best in the market today. I love the fact that they are roasted and not fried as it cuts down dramatically on the fat content of these. I always am looking for a mid afternoon pick me up at work and these Fisher nuts really fit the bill. They taste great, are lower in fat and are heart healthy. I even pack a small bag of these into my grandson's school snack bag a few days a week and he loves them, too. For anyone looking for a healthy snack, these oven roasted almonds are some of the best to keep on hand. The sea salt is not overwhelming either, just a light salted taste. Highly recommend!

title: This makes a great, quick breakfast!
text: Good multigrain hot cereal. I am not sure I will do this cinnamon variety again (didn't care for the taste), but my college aged son really liked it. It is a very easy to prepare product and would work well in a college dorm (I actually gave the rest of him to take back to school with him). Be careful to follow instructions on the package and don't let sit for too long after heating (lest it become a weird gluey consistency).

title: Great start to the morning for busy individuals.
text: I have always used Carnation Instant Breakfast over the years, so I wasn't sure what to expect with this new variety. I actually loved this. First, the ingredients appear to be more substantial and healthier than in the past (2X the protein of an egg, 2X the calcium of a 6 oz cup of yogurt, 2X the Vitamin D of a glass of milk and 2X the Vitamin C of orange juice). With my busy morning routine (walk the dog early for a few miles, getting ready for work and driving over an hour each way to get there), it leaves me little time to have breakfast. One of these in the morning starts my day right and gives me a strong foundation to face the day ahead. I highly recommend these for a quick breakfast solution for yourself or for someone you love in your life.

title: Great caramels, totally satisfies whatever craving you have!
text: These are honestly the best caramels I have ever eaten. I wasn't sure if I would like the 'sea salt' variety of these as I tend to gravitate to traditional caramel, but I loved them. Not very salty, just a hint of salt. The caramels are smooth, creamy and totally satisfying. I made the mistake of leaving these on my desk at work and they were gone by the end of the day. I shortly afterward ordered another container and this time kept them in my drawer. These are great for a mid-afternoon pick me up when you have that craving for something sweet and salty. You need to try these!

title: Great start to the day with an all natural oatmeal breakfast
text: Pretty good breakfast cereal.I am not that crazy about the dried fruits (it all tastes a little bland), so I add fresh blueberries (and sometime cut up a banana) to add which makes this much tastier. It is all natural which is great, but also is expensive (in my opinion). Anyway, rating as four stars because doctored up with some fresh fruit really makes this a great start to the day, and it's healthy.

title: Unbelievable good. Should be a staple in every kitchen pantry!
text: I really was surprised with this LoveSome product. First, I never heard of this brand before, so I hesitated to try it with one of my typical Sunday dinners but I am glad I did. Making a traditional slow cooker beef stew, I opened a can of the LoveSome Diced tomatoes and immediately could smell the difference between this variety and others. First, it is chock full of vegetables like tomatoes, celery, onions and peppers. The broth surrounding the vegetables is aromatic and really adds flavor to any dish. I had a slew of compliments at dinner from my brother and children asking me what I had done differently this time which made this stew different than before. I must admit, the stew was rich and flavorful and did taste better than usual. I highly recommend every house keeps a few cans of this LoveSome in the pantry for stews and soups as it really does make a savory difference in your recipes.

title: Great tasting snack, not particularly healthy, but satisfies cravings
text: I really liked this Milk and Honey blend. Great mix of peanuts and yogurt covered raisins, works for me as a quick pick me up mid afternoon at work. For less than $2.50 a bag when purchased in this 6 pack, it's a great partially healthy alternative to a bag of potato chips. My grandson loves these too and I often pack one into his lunch bag as a treat. Sweet and salty, it satisfies even the pickiest snacker in your household.

title: Not the best Mac and Cheese on the market today
text: When I saw this, I first thought of my two grandsons. They absolutely love Macaroni and Cheese, so I was thrilled to be able to add this to my pantry. Last weekend, my son and his family came over for Sunday dinner and, in addition to my regular dinner, I made a box of this Modern Table and proudly served it to my 5 and 2 year old grandbabies. Neither one liked it, tasted it and wouldn't touch it after that. I tried it myself and although I didn't think it was 'that' bad, I didn't like the smell nor the texture of the cheese with the macaroni. Needless to say, I probably won't be serving this again, so I can't recommend this. Rating it as two stars as maybe this was just my family's taste and it is gluten free for those who may need it.

title: Great easy to use squeeze bottle, best organic honey on the market today
text: This is great tasting, all organic unfiltered honey in a great easy to use squeeze bottle. I love to use this in the kitchen, so easy to measure and less mess in recipes. I also love using this in tea as a substitute sweetener. What’s not to love about this? I always keep a bottle of Wholesome Sweetners honey in my pantry.

title: Great sports bar, great tasting and satisfying!
text: My son absolutely loves these. He is a gym addict and goes every day for at least and hour and a half combined with jui jitsu training 6 nights a week. He is always looking for a nutritional supplement that he can grab on the go and help boost his work outs and energy. These cookie dough flavored bars fill the bill. They are tasty, satisfying and are gluton free, have no artificial flavors and are basically 'real food'. He eats all types of this Best Bar Ever brand, but he particularly favors the cookie dough flavor (lol, I think it's funny as when he was a child he use to like to eat the real cookie dough. I send him these on a monthly basis to his apartment so he always has a supply on hand and has them when he needs them. Highly recommend for anyone who needs a sweet nutritional boost during the day. Can't go wrong.

title: M&Ms are great! And this dispenser is handy and stores easily in the refrigerator for an easy snack!
text: Not much to say about M&Ms, everyone one knows how good (and addictive) they can be. I keep this box in my refrigerator and the style acts as a dispenser, allowing a bag at a time to be accessed. I actually like this idea as I have a tendency when buying the larger family size bag to eat far more than I should. This prevents me from over eating (as long as i only eat one bag, lol, which isn't always easy). This is a great idea especially for families when you can tell your children that they can have one bag (again, may prevent over eating). Highly recommend this style to all.

title: Great instant coffee, it was a big hit in my house!
text: I have to start by telling you I am typically not a coffee drinker (except maybe iced coffee). However, I love to entertain and always have to have some coffee around my house for guests. This Double Joy Select coffee was a big hit last Sunday when I had a household of friends and families over. My son in particular was really enthusiastic for this when I asked for his opinion. He told me that considering this was an instant coffee he was really impressed by how full-bodied it was and the great flavor. I have already purchased another box to have it around the house for the Christmas/New Years period. I would recommend this coffee to become a staple in your home, particularly for last minute guests as it is a great coffee at a great price. You can't go wrong!

title: Great fresh product, perfect size to keep handy in my kitchen
text: I love Fisher nuts and I use them exclusively with my holiday cooking. This is a perfect size bag for me when I bake my holiday cookies (will easily cook about 4-5 batches of cookies). Fisher makes a great product, conveniently packaged, incredibly fresh and wonderfully tasty. I wouldn't use anything else. My family and guests always rave about my cookies and I know that Fisher nuts make the difference in my baking.

title: Wonderful cup of coffee, starts my day out perfectly!
text: I love these K cups. I now use these in my Keurig daily and my husband and I are now sold on the My Cup Counts brand. High quality and at a lesser cost than other k cups, My Cup is a bold, full bodied blend, that starts our day perfectly. I have used several varieties of the MCC product, but this Breakfast Blend is one of the best varieties they make. We highly recommend this for any one who uses the K cup coffee machines and loves a great cup of coffee in the morning (and at a great price).

title: Another great Happy Belly product! A must have for every household!
text: I have purchased, and reviewed, Happy Belly products in the past. This brand never ceases to please me. Chock full of great natural ingredients, that mid-afternoon hunger urge is quickly alleviated with a small handful of their terrific products. This chocolate and dried fruit variety is one of my favorites. It satisfies all my hunger points (sweet, salty and fruity) and is a product that is actually good for me. I always keep a bag or two of these at my desk in the office and keep them in my house as well (for when my sons and grandchildren stop by) as it is an indulgence that will never disappoint!

title: Great way to add energy to your day! And great tasting, too!
text: These are definitely some of the best energy bars I have tried in a long time. Never heard of ZonePerfect before I got these, but I am so glad I did. Of course, the ingredients (including 10 grams of protein) and no artificial flavors or colors) are now making this my go to energy snack. Chewy and great tasting and I simply love this chocolate marshmallow flavor. Definitely has become my new go-to snack, especially in the mid afternoon when I am faced with the midday duldrums. I will be ordering additional varieties because I am so pleased with these.

title: An idea whose time has come! Just perfect in every way!
text: I simply love these. Perfect size for those dishes when a can is too much (and I end up discarding). I also love the little pouch, so much easier than opening a can and scraping around it (not to mention the fact that I think the paste tastes much fresher than canned). I only wish they made these in large pouches as well so I could replace the tedious cans altogether. No kitchen should be without a few of these: convenient, easy to open, perfect size. Kudos Hunts for coming up with an idea we can really use!

title: Best chocolates on the market today!
text: I love Dove chocolates, and this almond and dark chocolate variety is probably one of their best. Creamy, yet crunchy, flavorful and bite size, these make a great variety to keep in a bowl in your home or at the office for a special treat for the ones you love. Without being overly indulgent cost-wise, Dove to me is a better brand than more costly chocolates (I prefer them to Godiva and Ghiaredelli's bar none). Treat yourself and the ones you love to a special any time treat.

title: Great addition to my kitchen pantry
text: I have bought several Happy Belly spices and they are all great.This white sesame seed is no exception. The sesame is fresh and beautifully white /cream color and made my sesame chicken dish pop with flavor and color amidst rave reviews from my family. Not much I can say about this as the sesame seeds speak for themselves. By with confidence on line from Amazon for a quality, fresh product to enhance your pantry.

title: In love with a trail mix!
text: This trail mix is to die for. Wonderful tasting, all natural ingredients and scrumptious flavor that will keep you begging for more. I use this as my go to afternoon snack and, boy does it satisfy! The ingredients are healthy and give my body it's most needed afternoon boost. I also sometimes eat some in the morning before I go out for my workout to help give me that little bit of energy I may feel I need. I think Happy Belly products are great and this yogurt trail mix variety is one of their absolute best!

title: Not just for Iced Tea purposes!
text: Love this tea. Typically I drink either plain black tea or sometimes English Breakfast tea in the morning. This is absolutely my favorite. Although it states 'Iced Black Tea', I like this hot as well. The bags are a perfect size for a nice strong cup of tea and I add honey to make it perfectly sweet. I love this sized container, too. In buying the six pack you are always assured of a fresh product as only a small portion are open to the air at any time. I am also going to order the peach flavor as I think the variety of these is wonderful and I want to try more.

title: Great tasting and healthy snack for everyone!
text: I love granola bars, but was a little skeptical with the title 'nut and seed' I was thinking it would taste like bird food, dry and crunchy. Boy, was I pleasantly surprised! The pure taste of oats comes through primarily with the sweet goodness of pecans and pumpkin seeds. Great tasting and I love the texture. Yes, might be a little hefty in the calorie department (if you eat more of these than  you should) but I think these are a great lunch bag addition for your kids or even a mid afternoon work pick me up. I really loved these as they taste great and they are nutritious for you. Another home run by Nature Valley!

title: Greatest rice I have ever tasted and served!
text: I have to admit, I was a little skeptical when ordering this. I couldn't understand why this rice was so well rated and why it was so costly. After making this twice for my family, I now know why. This rice is incredible. I need less to make the equivalent in my cheaper supermarket rice and the flavor and texture is amazing. I love that there are 4 smaller bags within the large bag which makes for easier preparation and storage. Yes, it is expensive so it's probably going to be more than what people are planning to spend on a daily basis. But, in this case, you get what you pay for.. I am sold on this Tsuyahime rice and will be buying more.

title: Great meal making for the busy homemaker!
text: To begin with, I usually make my chili in a slow cooker as I prefer to let the seasonings slowly get absorbed into the ingredients. However, since my brother has issues with gluten, when I saw this I figured it would be worth trying. Although I admit, it's not as good as doing it the old fashioned way with spices and a slow cooker, I honestly thought the flavor overall was really good. Of course, it's not as spicy/hot as we typically like but we were able to quickly adjust for that. I did try to use this once in the slow cooker as well, but I like it better with fresh spices (since I have hours to cook with the slow cooker). For everyday, after school/work meals the single size convenient packets come in handy and are actually quite good. You can always add your own hot spices to your individual liking. Overall, rating a 5 star for convenience and a quick meal to prepare.

title: I absolutely love Skittles!!!
text: I have loved Skittles for years (for myself and my kids). I much prefer these over chocolatey snacks as they (to me anyway) are far less addictive when it comes to snacking. This bag (7.2 ounce) is a perfect size. Not too small that you would be going through multiple bags, but not too big as to risk being spilled, etc. Flavor is perfectly sour (I love the grape and strawberry the best), and I love having them last a long time in my mouth (not chewing) and a handful usually does me as a mid afternoon snack. And these are gluten free, another great plus!

title: Great gum, texture and flavor are fantastic and long lasting! And good for the environment as well!
text: Need to start by saying I love Extra gums. Used to be an exclusive Trident user, but I found that Extra gum tends to last longer and the flavor is as great an hour from now as it was when you first popped it in your mouth. This new packaging is fantastic. First it's 'green' and made of recyclable plastic which I love and it's a huge 35 count pack. This is perfect for storing in my purse and especially will be great when I travel to Europe next month. The spearmint flavor is wonderful and like I said, extra long lasting. I prefer this new packaging style and make better than anything I have seen on the market. I will be picking up more at my local Publix this weekend (if they have them). Just wonderful!

title: Great Refried Beans and they are Fat Free! Nice!
text: Average taste, I still needed to add my own spices to make it work well. I like the fact that it's Fat Free which makes me feel better serving it with the rest of my calorie ridden feast (lol, like cheese and tacos). You can rely on the El Paso name for quality. I honestly have no complaints about the beans, comparable to other brands on the market today. If you find this on sale, I would say it's worth the purchase. My family actually enjoyed these last night and I would recommend.

title: Great for baking
text: I love Granoro products. It is difficult to find 00 flour in my area, so ordering this through Amazon is a great option for me. Granoro has quality products and making biscotti and other Italian baked goods come out perfect in my cucina.

title: Absolutely the best Hot Chocolate ever!
text: I love this Ghiradelli Hot Cocoa mix. There is nothing better than a cold fall/winter's day and settling down with this rich, hot chocolate. I wish in some ways (calorie wise)that you could make it with water (instead of milk), but I am sure the taste would never be the same that way. I love loading on the whip cream. Mmmm...

title: Best cookies around!
text: I have always loved Vienna Fingers cookies, find them a great comfort food. To me, they are a step above Oreo cookies except they are vanilla. Crunchy on the outside, light vanilla creme on the inside. I ordered this last box of cookies to send to my son in college. He told me the case was devoured by his dorm within 48 hours. Lol, good to see my son loves them as much as I do, too!

title: Great cookies!
text: I am always looking for something to send to my sons (one is in college the other in the military). I sent these cookies along with some other LUs to my college son. He called me almost immediately when he received them (and suprisingly it wasn't for money, lol) to thank me. He told me that all his roomates devoured several boxes within just a few minutes. So, these cookies passed the college frat test. Combining it with Amazon Prime shipping and it's all good. Kudos!

title: Great for snacking
text: I have a son in the military and send him Amazon packages at least once a month. I mean, what can you say about Fruit Rollups? They are the same that you can buy in the store. What I love about them is that they stay fresh for ever and with Amazon Prime, my son gets them within 48 hours. I know he shares them with the other guys on base and they love receiving these 'care packages' from Amazon. Thanks!

If you get the light caramel colored ones I think you are good to go. But if they are dark brown, not so good. Scared to order again. Think I got a bad batch.

title: Very disappointed
text: I used to buy these jelly beans when I volunteered at the local hospital gift shop.  I remember being pleasantly surprised how good they were for a sugar free product.  I haven't had them for several years and decided to  purchase some this year.  They arrived in good shape, quickly.  I was anxious to try some, but then found them very disappointing.  They were dry and crumbly, not chewy.  The flavors were okay, but the texture was kind of off-putting.  I was going to give a bag to a friend who is diabetic, but decided not to.  Also, you can't eat many because of getting gassy (not uncommon with sugar free products).

title: Great texture
text: I love these jelly beans.  They are made with pectin and have a nice texture.  Unlike other non-"luxury" jelly beans, they don't crumble into a grainy, sugary, dryish texture.  While not having the multitude of different flavors the expensive beans have, they do have pleasant individual fruity flavors.  I do think they were a bit pricey compared to prices I've previously paid in the stores (especially after Easter), but not every store carries the brand and I didn't want to run around looking for them.  I was happy to find them on Amazon and enjoyed them.

title: This stuff is so good.
text:
These caramels are so good, they're dangerous. It's easy to overeat them. The taste is absolutely wonderful. It's unbelieveable that they're sugar free.

My only criticism is that they are too soft. They almost dissolve after a few seconds in the mouth and I feel like I'm drinking them down. I wish they were a little more firm/chewy.

Customer service is wonderful. Somehow I ordered the "regular' ones instead of "sugar free" and the company didn't give me a hard time about replacing them. I think they need to make the sugar free labels more distinctive. It looks too similar the the regular ones. Even though it does say "Sugar Free" it isn't distinctive and the rest of the label looks the same.

title: These are really delicious.
text:
I love the dark chocolate in these candies. They are delicious. And i really feel like it's eating M&M's. I just think they are expensive for the quantity. If they were a better price point I would probably buy them more often.

I put them in a pretty little shopping bag with tissue paper and enjoy bringing them with me when we visit friends for dinner and I know sugar free treats are needed, but can get boring. These are always appreciated when I bring them along.

title: These are soooo delicious.
text:
I need sugar free candy and these are absolutely delicious. I love caramels and found that some others I've tried taste burnt, but NOT these. They have a wonderful flavor and are so creamy. It would be easy to eat half the container in one sitting. My husband, who doesn't need sugar free likes them, too, and I really don't want to share them.

My complaint is that they are too creamy/soft and just about turn liquidy in the mouth so they kind of get swallowed down instead of being able to chew them for a few seconds. Don't know how they would make them a touch thicker, dryer, or stiffer, but if possible, they would stay on the palate longer and be even more enjoyable.

title: Bland
text:
Some of my favorite cookies were the Sunshine raisin biscuits that were discontinued years ago. I really wish they’d bring them back.
These are the closest I’ve come to replacing them. The biscuit and currants aren’t as sweet and I don’t think there are as many currants as there were raisins. So far the best substitute.

title: natural flavorings, pick your 5
text:
I purchased 2 'pick your own' 5 flavors. I am rating on flavors. But, it is my opinion everyone has a different sense of flavors and they are subjective in my mind. Natural raspberry - smells and tastes like raspberries.
Cherry vanilla - smelled like almond extract and tasted like it
Natural peach - oddly smelled like bitter almonds and was bitter in taste
Pumpkin pie spice - smelled predominately like alcohol with a slight spice background - doesn't really taste like pumpkin pie.
Natural Irish Cream - predominately alcohol, slightly 'cream' in flavor
Natural Rum - very rum forward - tastes like rum
Natural coffee - very good brewed coffee smell, taste - strong coffee
Natural butterscotch - smells likes warm butter, taste - sweet butterscotch
Caramel apple - smells a tiny bit like fermented apples - taste is really oddly salty! No apple or caramel. Weird
Natural Maple - smells very slightly maple - a little alcohol - tastes mildly of maple
Overall, some were good, some less. BUT taste is very subjective. So, in my opinion these are worthy of trying.
