text: tasty... and liked that there weren't artificial colors or flavors... I purchased because I have my grandsons visit and while these are far from "healthy" at least I can avoid the artificial crap.

title: caramel snowmen
text: These were great.  I gave them as little "random" holiday gifts throughout the season.... the guard at the gate... the grocery clerk... the post office worker (was soooo grateful for the thought)... they were very small... which meant I could carry a few in my purse and just randomly gave them out.  Was delightful and rewarding to see the smiles they produced!  Would buy again.

title: Peppermint Lollipops
text: Used in our annual xmas golf cart parade - BIG hit.  Nice flavor and easier to eat than a candy cane!  Huge box... went a LONG way with PLENTY to share!  I will look them up next year!

title: Brachs caramel candy
text: Used in our annual golf cart xmas parade... fresh and tasty - always a crowd favorite.  PLENTY to share!

title: Braggs amino
text: Watching our sodium... use this instead of soy sauce.  In my opinion its a richer taste than soy sauce... similar to soy sauce.  Got this size to take with us when traveling... restaurants...etc... The spray bottle is a good way to control portion and application.  Do wish we could get in packets - would be better for travel use.

title: PUR mints
text: Husband's favorite flavor of mints.  Pur brand do not contain aspartame or sucralose.  Xylitol is the sweetner and is supposed to be good for your teeth and gums.  He really likes the orange flavor.  We order the peppermint and other mint flavors too.  The pouches are easy to carry in the car or purse.

title: xylitol gum
text: We like this gum as the flavor lasts reasonably and the xylitol is actually good for your teeth and gums.  The fruit flavor is something like juicy fruit - my husband's favorite, I prefer the peppermint.  The packets are nice and keep the gum fresher than the tubs in my opinion.

title: Newman's red licorice
text: I love Newman's .. and how they support so many charity projects.... but I don't always love their products... this .. is one of those disappointing times.. *sigh*... they are just like the "plastic" vines... the non-vine brand that sounds like "sizzlers"...  YUCK - in my personal opinion of course.  AND this box is SO small... about 10 6" vines.  Yikers.  Way too expensive on top of it.  If you like the plastic type vines... you might like these.  They are not for me.

title: Gustaf's black licorice laces
text: Ok... so... if you're a HUGE licorice flavor fan, these probably won't be your favs.  The licorice flavor is quite light... it's more like a deep molasses flavor, which I love so for me they are PERFECT!  The ones I received were soft and fresh.  I found them delicious.  Arrived quickly (I have prime) and in great condition.  I would order them again.

title: banza pasta
text: If you are looking for a lower carb option to traditional pasta, this works.  Has higher protein content... and a lower carb count compared to regular pasta.  The texture is something like "al dente" ... they taste almost exactly like pasta... slightly.. vegetabley?? I couldn't really pick out a "chick pea" flavor - everyone is different though... It's hard to describe.. but definitely tasty. I like that this was a "variety" case so you get to try different shapes... depending on what you using it for... sauce, casserole, etc... Honestly, I would buy it again.  I also think if you haven't tried it, its worth trying.

title: Lowensenf
text: Husband is a HUGE fan of this mustard... up until now we had been buying it at an "import" store as it isn't carried in local stores... but then we found it on Amazon as an "add in" for less than 1/2 the price!  Hooray!!  It is a gray poupon style mustard in look and character... but I think spicer.  It is smooth - not grainy - as you can see in the pic they offer of the jar.  If you are into mustard, it's worth a try in my opinion.

title: pur cinnamon gum
text: I am a long time fan of PUR gum and the cinnamon flavor is one of my favs, along with chocolate mint.  :)  It really helps me when I am in the mood to snack on something sweet - I chose this instead and most of the time I can avoid the sugar whatever.  I keep a bag in my car too. No aspartame or sucralose... the xylitol is supposed to be good for your teeth.  I say it's worth a try if you haven't tried this brand before.

title: and this chocolate mint flavor really helps me at night when I feel like I need to snack on sweets
text: I have chewed Pur brand gum for a long time - no aspartame or sucrolose... and this chocolate mint flavor really helps me at night when I feel like I need to snack on sweets.  Plus it's good for your teeth with the xylitol.  So... win/win.  If you like chocolate mint in general - I say give this a shot!

title: bariwise hot cocoa with mini marshmallows
text: So.. this stuff tastes ok... but don't expect any mini "marshmallows"... there were about 3 or 4 teeny tiny white pieces and they quickly disintegrated... it is a milk chocolate flavor -  makes 8 oz.  It's ok when you REALLY want a hot chocolate.

title: dum dum sour apple suckers
text: Eh.  I was hoping these would be more sour... they are just really sweet, green suckers.  If you are going for a color theme and want an apple green  sucker, this is it. There are a lot in the bag.  If you're looking for a sour apple sucker... eh.  These are not it. If I am going to eat a dum dum, I prefer the grape.

title: sriracha packets
text:
They changed the packaging... these are much easier to open than the white ones... which contained 5 grams of sriracha... these contain 7 grams. I keep them in a zippered pouch in my purse for my husband. Since this is my second order, so obviously I think they are great!
UPDATE: These are MUCH easier to open than the old style... SUPER good.

title: brown sugar bourbon seasoning
text: Hard to review... it is sweet, as you would expect and a little smoky... I don't really taste "bourbon" per say ... but maybe the faint odor??  I hate to write reviews on such things... I would say if you like a sweet, smokey bbq flavor, you will like this.

title: cracker jack original
text: Really fresh, portion controlled tasty treat.  Honestly... 120 calories in one box.  Real sugar and molasses - no "caramel color" and of course the REAL treat to me - the peanuts!  Back in the day you got a sort of cool tiny toy... these contain the less cool flat paper sticker type thing (or at least that's all I've seen so far), but the stickers don't pose a choking hazard.  :)  Got these at a "special" price on Prime day -- so I figured that was sort of a prize in itself right?  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  They arrived quickly (prime, of course) and in excellent condition.

title: disposable salt and pepper
text: Perfect for a huge family reunion picnic.  Plenty to spread alllll the way down the table.  They arrive quickly and great shape ( I have prime)

title: nestle grape splash water
text: Bought this as I needed some "clear" liquids in preparation for a medical procedure and didn't want to get bored... I will say that this drink "smelled" grapey... but tasted less so.  It is still... not sparkly... and a little sweet.  I probably won't order again... but it is interesting for a change..

title: Bariwise chicken broth
text: I had a medical procedure and had to have only "clear" liquids for a day.  I thought I would try this because it had higher protein than regular broth.  It tasted really good too.  Worked perfectly.  I liked it enough I will buy it again to drink when I'd like, rather than because I had too.  Add 8 oz of hot water to a packet.  Tasty.. not super salty, in my opinion anyway.

title: Buddha cheddar popcorn
text: Delicious ready popped popcorn.  I find the hulls minimal.  The taste delicious and fresh... Definitely worth a try if you like popcorn. Wonderful to order online.  The Cheddar is less available to me locally, so nice to have it delivered to my door via Amazon. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

title: simply good jello pineapple orange
text: This is really my favorite flavor of Simply Good jello.... they make a couple of other flavors... this one is never is in my local stores... "up" side... real sugar.. NO artificial colors or flavors and it tastes SOOOO good.  It's honestly worth a try if you like jello but are trying to avoid the artificial flavors and colors out there.  I never hesitate to update my review should new info seem useful and reply to comments asap.

title: Simply good jello orange
text: Hooray for no artificial anything flavors or colors!  I stopped eating jello years ago due to yellow 5 or 6 and red #40. So.... this jello uses real sugar... it's NOT a "health" food... but it's a great option when you want a treat or have to do a liquid diet of sorts.  It tastes great. I find it useful to order on Amazon because my local store carries one or two flavors.  They also make a "simply" pudding too.. just fyi.  This review is my personal opinion and your thoughts may differ from mine, I respect that.

title: lipton cup a soup
text: When I don't feel well, this is just soothing to me.  Lipton Cup a soup, cream of chicken.  It's creamy... to be honest, it doesn't taste real "chickeny" but it does have a nice seasoning flavor.  Each packet makes a small mug of soup.  Add hot water to the mix.  It's easy and convenient. For some reason my local stores do not carry this - so I pay a bit more, but Amazon delivers to my door.

title: mini moos
text: One mini moo is zero points on weight watchers.. just FYI...  I love that I can have a little cream in my coffee and not kill my points.  They do not have to be refrigerated.  A very nice point.  Creamy and delicious.

title: dark chocolate kisses
text: These are just the answer when I am "dying" for a chocolate.  Not super sweet, but oh so satisfying in the chocolate flavor.  If you like dark chocolate, this is not the fanciest or the very best, but certainly worthy of eating - all my personal opinion of course.

title: sriracha popcorn sprinkles
text: Husband is a huge Sriracha consumer.  We go through many bottles a month.  So I thought he might like this "sprinkle."  It is made for popcorn, so there are additives... It did not make him cough as two other reviewers report, however, I found it very salty.  But again, it's a popcorn sprinkle... I wouldn't add it to popcorn with salt on it already.  He reported it "tasty" ... but not as hot as the bottled stuff.. still, the flavor was there for him.  I have purchased this twice now.  Personally I prefer this sellers "dill pickle" popcorn sprinkle, loads of dill flavor, but you gotta be a fan of pickles!

title: mini tootsie pops
text: If you're on one of those "counting" diets like me... these are 1 point apiece!  They are very small... but when you really want a treat, these are reasonable... They are sugar and continue to have artificial dyes and flavors.  I am hoping they will follow trends and use natural sourced dyes and flavors soon.  In the meantime, I find these to be a really reasonable sugar treat.  The bag I received has been fresh and tasty.  I put them in an airtight container.  I will update if any new issues arise and the info would be useful.

title: Sugar free caramels
text: Husband is diabetic and I am trying to reduce my refined sugar, so I thought I would try these... they are delicious.  I would NOT know they were sugar free unless you told me.  They are just perfect in texture and buttery in taste.  It was hard not to just keep eating them... however... as with most sugar free treats, you may regret that because of what happens - not so pleasant.  These are quite expensive but as treats I think they are worth a try. I see they also have a chocolate caramel and I haven't tried those yet... but I might next time.

title: Pur bubblegum and chocolate mint
text: So, my favorite of the two is the chocolate mint.  Soooo satisfying.  I don't chew bubble gum (since I was 10) very often... but it tastes just as remember.  Not much for a "pop" though... I think it's more about the taste.. I will buying the chocolate mint again and again!  The chocolate flavor comes first, then the mint... just a hint.. just enough.  The chocolate is definitely the main flavor. I have many PUR flavors and I use them in my "tool" box to avoid eating sweets. It works for me. Pur makes a really great variety of flavors, something for everyone. Worth a try and form your own opinions.

title: Sugar free lollypops
text: Husband is diabetic and I am trying to back away from refined sugar... so I thought we'd try these.  They are tasty!  And feel like a treat when I feel sugar "calling" me. The flavors are represented... however, they are "soft" flavors... meaning not terribly strong - but tasty all the same. I bought an airtight jar to keep them in as the bag they come in says they are "sensitive" to moisture in the air.  The lollys themselves last quite a few minutes as you enjoy them.  The sticks are a rolled/compressed paper.  Honestly, I enjoy these very much and appreciate they are relatively "ok" for me to eat on occasion.  As with any sugar free item, you do not want to over indulge. If you are looking to back away from sugar or are diabetic and long for a sweet treat once in a while, I really think these are worth trying.

title: PUR gum cool mint
text: I just hate aspartame - so this is the gum for me.  It keeps a pretty good flavor for several minutes.. it then gets a bit tough - but most gum does, at least to me. They are coated tabs of gum - not sticks.  I really like them - the cool mint flavor is my personal favorite, but I backup to the peppermint when I can't get the cool mint. They offer spearmint and cinnamon too. I personally like the cinnamon too... but not really a spearmint fan. I like the skinny boxes, they fit in any of my purses.  I think these are worth a try if you too are not a fan of aspartame.

title: stur tropical punch powder
text: I really like that are no artifcial colors, flavors or sweeteners. There is some sugar, mixed with stevia. So it's not terrible. Plus I don't drink these everyday - so it's ok. I purchased the three flavors I like... the lemonade which I can add to water, or sometimes I add to my unsweetened ice tea - makes like an "Arnold Palmer." I also purchased the tropical punch, which I sometimes add to sparkling plain water - reminds me of the tropical punch soda of my childhood and then the orange... which, again, with sparkling water makes like an orange soda. I should mention that they recommend using one whole tube in about 16-17 oz water bottle... But when I am mixing with unsweetned ice tea, I can use a lot less... the sparkling water mixes I use about 1/2 a tube. But, to each his own! I like less sweet.. if you like more.. use more! To be honest, I mostly drink plain water. But sometimes you just need a change, you know? I prefer the most natural product I can get and easily use. I do really like these. To save a bit of money I did buy the 6 boxes of each... and shared with my daughter and her family. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

title: simply gum yum
text: This stuff is really really interesting.  I actually like all the flavors, except for the fennel which is like licorice/anise.  I share that with my husband.  I usually take 2 pieces as they are kind of small.  The flavor lasts for the time I like to chew ( about 20 mins or so) ... the maple flavor is surprisingly good... but honestly, everyone likes something different.  If you like to avoid aspartame and other harmful chemicals and you like to chew gum, I honestly think this is worth a try.  I will tell you a couple of things I learned when chewing this gum.  It tastes... good... not too strong...just good flavor.  It did NOT stick to my dental work... I have various fillings, crowns, an implant and even a permanent retainer.  No sticking on any of them.  HOWEVER... when you get ready to spit it out, do NOT try to spit it out into your hand... it will stick to your skin, your clothes... anything it can attach to!  So I recommend spitting into a small piece of paper or a tissue or directly into a garbage can. I really love that is natural gum and that they experimented with flavors.  I think it's worth at least one try.  I personally will keep buying it.  Happy chewing.

title: PUR gum coolmint
text: I avoid aspartame per my neurologist.  He advises that every time you ingest any aspartame its like taking a full on hit to the head with baseball bat.  Now... you don't have to believe that... but I do.  So, I purchase this gum.  It is very tasty.  The flavor lasts as long as I am willing to chew it - which I admit is probably less than 20 mins or so.  It does get to be a little tough too.  Another reason not to chew for too long.  Honestly, for me it's all about no aspartame.  You don't have to agree... just my personal opinion.

title: Fever-tree ginger beer
text: I am rather picky about my ginger beer.  It has to be more dry than sweet and it must be spicy.  This ginger beer is delicious.  And I love that it is the smaller 6.8oz bottle.  You never waste that way.  I mix it with my lemonaide.... ice tea...and make a mean moscow mule with it.  If you are a lover of ginger ale... this will probably not do it for you... but I hesitate to discourage anyone from trying it for themselves.  This brand is not the driest ginger beer I have ever had... but it is not the sweetest either.  My personal feeling is that it is a lovely half way between the over sweet and the over dry.  There is sugar involved, but it is NOT a chemical... it's real sugar.  It's mostly clear... a slight ivory tinge... but no artificial colors. It is spicy, but again, not the spiciest I have ever had.  Honestly, if it's too spicy, it takes away from whatever you're mixing it with.  It needs to have a ginger bite, but not one that leaves too deep a mark - so to speak.  I am very happy with my stock of Fever Tree Premium Ginger Beer - in the small, waste free bottles.  They take up less space in the fridge that way too.  I never hesitate to update my review should new info prove useful.  I waited to review until I had used several times.  Everyone enjoys a little differently, so these are strictly my opinions.  I respect those who disagree. That being said, I would personally recommend this brand to anyone who would like to try it and those who appreciate a well balanced ginger beer made with natural ingredients.

title: Very interesting, worth a try
text:
I purchased this flavor at my local grocery just to try it. While it is just sparkling water with "essence" of whatever flavor you choose, this flavor (coconut) tastes a tiny bit sweet on your tongue for just a second. The essence of coconut is quite strong, but not over bearing. You can actually taste it as opposed to other sparkling water that has the "essence" of flavor. Sometimes with others you can smell it, but not really taste it. With this flavor you can definitely taste the coconut. It is very interesting. I can't decide if I love it or just like it. But one thing is for sure... no artificial sweetners, colors, etc... it is certainly a better choice than a soda. I plan to try other flavors, but I will likely buy it locally. Honestly the prices on Amazon are 3x the price in the local store. So I would only order here if I was not able to get it locally. I wish it would come in glass as opposed to aluminum.

It was comforting then and I was hoping now as my friend was having a bit of down time.  She reports that it is still rich and creamy and soothing.  Kinda makes me want to have some now.  Yum.

title: quick and easy
text:
I purchased this for my god daughter who is a nutritionist. I have become aware of the studies on naturally occuring arsenic in rice. It was a theory that processed rice, like Minute Rice might have less of this naturally occuring arsenic as it has been "hulled" thoroughly in order for a quicker cooking process. But... that's only what I took from reading about these studies. These studies also noted that brown rice contains more naturally occuring arsenic because the hull remains. The hull does provide a slight more "fiber" but I don't think it is enough to make me eat it. They noted that white rice still contains this arsenic, but a lower lever due to removal of the hull. Still in all they recommend rinsing all rice until the rinse water is clear... but not so with Minute Rice... apparently that is less necessary. But I suspect it would also alter the cooking of Minute Rice to rinse it. Also noted was that Adults should eat no more than 1 cup per week of rice. Yikes. I know my god daughter eats quite a lot of rice... as does my niece. So I was hoping SOME of their rice might be Minute Rice. It is versatile and quick cooking, making it an easy meal addition.
Hope this has been helpful. If you disagree, I completely support your right to have another opinion. Just remember I have a right to my opinion as well. Thanks for reading my review.

You can make it more saucy (less of a spread and more of sauce) and add a bit of hot sauce of you choice and you've got a pad thai peanut sauce.  You can add to smoothies. Oatmeal... the list goes on.  I've even added a bit of coconut as a spread. Awesome!  The peanut flavor is slight less strong as regular peanut butter. But I have also found that just a tiny pinch of sea salt develops a bit more flavor.  Honestly, if you love peanut butter. you are trying to eat more healthy food, you really should get just one jar and try it. title: Interesting...
text:
These are... interesting.... The "soft raspberries"... are covered with granulated sugar on the outside and I have to say, to me, they were exceptionally gross. NOT even remotely good... a really odd flavor I can't really describe and SUPER sweet. They are, however, VERY soft. I tried the "salty licorice fish" ... They, with the "soft raspberries" went right into the garbage.... the salty licorice was SO salty I nearly spit it out....wish I had. There is some licorice flavor... but the salt really takes over all the way through the chew. They were also very, very chewy, sticky. I am still picking it out of my teeth!
Lastly I tried the "nordic gummi fish".... they are ok... but are NOT swedish fish if you're thinking they might be close. Flavor is a little odd, but after the soft raspberries and the salty licorice, I kept the the nordic fish. They are firmer and a bit more waxy than real swedish fish. They have a unique flavor that I believe would be best to think of as unique to these treats and not compare them to swedish gummies. Just my opinion! Since everyone has a different taste, I would recommend you try them and make up your own mind. These arrived in good condition and in good time (I have Prime).
Nordic Sweets does a sweet called "Swedish Forest Berries" that are also interesting... a bit waxy and unique flavor, but I like them better than the nordic gummi fish.

title: perfect for nuts and popcorn
text: This is very, very finely ground salt... it's almost... airy.  But that makes it nice for popcorn because it coats more evenly.  I oven roast my own nuts and seeds. I found this type of salt is so nice for the same reason as the popcorn use, even coating.  Would recommend.

title: An interesting look
text: I bought these to add flair to a spring themed Mother's Day party.  The butterflies were just beautifully colored and almost natural in bright vibrant colors in some cases.  I found them to taste a little bit like a sugar cone, but just vaguely.  They really don't taste much at all. They really are more for looks anyway.  A helpful hint... I put mine on a deep chocolate cake... it would have been nice to have a little chocolate frosting in a tube for "glue" to attach the butterflies to the cake.... so if I do this again, I will have some matching frosting for "glue"!  Also... the butterflies arrived "flat" however they were easy to "shape," but be very careful not to bend them too far or press them in the center too hard, they are very delicate.  Happy decorating!

title: Taste is subjective
text: Another reviewer reported he/she didn't like the taste at all and I had just the opposite opinion!  My family loves it.  It tastes like lightly sweetened black tea with a touch of lemon.  I honestly do really enjoy it.  However, everyone is different as our reviews show.  I really do believe it's worth a try if you enjoy black iced tea.  I don't like too heavily sweet tea and the sugar is very subtle. You could add sugar I suppose if you're into "sweet tea."  At only 15 calories per 8 oz, there isn't much sugar or calories which is perfect for me. Each tea bag makes a quart and I find that to be accurate.  There are six bags in one box.  Not a great price point, but still worth it for me.

title: Did you know?
text: Fritos has the corn delivered on the cob... they remove it, grind it and add a bit of corn oil and salt.  THAT'S ALL.  Yeah.  Fritos are NOT health food, but honestly, it's technically whole ground grain and nothing artificial. They are an excellent choice when you just have to have a chip!

title: Perfect size
text: These are awesomely packed.  You don't have to open 1/2 the box in one package.  They have just a few in one pack.  Love it.

title: always welcome
text: Bought a number of flavors as treats at the family Mother's Day gathering.  Lindt truffles are always a treat and no one refuses them.  They are so luxurious.  The shell slowly melts and the center is creamy and smooth.... Yum!  As I purchased a handful of flavors, the 9.3 oz bag will be plenty. The hazelnut is a new flavor for us.  I am certain it will disappear.  Happy Chocolate to all!

title: always a treat
text: Bought a number of flavors as treats at the family Mother's Day gathering.  Lindt truffles are always a treat and no one refuses them.  They are so luxurious.  The shell slowly melts and the center is creamy and smooth.... Yum!  As I purchased a handful of flavors, the 9.3 oz bag will be plenty.  Happy Chocolate to all!

title: one of the best
text: This spring truffle is really tasty.  I purchased these for a mother's day family celebration.  The center is a white cream and while normally I don't care for that, but it is a perfect compliment to the outer chocolate.  Yum!

title: funky
text: I love watching the food channel show called "Chopped."  This was one of the basket ingredients and I was intrigued by it and wanted to try it.  They are sweet and a little chewy... I am going to try them in jello.  They don't really have a flavor on their own, so you could make tapico or rice pudding using these, or like I am doing in jello... I don't think they'd be terribly good just on their own.  The 3 cans I purchased were mostly ok... although a little dented.  I am disappointed the seller sent them, but I don't think they were damaged enough to be unsafe.

title: favorite brand
text: This is my favorite genmaicha tea.  It's a little like regular green tea, but the toasted rice adds a bit of sweetness.  Tea is personal, but I love it and recommend this brand.  Also, this loose tea. Another personal preference.

title: love loose tea
text: I do really love genmaicha and loose tea.  I will say that if you don't like regular green tea you might like this because the toasted rice adds a kind of sweetness.  It is a personal choice, but I really enjoy it.

title: too expensive, but good
text: I LOVE shortbread and I just wanted these so I ordered them.  But I have to say, you can buy a much more reasonable and comparible shortbread in the store.  Sometimes I use Amazon when I am sending something to someone other than myself because it's easy.

title: pretty good
text: My grandma always had orange pekoe tea.  So, I thought I would try this and it does remind me of tea time with grandma.  I prefer loose tea and this is.

title: tea bags
text: I love genmacha tea and usually use loose tea.  But I thought I would try these for convenience.  I really don't think it matches up to the flavor of loose tea genmacha, but it works.  Plus I like a few little toasted rice kernels in with my tea... in a bag, you really don't get that.  I will probably stick with the loose choice, but I think it's a personal choice.

title: fun
text: I love GoGo squeeze.  However, I was not aware these were going to arrive loose, out the box.  I received a box, not packed with anything but the applesauce, loose.  Would have preferred they arrive in the box.  In any case, these are great, room temp, refridgerated, or my favorite, frozen.  I am not the target audience for these, but there isn't an age limit on good taste.

title: Bought for Musubi
text: Not a huge seaweed fan, but Mom wanted to try Musubi and I needed some seaweed "strips".  These worked great.

title: Good
text: Good way to try all the flavors.  I like Zevia because there aren't artificial flavors and/or colors.  That's a big deal for me. I think I like the grape, rootbeer and gingerale the best, but I was curious about some others.

title: YUM!
text: This is the best Genmaicha I have ever purchased.  If you've never had Genmaicha, it's basically green tea.  But the roasted rice REALLY adds a wonderful, toasty flavor. It's slightly sweeter than plain green tea.  Honestly, if you do not like green tea, than you may not like this either. The shipping was a bit slower than I'd like... but I will order this tea again and again.

title: Great
text: This is a very economical way to get my FAVORITE earl grey tea, Stash.  It's by far the best flavor to me.  It's not very "pretty" packaging... the come loose in a small cardboard box.  But I don't care about that.  I bought the regular earl grey this way too.  I will come back to order again.

title: Ok
text: As other's have reported, I think this particular flavor tastes the most like "diet soda."  I honestly don't taste the "lime" part.  I add some fresh lime to it and that helps.  I used to love diet coke lime, but I don't do aspartame.  I was hoping this would be close, but it is not even close.  It's drinkable with added fresh lime though.The good part, no artificial sweetners or dyes.  I can forgive a lot for that.  I would probably just get the plain cola and add lime to it.  I love the Zevia grape, rootbeer and ginger ale.

title: Yum
text: I bought these to add to gift bags I made at Halloween.  They were individually wrapped so that made it easy.  Also, who can turn down a Walkers real butter shortbread cookie?  They are my fav.  I added some speciality tea and the gift bags were well received.

title: arrived on time and well packaged
text: I bought these to put in some gift bags.  I kept a package for me. It is a n interesting flavor. It smells more of vanilla than tastes.  The cinnamon is the predominate flavor which I like.  Stash brand is my favorite by a long shot.

title: my fav salty snack
text: This is my new favorite salty, healthy snack.  The 2 ounce size is so handy and good portion control (each bag is about 2 servings).

title: not that great
text: The containers were packed down to about 1/2 full.  And so the "cotton candy" part of the candy really isn't that great.  It's not fluffy.  It also tasted a bit chemically.  Honestly, we just threw it away.

title: good for you
text: Xylitol is good for your teeth.  The gum is a bit tough when you initially chew it and the flavor lasts about 10 minutes.  But who wants to chew for a long time? I buy this gum in the fruit flavor too to distract me from other high calorie candy or cookies.

title: pretty good
text: I don't really love chamomile tea, but my naturopath wants me to drink more chamomile tea. So, I thought perhaps a little lavendar would help.  It does.  It's bit less "grassy" tasting to me.

title: Yum
text: These little rounds are soooo tasty.  I grab about 6 of them when I am craving salt and that does it.  To me they taste like salty, crunchy sunflower seeds.  The crunch is tender, not "tough" and I like that too. They are a reasonable in the nutrition too. I'm pretty picky about snacks and they "passed" for me.  I first bought these at Costco.  They sold out and I needed to find another source. Thank God for Amazon.

title: cookies 5 stars, shipping 1 star
text: These cookies are awesome.  Finding them somewhere in the states has proven a challenge.  So I ordered them with no idea they were coming from Australia!  Unfortunately, they were packed very poorly.  A thinly padded envelope.  The cookies are individually wrapped and just poured into the sub-standard envelope.  Some of the cookies didn't make it. I would order these cookies again, but NOT from this seller.

title: spicy!
text: The cinnamon flavor is soooo natural tasting.  Like fresh cinnamon.  The gum doesn't last long in flavor and is a tad tough, but honestly, xylitol is good for your teeth.  And who wants to chew gum for 10 hours anyway.  I would recommend it.

title: Tastes like juicy fruit
text: I love Spry xylitol gum.  This particular favor, fresh fruit, tastes just like juicy fruit to me!  The gum tablets are a little tough and the flavor is short lived.  But then, I use it when I need to distract myself from eating something I shouldn't.  It doesn't have to last more than 15 minutes or so. So, I would still recommend it.  And xylitol is good for your teeth!  No aspartame!!  Hooray!

title: Hmmm.
text:
I bought these because I am constantly trying new drink drop additives that do not contain harmful colors and/or sweetners. The posting says the flavors are quite strong and to use sparingly. Honestly, the sweetness level is extremely high, but the fruit flavor is suprisingly mild. I mean, you can smell it... but it's very little fruit flavor. If I am going to go THAT sweet, I personally prefer Stur. I do like the bottle and dropper. It's a great way to measure.
Taste is very personal. And I am reporting MY opinion honestly.

title: really helps me
text: My naturopath recommended this tea and my gastro agreed.  It gently aids in digestion.  It tastes a little minty (but not too much) and I find it very easy to drink. I use one tea bag a day, just adding hot water as I go along and the last cup of the day is just as tasty as the first.  I buy this tea by the multi box because I end up sharing it with so many of my friends!

title: Yum!
text: Bought this because we have to watch the sodium.  This tastes EXACTLY like soy sauce, but with a fraction of the sodium and it's better for you.  We actually use instead of salt on about anything!  I had this in a bottle with a "drip" top... the spray top is REALLY awesome cause it mists all over.  Would I recommend this?  TOTALLY.

title: I love it
text: I really like the taste and LOVE LOVE LOVE my sodastream.  It's SO nice to make a bottle of pop for pennies.  AND particularly tonic.  I only use in my Gin and tonic's... so I make the 1/2 liter.  I know others have dogged the flavor, but I guess it's a personal taste thing... I really like it!

title: no artificial dyes or flavors
text: Listen, this IS a drink MIX.  But I have to say it tastes particularly good.  No aspartame either.  It is sweetened with sucralose (Splenda, yellow packets).  I normally just drink plain old water, but my "treat" drink is an Arnold Palmer... 1/2 tea, 1/2 lemonaide.  I can taste the tea and the lemonaide in perfect harmony. It IS a bit sweet so I add more water and ice.  Happily it does not weaken the flavor.  Keep an open mind and you'll love this drink mix.  With no artificial dyes, flavors or aspartame, this IS a 5 calorie treat we can all enjoy with less worry.  HOOOOORAAAYYY AriZona Teas!!!!  You guys totally ROCK!

title: husband says A++++

title: LOVE newmans...most of the time..

title: No aspartame
text: It's a real bummer that you can't find this product more readily on the shelf at the grocery store.  I refuse to buy 99.9% of the gums at the checkout because they contain aspartame. This gum is tasty and may be helpful in better protecting your teeth.  The sweetner is made from birch trees and so far there isn't any scary news about it.

title: easter candy

title: its chocolate

title: Diabetic husband LOVES
text: My husband is diabetic and has a REALLY big sweet tooth... I was hopeful these would taste good AND be a tasty option.  He says the licorice is SUPER tasty.  "like a really soft, tasty piece of soft black licorice"... those are his words... I don't eat black licorice so I will have to take his word for it.  Xylitol is supposed to be good for your teeth and a "safe" sweetner.  Since my husband is working out of town, I sent this to him and have not checked the nutrition label for artificial dyes.  I hope they do NOT.  Will update my review and drop stars if they contain red#40, yellow#5 or 6.

title: No artificial dyes, flavors or aspartame
text:
I love a water enhancer... but NOT red dye #40 or yellow #5 or #6. So, in my search, I found STUR. Compared to Mio, the stur flavors are slightly less intense, but I am SO alright with that as there isn't any artificial dyes (IN ALL MIO FLAVORS and it's vibrant, so it's a LOT of artificial dyes some of which are illegal to use in food products in other countries), flavors or aspartame(NOT in Mio). Having said that... Plain water is always the best choice. When you want an occasional change, I believe this drink mix is a good option. It is my opinion that everything that is "processed" probably contains things that could be questionable. So for me, it's about doing the best you can to avoid the worst/most of it. Of course, doing your own "processing" is always best. I do like that is a family business.

UPDATE 9/2013: I've been asked to provide the ingredient list. If you go to the Stur website you will find all the latest and greatest flavors AND ingredients. Just rollover the bottle icon. If you have any issues with their website, please do contact them.
REMEMBER: We are reviewing this product... not using this forum as a platform for personal attacks! I respect your right to an opinion and I've tried to provide the best, honest reviews I can. Peace to all.

title: Fun and tasty

title: Tasty, But Not My Go-To Caramels . . .
text:
I'm addicted to soft caramels, so obviously, I have a go-to brand. One day, when that brand was out of stock, I had no choice but to search for a decent replacement. I always check the reviews before purchasing an item, and that's when I discovered Tara’s caramels. Tara’s had surprisingly high and positive ratings. The only thing that held me back from immediately ordering the caramels was the steep price tag. However, I was craving soft caramels, so finally, I took the plunge and submitted my order.

The caramels came wrapped in an almost butcher-like paper, which made it easy to unwrap the caramels without the frustration of the caramel sticking to its wrapping paper. The caramels were very soft, just the way I like them. Also, I was pleasantly surprised by the quantity that came in the container. In regards to the taste, it was a bit different than the original tasting caramels I'm used to having. The hint of sea salt was a nice contrast from what I usually pig 🐷 out on. However, if I'm being straightforward, the taste of Tara’s caramels couldn't beat how costly they are. The brand I usually have is nowhere near the price of Tara’s caramels. Maybe that's why I believe Tara’s caramels, while tasty, are not worth the cost. To be completely honest, I would indulge in Tara’s caramels if offered some. I just wouldn't pay for these caramels out of my pocket. On the other hand, if I were offered a free lifetime of caramels, with any brand of my choosing, without a doubt, I would pick my usual go-to brand Werther’s Soft Caramels over all other brands.

title: Great Value for the Best Caramels!
text: I love Werther’s Soft Caramels because of how soft and fresh they genuinely are. After tasting them the first time, I can’t resist them. Just thinking of Werther’s Soft Caramels makes my mouth water. It would be fair to call me a caramel addict. Therefore, I’ve tried many different soft caramels, and they were all decent, but in regards to value, none of the other brands came close to Werther’s. Keep in mind, the only reason I tried these other brands was due to Werther’s Soft Caramels being out of stock. As a result, I tried Tom & Jenny’s Sugar-Free Soft Caramels, which were great especially considering that they’re sugar-free. However, you can’t ignore the hefty price tag for such a small quantity. Then I tried Tara’s Gourmet Sea Salt Caramels. In my opinion, they were very soft, yet still not as tasty as Werther’s. Tara’s container comes with a decent amount of caramels, but being straightforward, I believe Tara’s caramels are more expensive than they should be. With that said, I prefer to stick with Werther’s because their soft caramels are both delicious and cost-efficient.

If you want a more mild ginger cake then this may not be for you, but I think it’s fantastic. You can make cookies or cake. The cake is really good but has a stronger ginger flavor than other brands. title: Obsessed with this water- no after taste!
text: I love this water. It makes me drink more water and there is no weird after taste. It’s great. I love every flavor except the blackberry but it’s just a personal preference. The pineapple is great. You won’t be disappointed!

title: Weird texture- SO oily and has chunks that don’t smooth out
text: I was SO excited to find a home made vanilla buttercream frosting without all the chemicals in it. Sadly, this is NOT a good choice. It has lumps in the frosting- even after I heated it up so it was easier to spread. In addition, it’s just got palm oil, coconut oil, sugar, and tapioca. It upset everyone’s stomach. There is SO much heavy oil in this frosting. Butter is easier to digest. Coconut oil is like eating a tablespoon of Crisco. Our stomachs were SO upset we were fighting for bathroom time. Not good.

title: The Cookies Are Burned!!!
text: The front Palmier is one I got at the grocery store. The second one (burned) is this brand. I have bought several boxes to make sure I didn’t get a bad batch but they are all burned! French Palmiers are NOT burned. Burned sugar is like burned onions in a sauce- you can’t get the taste out of your mouth no matter what you do. I covered these in powdered sugar to try to make it better but you could still taste the burned sugar.

title: Very Dry, and no depth of flavor
text: This is ok. If you like your baklava a little more moist then you won’t like this. The phyllo dough is fine but the nuts on some of the pieces are whole and it’s quite dry. Some pieces are bland with just phyllo dough and whole pistachio nuts. No honey drizzled along their pieces. Just average compared to other baklava I’ve had.

title: Amazing Flavor- Grossly Overpriced!
text: This tastes just like the inside of a cream brûlée’. That’s the great part. The bad part is that it is smaller than a container of yogurt and the price is outrageous. I found it at another grocery store for less $3.99 but you get about 4 teaspoons out of it. If you have money to burn and want a itty bitty dessert then this is the one. For me, I just would like it to be the size of a breakfast yogurt- like a yoplait would be perfect. Not half the size.

title: No flavor- not worth the price!

These were soft and tasted like cardboard. They had no flavor to them. I wouldn’t even use them as a base for strawberry shortcake. Don’t waste your money.

title: Amazing Flavor!!
text: I’m not doing a strictly Keto diet but I do want to cut down on carbs and read an article on how fats in the form of seed oils contribute to our sugar cravings. The solution is to use coconut, olive or avocado oils instead. I HATE the taste of avocados but I saw this dressing and thought I would try it. It’s AMAZINGLY GOOD!! I finished my salad and there was a tiny bit of dressing left- I drank it!  This is worth the money and I like their slogan, “Eat as if your life depended on it.” For some reason that just hit a note with me. Give it a try- you won’t regret it.

title: GREAT water without after taste!
text: I LOVE this water! It is so refreshing and doesn’t leave any kind of after taste at all!! The only flavor I’m not a fan of is the blackberry- that has a little aftertaste but all the others are very refreshing and make me drink more water during the day!

text: The coffee flavor is strong and I think it's among the best coffee flavored candies that I have ever had. The coffee flavor is what you taste first, not the sweetness. I would say that it even has the slight bitterness of strong coffee. I have looked for this flavor since I had a similar candy in Europe. The candy is a bit over an inch long in a very attractive wrapper. They are perfect for putting in a small bowl on a side or buffet table.

After I had made a cup I tried to doctor the taste with a little milk and sugar. It didn't help. When my husband came into the room he asked what the odor in the room was. I said it must be my tea. He didn't believe it until I took the cup over to him. That was it!

If I didn't know better, I'd think this was a joke. I am SO happy that I only gave it to one friend! The only flavor description I can give is one of a slightly sour chocolate note. I was and still am very let down with this product.

text: I've tried many different brands, and this is by far the best. Fresh flavor and lots of chunky nuts. It makes the best air fried cookies too. 1 cup of PB. 1 cup of sugar (I use less) one egg. Mix and bake for about 10 minutes at 350-400. It all depends on your machine. So quick and easy. Way better than in the oven too.

title: Metallic taste
text: I recently received these and every time I eat them it has a metallic taste like I'm biting down on aluminum foil. Has anyone else had that taste and feeling? I think I'll call the company tomorrow in case these are contaminated with metal shavings or something.

title: Outstanding
text: I ordered this some time back and it was and is a good product. I just finished the bottle and opened a different brand that I had gotten through Amazon. I noticed a bad smell. It had expired 2 months before I bought it. From now on I'll stick to this brand and seller. It made some awesome garlic bread, was very tasty when used as is, or in cooking. Has a great taste and pleasant smell.  I really liked it for sauté meats or veggies. You won't regret this purchase.

title: Jolly Ranchers
text: You want a review? Come on. it's Jolly Ranchers. Need I say more?

title: THE best mints
text: I admit it. I have a thing for mints. They helped me quit smoking.  I've bought all kinds of mints, and these are my favorite. I've tried the expensive mints in tins and such. These are the mints I prefer. If you're crazy about mints and fresh breath like I am, try these. You won't regret it.

title: Extraordinary.
text: These are really good cookie/candy treats. They're individually wrapped and really sophisticated looking and tasting. They make you feel special, and we all need that on occasion.  They are dipped in white chocolate and really taste like a cross between a cookie and candy bar.  Try them. You won't regret it.

title: Superior product
text: For almost 40 years I had to eat creamy Peter Pan peanut butter because that's what my husband liked. I'm divorced and I wanted some crunchy peanut butter. I can't believe I've been missing out. This product is by far superior to any other I've tried. I wasn't much of a peanut butter eater until I bought this. I've eaten almost the whole jar by my self in about a month.  The best cookies are made with this peanut butter. 1cup of sugar, 1 egg, 1 cup of peanut butter. Cook them in an airfryer on 350 for about 10-15 minutes. It is unlike anything you've ever tasted.  A cross between peanut butter fudge and a cookie. Amazing. My little dog's addicted.  I'm loving my freedom.

title: Great smoothies
text: I love the Mocha Madness smoothies from Tropical Smoothies. I can make these taste similar. I mix mine with frozen banana for creaminess, but it does add a slight banana taste. I make some in advance and freeze them. Yum. I'm about out, so I'll be ordering more.

title: Sophisticated mass produced cookies
text: If you've never had Biscoff cookies I'll try and explain them to you. They're a European cookie or biscuit as they say in Europe.  Made in Belgian they aren't as sweet as American cookies. They have a mild spicy flavor like a hint of ginger and taste more like a cross between a ginger snap and a short bread cookie. They go great in the morning with coffee, or make wonderful desserts when paired with puddings an cream.  They aren't decadent like American sweets, but more like something Audrey Hepburn might nibble on will taking tea.  You must try them at least once just for the experience.

title: Surprisingly Good
text: I've only used it once, but it was surprisingly good. No after taste. I just mixed up a small batch of chocolate cookies without using a recipe. The cookies actually tasted like they had chocolate chips in them. My sister agreed. We were amazed. They were exceptionally good and we couldn't believe they had no chips of bits of chocolate candy. This is a gamechanger in my opinion. I can't wait to play with this product to see what I can produce with it. Exceptional.  No way could I have gotten this with regular sugar. Yes I will be buying more.

title: Yummy Yummy
text: These are really good adult candies. Intense flavor. They are in wrappers so sharing is easy. It's nice to carry a little refresher with you. I would recommend them. I bought a case and handed them out to relatives and friends.

title: Outstanding
text: The orange flavor is the first of many I've tried, but it is the absolute best. I cannot get enough of this candy.  I quit smoking 2 years ago and suddenly found myself craving cigarettes again. This candy is has really helped. It's crazy good. So intense. I've tried many of the other flavors and this is by far the best. I'm not usually a fan of orange, but this is outstandingly good. I'm even giving them out to friends. It's one of those things that you just have to get your friends to taste it. I'm mailing them around the US to several friends because they are that good.

title: I fell in love with the orange drops first
text:
Around 20 years ago I purchased a tin of tangerine drops and they were incredible. I quit smoking almost 2 years ago and recently started having cravings. I was looking for something like the tangerine drops I had purchased years ago. I jut felt that would curb my cravings. I found this brand of orange drops and purchased them first. They were absolutely outstanding. That tangy orange flavor was so satisfying. I had to have more. I found this four pack on sale. I was so excited to try the different flavors. But they lack where the orange leads. They're good, but not like the orange. They aren't that fresh and sour taste. More like a candy. A little to sweet and not enough sour. Still I liked them and bought 3 packs for me and I'm
sending some to my FB friends to try, for a total of 6 packs of 4. They are that good. I had recommended they try them. When they went on sale I said heck with referrals, I'm sending them some so we can all chat and suck on our sour candy like kids again. But this taste is definitely for adults. It's a sophisticated drop. Try them and I know you'll love them as much as I do.

title: I was a skeptic, but I love this stuff
text: I had the maple pecan, a package of 12. I was skeptical of how good this would be. I've had instant oatmeal and don't care for it.  I ordered this for me and my mother to try. I got it at a reduced price on warehouse deals. It was exceptional. Adult oatmeal with a more mature pallet  would enjoy this.  If you like oatmeal, the real stuff with mature additives like maple, pecan, coconut, etc. I think  you'll love this.

title: Not what I expected but they're kind if addictive
text: When you're from Arkansas you're used to the cheap stuff.  I saw a bag of candy on sale at Amazon. They looked like milk chocolate and white chocolate malt balls. They were cappuccino cordials.  Loving anything mocha or cappuccino I had to bite.  I've had cordials before. The Arkansas kind.  Usually there's a sweet liquid center.  I open the bag and pop one in my mouth. I bite down.  I expected crunchy outside, sweet liquid inside. Suddenly my mouth's filled with this hot burning liquid. OM goodness, someone's tampered with the candy cause It burned like fire.... Wait a minute, I've tasted that before as I swallow it down.  I'm looking for something to put the fire out, but only come across my bottle of water. After putting out the fire, I realizes it's alcohol.  Yep, these  innocent malt ball looking things have a pretty powerful shot of whiskey in them.  I read the contents. Sure enough it's 5% alcohol by weight and illegal to sell to anyone under 21 years of age.  I'm really not much of a drinker so I plan on giving the  rest of the bag.....,  No, about half the bag, Um, that's not right. The last 4 pieces to  my mom and sister. No regrets.  lol

title: I knew I shouldn't have bought this.
text: My bad for buying this 3 1/2 pound mix, because it's good.  Not to die for good, but good enough to snack on. If you divide the recipe in half, you can make 2 mug brownies. That's where I went wrong. I've been eating brownies every night. lol. I have added some grated Mexican chocolate and some sour cream to mix it up. It's not helping my dieting, that's for sure.  Just a fair warning  LOL

title: 3 out 0r 4 liked them
text: I tried all 3 flavors and I didn't care for them, They have dried fruit mixed in and I didn't find this appealing. My sister, nephew and Mother all liked them. It's a matter of personal taste. They each had their favorite flavor.  As I see it you have a 75% chance that you will like at least one flavor.

title: Walker's makes flavored shortbread cookies ?!! Who knew?
text: I saw these in Amazon warehouse. They were $12 bucks and I had no idea Walker's make  flavored shortbread cookies. I had to try them.  Was I shocked when a huge box of cookies arrived  200 cookies to be exact.  I needed help. I ate some. gave some to family. gave some for gifts in a basket. They were wonderful and everyone loved them.  The first lemon flavored I tried was overwhelming. I avoided them.. Then I gave them anther try as my cookie stash dwindled.. The next time was  a charm. If you get a strong one, keep eating.  I was used to getting Walker's around Christmas but this was an unexpected treat.

title: Milk chocolate.

We ate them in about 3 days, but the dark chocolate just tastes better. That sharp contrast. The milk chocolate was just to sweet.  Don't get me wrong. You hand me a box of these and I'll eat them. But if given a choice.....

title: AHhhhhhh I love these
text: OK. These are too cute. I love this stuff. My granny and gramps used to eat the old fashioned hot sauce with way to much vinegar to taste good. Well, this ain't your grandma's hot sauce.  It's got a fiery  Mexican  flavor and very mild vinegar taste.  As a matter of fact you may not even notice it.  Sneak this stuff in your purse or pocket and kick the Taco Bell packets to the curb. Yowzah.  Wake your taste buds up.

title: We scarfed these bad boys up.
text: If  like your cookies  light and crunchy, these are the cookies for you. Excellent for a summer time cookie.  With 4 of us trying all the flavors they didn't last long. Don't expect a load of cookies. Just a few. Not like a bag of Oreo's or chips ahoy that set like a rock in your belly. These almost disappear after you eat them. A sweet, satisfying cookie that won't make you feel like you gorged  yourself and blew your diet. I will be getting these again.

title: Not happy, but my sister likes them
text: I should have noticed the fine print. You don't expect to be deceived when buying cookies.  First of all they are advertised as Biscotti.  They are not. They are a hard shortbread type cookie. A biscuit as the package says. Notice the the difference.  They are not sweet. Had there been a little more sweetness they might  have tasted better. They taste like a cross between a cookie and biscuit. They are crumbly and edible, but not really enjoyable. Maybe dipped in a sweet cappuccino will help.  My craving for biscotti continues. Maybe Kroger's can fulfill it. No more surprises. I had to come back to add another star. My sister does like them.  She's not big on sweet things, but likes them dipped in her coffee. To each his own.

title: The flavor was a bit strong for me.

Everything turns liquid in the southern heat. It's not from being left on the porch. I retrieved the items  within a couple of minutes upon delivery. On the up side, instead of the yogurt chips the trail mix is now covered in the chocolate type goodness. Just pop them in the fridge or freezer and they won't be stuck to the package.  I'll be giving the product good reviews, but Amazon gets a thumbs down for being cheap.

Pony up Bezos and provide your delivery people with  airconditioned delivery trucks. It's summertime in the south.  No one likes melted chocolate.

title: No more pain!
text: Having had 3 back surgeries I was always in constant pain but did my best to fight it and remain active. My back problems brought on early onset arthritis.  After a lot of research and experimenting  I determined that regular use of  turmeric worked really well for me. However as I have never been a huge fan of the taste of turmeric so found that I wouldn't take it daily. So I bought a very inexpensive capsule maker and made capsules out of this product. Most days I have VERY little pain and am very active. I believe the quality of the turmeric is very important and this is perfect. If you decide to do this, make sure to drink a lot of water. I made some for my daughter who has bad knees and she has improved tremendously! With the size dose I take  a day sometimes I get leg cramps a common side effect for some that take a lot. I am taking the time to wrote this review as if it could help even one person it is worth the effort. I do not have any medical background so do your own research about your own health

title: Does not degrade in pH when exposed to the air
text: I love this water and I also love that it does not use electrolysis to create alkalinity.  Water that has been essentially shocked with electrolysis starts to lose its alkalinity as soon as it is exposed to the air (when you open the water).  This water has a patented process for creating its water and it remains at a pH 10 even when exposed to air.  I love the give back aspect so that we are helping others when we help ourselves to this water.  I haven’t seen any other water like this.  I saw that one reviewer gave them a 1 because her shipment was broken open and two bottles missing.  This is on Amazon not Generosity Water since Amazon controlled the shipping.  I saw that as a bogus rating against the water company.

text: This is really awesome coffee.  It has really great flavor and is low acid, so is very easy on the stomach!  I was having a major problem tolerating any coffee at all and now can drink two 20 oz. large cups every morning with zero issues.  A huge plus is that it is both organic and chemical free.  I highly recommend this coffee to everyone.  My personal preference is for medium roast coffee, which this is, so if you like dark-roast, you might want to mix it with something darker to taste!

title: Super tart!

title: Excellent flavor!!

title: Smooth, not heavy, nice flavor

title: Delicious & Delicate!

title: Mild delicate maple syrup

title: Really great tea! Mild
text: Really great tea!  Mild, very pleasant flavor.  This is a new favorite tea! This product would be improved if ALL packaging were recyclable!  Individually packaging each teabag in plastic is unnecessary & not socially responsible.

title: My very favorite decaf tea
text:
[[ASIN:B0043TZM02 Choice Organic Teas Decaf English Breakfast Tea, 16-Count Tea Bags (Pack of 6)]]

My very favorite decaf tea! Choice Organic English Breakfast Decafeinated Tea makes a really enjoyable, full-bodied, but never harsh, enjoyable cup of tea. Its tastes just like caffeinated tea! In addition, this is an organic tea, which I value for health reasons. It is a little more expensive than more readily available supermarket tea, but if you want to make a healthy and tasty choice for decaf tea, I can recommend this one! I would add one caveat, I drink tea black, no sugar, so those of you who like to add milk might find this tea not strong enough for you.

title: The most delicious raspberry jam ever!
text: I totally love Sarabeth's Raspberry Key Lime preserves … this is a very appealing taste combination!  Sarabeth's makes a superior preserve in many flavors and I would encourage anyone to give them a try!

title: My Favorite Tea!
text: Davidson's Decaf English Breakfast Tea is my absolute favorite beverage!  I have tried many teas and usually find them wanting.  This brews up smooth, not too acidic, it is full bodied and mellow and is a very pleasant black tea which despite being called "breakfast tea", I drink all day and long into the evening!

title: Great GF Bread Crumbs
text: Couldn't find gluten free bread crumbs at my local store but was able to find several choices on Amazon.  I used the Katz GF Bread Crumbs and would say they seem to be just like regular bread crumbs … no discernable difference.  I was very pleased and have re-ordered them since.

title: Delicious almost peach flavored black tea!
text: I don't normally enjoyed flavored tea, but I make an exception with the Monks Blend Flavored Tea which has a lovely peach, pomegranite flavor and is a really nice tea to sip at night or to relax.  I took some of this over to my son's house and they really love this tea too.  Give it a try, I think you'll enjoy this one!

title: Decadently wonderful Caramel!
text: Walkers makes super creamy, buttery, delicious caramels.  I don't think these can be beat!  They are totally irrestible … beware!

title: Best toffee ever!
text: Walkers toffee is smooth, creamy, buttery and just delicious.  The hazelnuts add a little crunch and flavor.  This is good stuff.

title: Best Toffee Ever!
text: This is toffee for the toffee-lover.  I chopped mine up into bite-sized chunks and then just let it melt in my mouth (you need to let it soften a little before biting into or chewing!)  Walkers Original Toffee is truly delicious, buttery, creamy toffee.  Have also ordered the version with the hazelnuts and they were crispy and tasty and a nice addition to the toffee.  You just can't find toffee like this anywhere else.  I have ordered Walkers Toffee a number of times and each time the quality has been excellent!

title: Great cup of tea!
text: As a confirmed tea drinker, I'm discriminating about the tea I drink.  Had the luck to find a really good tea in Harrogate's Pure Ceylon Tea.  It makes a very satisfying cup of tea and it is well worth trying if you like black or ceylon tea.  Highly recommended as a great way to start the day (or drink all day if that's your style!)

title: Previous purchases were great, but this one not so great.
text: I have bought these caramels several times, they are my favorites.  I purchased these a couple weeks ago and it was time to break into my favorite treat.  I was surprised to find melted caramel inside the container.  When I tried to unwrap the caramel it was extremely soft, the paper stuck to it and I had to scrape if off the paper.  Usually they are firm, hold their shape and come off the paper easily.  It also has no sea salt taste.  I am hoping this is a anomaly and not their usual going forward.  I can't return them as they are a food product, so it's an pricey waste.  The lot number listed on the bottle is 22146 use by 2/22/2023.  I hope someone just didn't cook the caramel enough or something.  I really them but not in this condition.

title: Great Tahini
text: Good, quality Tahini, for the price. Smooth texture, perfect consistency, and great taste!  I would recommend and will purchase again, in the future.

title: Good brand, good purchase
text: This was my first time purchasing cocoa nibs. I did a lot of research, comparison, and reading different reviews. I’m trying to make better choices and I thought this would be a nice addition, to my smoothie bowls. I was very hesitant, at first, though I’m not sure why. The taste is pretty mild, though you can definitely taste the hints of cocoa. The texture is crunchier, but not hard. I tried eating a handful, by itself, which I wouldn’t recommend doing. This brand is a trusted, reasonably priced brand. I would recommend and will purchase again, in the future. I also plan to purchase more products, from this company.

title: My favorite outside of homemade!
text: This granola is so good. It was gone pretty quickly, which is why I do not have a picture, for my review. The texture is what you would expect, from any granola. I love that this product is organic, all natural, and reasonably priced. I prefer to make my own granola, but this is my first choice, outside of homemade. I do wish the company would use something other, than plastic packaging.

title: Not great, but not terrible either.
text: These crackers weren’t horrible, but they weren’t my preferred taste. It’s hard to describe the taste. The texture is the same as any cracker, but does seem a little more fragile. I did like the red flavor of Laiki crackers better. For the price, combined with my dismay of the flavor, I would not purchase again. BUT you may really like these. I think they are healthier, than the average cracker.

title: Boyfriend’s favorite flavor
text: To my dismay, my boyfriend loves Gatorade. It isn’t terrible, but I’m much more health conscious and only drink water. He is picky with flavor, but this flavor is in his top three. This packaging is convenient, but not environmentally friendly, at all. Amazon price is on point, with other big retailers.

title: Delicious cracker, environmentally friendly packaging!
text: These crackers were delicious, but my favorite part is the environmentally friendly packaging! I love that they use only organic ingredients! The crackers were very fresh, reasonably priced, and a good substitute for any other cracker. I would recommend.

title: Yummm!
text: We ate through these so fast, that I didn’t have a chance to take a picture. I purchased these on a lighting deal. Although I try to purchase only organic, I thought I would give these a try. I was surprised by the taste of these nuts. They’re delicious snd addicting! They were very fresh. I would prefer more environmentally friendly packaging.

title: Dangerously delicious!
text:
These caramels are dangerous! I don’t have a picture bc we ate them, both containers, within days of receiving. I know, I know, but they are SO GOOD! They seriously melt in your mouth. They are so soft too! My boyfriend has soft teeth and was able to eat, without any issues.

You can tell these caramels are hand made, with love. You can taste the “kettle” pieces, in the caramels. Normally I would be disappointed, with so much plastic packaging, but I was able to reuse the plastic container. I would be a bigger supporter, if the company used more environmentally friendly packaging and I think it would actually save them money.

title: Pleasantly surprised
text:
These bars are SO good! I was pleasantly surprised and immediately hooked, after my first bite. I’m used to eating RXBars, which have a completely different texture and taste. These bars are more “cake like”. The texture is enticing. The flavor is delicious. They taste like I’m eating a dessert.

In terms of nutritional value, I felt like the amount of calories, sugar, and carbs are acceptable.

I’m a little disappointed, that a forward thinking company, would use so much plastic packaging. There are much better, environmentally friendly options. However, that is my only issue, with this purchase.

title: Fresh, fragrant, easy to use.
text: This is my first time purchasing and using bay leaves. The leaves were packaged whole and are very fresh and fragrant. The leaves smell so good and added a TON of flavor, to my chicken noodle soup. Super easy to use and store. Will be a permanent staple, in my pantry.

title: Pleasantly surprised
text: I actually liked the taste of all of the flavors. You could taste the cited flavor, in every bite. The croutons are good too! Personally, I think the serving size is just ok. The only issue I had was the after texture. I’m not usually swayed by textures, but this was notable. Once chewed, it feels like heavy and “sitting” in your mouth. I can’t explain it. Anyways, it didn’t stop me from eating every bag. I would recommend.

title: Fell short in every category
text: I was excited to try these because of the high protein content, for a snack. However, this product fell short, in every category. It’s insanely expensive, the package and product are both extremely small, and it taste like I would imagine cardboard tasting. You can taste a little hint of “cookie dough”, but it doesn’t really taste like cookie dough, if that makes sense. They tried, very hard. I would’ve given a higher score, despite my disappointment, if the product wasn’t so pricey. The whole package, is a little bigger than my palm. Total disappointment. I don’t recommend purchasing.

title: Great price!
text: I ordered these at a time, where they could’ve come melted or completely whole. I was lucky they were not melted at all. This bag is a great size for entertaining or for a candy dish. I also used them for baking cookies. The value is the best part. Kisses are pricey, at the grocery store. I renamed them and froze them, to avoid melting. They taste just as they always have. Would buy again

title: Good choice for a healthier alternative
text: These chips are a healthy alternative, to the “traditional” tortilla chip. They are also reasonably priced. The chip is light and airy. The texture is crisp and soft. There is a lot of flavor, which I love. They use a lot of the seasoning, but it’s not overbearing. I’m currently testing healthier options, but I would purchase these again.

title: Great product!
text: I love these food colorings. I made an animal cracker cheesecake and the pink color was perfect! One drop was a beautiful pink, but I also had a lot of ganache to cover. Two drops would be much darker. A little goes a long way. There is no flavor, but there isn’t supposed to be. The plastic containers are easy to use and secure. Would purchase again.

title: Healthy, convenient snack
text:
Personally, I was not a big fan of the taste of these bars. You can definitely taste the peanut butter, but the flavor just wasn’t for me. I also purchased the “Peanut Butter and Berries” flavor, but I have yet to try that flavor.

In terms of ingredients, I love that it is organic and healthy! This is the reason I will continue on with RXBars. The texture is thick and chewy. The protein is 12mg, which is great for this size bar, which is also decent size, by the way. I love the convenience, as they are “grab and go” and easy to open.

I will continue to try different flavors, until I find a flavor I really like.

title: Chocolate on every piece
text: I’m not a huge popcorn fan, but I thought I would give this a try, after hearing people rave about their other products. The taste is just ok, but still makes a great snack. I will say that there is a bit of chocolate, on almost every piece, which is a definite plus. Packaging is convenient and stays fresh. The bags are a great size, bigger than the typical “snack size”. If you’re a popcorn fan, this is a product for you.

title: Great brand, great product
text: I’m a big fan of Better Body Foods products. This coconut oil did not disappoint. I didn’t purchase for skincare, but you could use it on your skin. I purchased for cooking. It melts quickly and without any lumps. In terms of flavor, it’s pretty consistent with what coconut oil usually tastes like. The container is easy to use and convenient. Overall, a great product, especially for the price. Will purchase again

title: A good option for a healthy snack
text: For a healthier treat, these are what you are looking for. The taste is a 3.5, out of 5. They are pretty good. Consistency is thicker, like a brownie. They are soft. These are a great grab and go option. Would purchase again.

title: Can be used on anything and everything
text: I love this chili sauce! The taste is delicious, spicy enough, but not overpowering. I use this sauce on anything and everything. It’s also good to use in recipes or as a marinade. This sauce is so versatile. It really can be used on anything.

text: Absolutely awesome. Perfect flavor and texture. There is more pieces in package than it looks like.
