text: This yoga mat by Vera Bradley is very attractive looking. I like the subtle tone on tone color and floral design. The quality of the yoga mat is pretty basic. I think I had higher expectations for the Vera Bradley brand. It had a very strong chemical smell to it which took several days before it dissipated. It doesn't include any kind of strap or tie to keep it rolled up. The thickness is pretty average. It does protect you from the floor but doesn't offer a lot of cushion. There's nothing wrong with it. It really is a fine yoga mat, it's just pretty basic.

title: Good Flavor
text: This coffee has a good chocolate/vanilla flavor. My husband thought it was a little too strong, but I liked it. It's ground and ready to brew. Not too acidic. Nor is it bitter. It smells amazing!

title: Tasty!
text: My family loves Frank's. We were excited to try this new flavor. It's slightly sweet and has a good amount of heat. The consistency is a little thicker than the regular Frank's sauce (original, not a wing sauce). There are 5 large bottles. My husband and son add hot sauce to everything, so we'll probably go through this in no time.

title: Comfortable to Hold Bottles
text: These Gatorade bottles are comfortable to hold. They are square shaped rather than round. These are definitely for times when you are dehydrated or in need of more electrolytes. They have a stronger, saltier taste than regular Gatorade.

title: Fun Snack
text: These Pop Tart bites make a fun snack. They taste good, but the strawberry banana flavor is just okay. I think I prefer the regular strawberry. The combo of the 2 tastes a bit artificial to me. My college kids seem to enjoy them.

title: Very Sweet
text: These Skittles water flavoring packets are very sweet. I found one packet to be too sweet for me and I love sweets! I have learned to use about half a packet per 16 ounces of water. They have a good, fruit punch type flavor. My son thinks they taste exactly like Skittles, whereas I just thought it tasted like fruit punch.

title: These Have Some Heat!
text: My husband and 24 year old son enjoy hot sauces. A lot of hot sauce gift sets are lacking in the heat department. These have some heat! They have enjoyed trying this out and tasting them. There's a good variety of flavors and heat levels. This would make a great gift as it is presented nicely.

title: Tasty
text: These peanut butter oat bars are pretty tasty. They are soft (ish) and easy to bite into. The flavor combinations are yummy! I have found these to be a satisfying snack. One bar will keep my hunger at bay for a good hour or two.

title: A Bit Bland Tasting
text: We ate some Jambalaya for dinner this week. We used one pack which made enough for 3 of us - my husband, my college student son, and myself. We put shrimp and sausage in it. The directions were easy enough to follow. The texture/consistency was fine. I was disappointed by the flavor. It was really bland and boring. I expected more seasoning and flavoring. I ended up adding some of my own Cajun seasoning which helped.

title: Nice Quality
text: My husband prefers dark roasts where I tend to enjoy the light and medium ones. These are a nice quality bean. They aren't too oily. They are very fragrant. my husband has been pleased with their taste. He says it's not bitter and it tastes good.

title: Satisfying
text: We eat a lot of protein bars. This one has been a favorite of my 23 year old son's. They're soft and easy to bite into. You can see the nuts and fruit in it so you know they're there. The almond butter is very tasty. These are satisfying and filling.

title: Nice Flavor
text: We go through a lot of olive oil at my house. We use it for cooking, dipping bread, and salads. My favorite way to dress my salad is with olive oil and balsamic vinegar. We have used this oil several times in the last week or two. It has a nice flavor. It has not disappointed us at all. You can definitely taste the difference between this one and the cheap ones.

title: Yum!
text: This was a fun assortment of gourmet chocolates. Notice I used past tense. I think these lasted for 2 days in my house of 2 adults & 2 college students. Included are truffles and coated almonds. The candy tasted fresh and delicious. My favorites were the coconut ones. This would make a great host gift.

title: Smooth Taste
text: I like flavored coffee when it's not too overwhelming like this one. It has a light coconut scent that isn't too strong. The flavor is there, but it doesn't overtake the coffee flavor. I shared some of these with my friend who is very picky about her coffee and she really liked it, too.

title: Christmas!
text: These are fun Christmas ornaments. They are cardstock, folded star shape ornaments. Inside they are full of chocolates. There are dark, milk, and white chocolate varities. They taste pretty good. I think these would be a cute addition to a gift. They arrived safely without any damage.

title: Lots of Coffee!
text: There are lots of coffee pods! There are 4 different flavors. Since they come in the compostable type pods. They are bundled in small groups of the same flavor and sealed in plastic baggies for freshness. The pods work well in my Keurig machine. I have been pleased with the varieties. They are smooth tasting and not too acidic. I appreciate that they are compostable, but commercial composting isn't available near me. But at least I'm not adding more plastic!

title: Tastes Like Fruitcake
text: My Christmas memories include fruitcake. I don't remember where they came from, but every year we had a fruitcake. I'm guessing it was a gift from someone. This fruitcake tastes very similar to what I remember. It's a very dense cake. It's moist and full of fruit and nuts. I plan to order one for my father this Christmas.

title: Husband Approved
text: My husband is picky about his coffee. He usually gets whole beans and grinds them himself, but we do try to keep ground coffee on hand for convenience.  He likes darker roasts and this met that request. He said it had a slight burnt taste to it, but he said it wasn't bad, just an observation. Overall, he liked it. Husband approved!

title: Yum!
text: While I'm not crazy about the individually wrapped pods, I do appreciate that the pods and wrappers can be composted. Commercial composting isn't available near me, so I can't utilize that feature, but I would like to think that they are still a better alternative to plastic. The pods work well in my Keurig machine. One thing I notice is that these smell amazing after you open the wrapper. Because of the material of the pod, the aroma is released whereas when you have coffee in a plastic pod, the smell is trapped inside. The taste of the coffee is good. I don't like strong tasting coffee, so I prefer medium and light roasts. It has a smooth taste. I don't notice any bitterness. I am very pleased with these coffee pods!

title: Fresh!
text: Many of our favorite recipes call for red pepper flakes, so we go through a lot. I like that this package is more Eco friendly since it's not plastic. We can refill our glass spice jar as needed. The pepper flakes taste fresh and are a good quality.

title: Palatable
text: I like to have protein bars and snacks on hand, especially for busy times or on the go. These have a cake like texture. They are a little on the dry side, but not too dry that they're hard to eat. They are soft, like cake. They are definitely palatable. It doesn't have a strong peach flavor. It's more like a hint of peach. These are pretty easy to eat, especially when compared to some other protein snacks.

title: Small But Flavorful
text: We cook a lot with Balsamic vinegar. This is a small bottle, but we do really like the design of the bottle. We keep our Balsamic vinegar out on the counter all the time, so we appreciate the unique bottle. The vinegar itself is very flavorful. We have been enjoying it a lot.

title: Decent Coffee
text: My husband is pretty picky when it comes to his coffee. He usually prefers dark roasts, but will drink medium roasts from time to time. While this is a medium roast coffee, he says it makes a decent cup. The beans aren't too oily. They have a wonderful aroma.

title: Helps My Energy Level
text: I'm in my early 50's. I'm usually really tired in the afternoon. I've been taking one of these energy shots once a day for the last week in the early afternoon. It is helping with my energy level. On most days, I have noticed that I'm not super tired and wanting to take a nap. I'm not really noticing any difference with my focus or memory. However, without being as tired, I'm sure the focus is better. I'm not crazy about the taste of these. I've found that they're better when chilled. The taste reminds me of cough syrup. I literally drink it like a shot, so I don't have to taste it very long. I will continue to take these for the time being. If I do start noticing a difference with my focus or memory, I probably would continue ordering these.

title: Light & Fruity
text: This is a light and fruity tea. I've been making iced tea with it and it's quite refreshing. The taste isn't too strong. It has a wonderful smell to it. This has been perfect for summer!

title: Decent
text: I've eaten a lot of protein cookies over the last few years. These are pretty decent. They have a good chocolate flavor. They're not too small. I found them to be satisfying. They do have that "protein taste" that some protein bars and snacks have. It's not bad and these don't leave a gross aftertaste in your mouth.  I would order these again.

title: Refreshing Taste
text: This iced tea works well in my Keurig machine. The fruity aroma is noticed almost immediately when the brewing takes place. It has a light, refreshing taste. I'm always trying to drink more green tea for the health benefits. The pleasant taste makes it easier to remember to drink some. It does contain caffeine, so I do need to time my tea breaks so it's not too late in the day. This is definitely an easier way to make iced tea!

title: Smooth Taste!
text: This medium roast coffee has a nice, smooth taste. The beans are not too oily. I personally can't detect the chocolate and citrus notes, but that's me. My husband and I have been drinking this coffee daily for the last week and a half. It's not too acidic. It tastes good. We would buy it again.

title: Great Flavor!
text: I received this on Wednesday. By Thursday, it was empty. Between my husband and my college son, they devoured it.  They did not leave any for me to try! I'm not a big fan of spicy stuff, but I would have given it a try!! I did see them. They are coated very nicely. I was impressed with that. My husband and son really liked the flavor. They're hot, but not too hot. When I checked out these new flavors, I noticed that this one is ranked as the least hot. I've gone ahead and ordered another one as well as the other flavors since they liked them so much.

title: Decent Pasta
text: I've been curious to try non-wheat pasta alternatives. I found this chickpea pasta to be pretty decent. I could tell the difference between this and regular wheat pasta, but there was nothing wrong with it. It was slightly chewier than regular pasta. We ate this with a homemade alfredo sauce and once it was covered in the cheese sauce, it was difficult to notice any difference other than the slightly different texture. I can be a little picky with some foods and I would eat it again.

title: Good Flavor
text: This spice rub has a good flavor. It's a little salty, but not too much. While it is slightly spicy, it's not hot. We've used it by sprinkling it on chicken before grilling. We've enjoyed it!

title: Hot Hot Hot!
text: My son and husband love hot and spicy foods. My husband has a jar of dried ghost peppers that he likes to use on occasion. These corn nut snacks are HOT HOT HOT! They are not the fake spicy hot like Flaming Cheetos or other snacks. These snacks are packing some heat!  My husband can only eat a couple of these at a time. The first time my son ate some, he did it by the hand full. That was a mistake! These taste fresh and crunchy. They're enjoying their new snack!

title: Good Flavor
text: This Biscotti cookies have a good flavor. They are crunchy and too hard to eat as is, but it works nicely to dunk them in your coffee. They arrived in a padded envelope which offered no protection at all. They were all broken and in pieces

title: Nice & Minty
text: I love to have a nice minty taste in my mouth. I keep mints in the car and in my purse. These mints are small but mighty. They are chewable and have a strong (but not too powerful) mint taste. They're packaged in pairs which I'm not crazy about. I would prefer something more eco friendly.

title: Tasty!
text: My husband has been wanting to make cold brew coffee lately, so when I saw these beans that were designed for that, I happily ordered them. The beans are a good quality and not too oily. They smell wonderful! My husband used a nut milk bag to make his first batch but he wasn't satisfied with the results. He's going to try cheese cloth next time. The flavor is smooth and mild. There's no bitterness. He didn't notice any hints of blueberry or chocolate which is good because he prefers non-flavored coffee. Overall, he is pleased with the beans and just needs to work on his cold brewing technique.

title: I'm Set for the Summer!
text: With 6 boxes of k-cups, I am set for the summer! Iced coffee is an afternoon treat for me. Of course, I can't have it too late in the afternoon or I'll have problems sleeping. These k-cups work perfectly in my Keurig machine. I followed the directions. I added some creamer to mine. Most of the ice melted pretty quickly. It made a tasty glass of iced coffee!

title: Nice Flavor
text: These coffee beans smell amazing! It's a pick-me-up just getting a whiff! These beans supposedly have more caffeine than regular beans. My husband and I have not noticed any difference. I'm usually just a one cup a day gal and he usually has no more than 2 cups. Our coffee is always consumed in the mornings. It has a nice flavor. The beans are not too oily. Overall, we're satisfied.

title: High Quality Chocolate
text: These hazelnut chocolate bars are high quality. They taste fresh. The set has full size bars that are generously sized. I had to put them out of sight to prevent myself from eating them all!

title: Bold Taste
text: This coffee has a very bold taste. In fact, it is probably the strongest/boldest tasting K-Cup that I have ever tried. I personally prefer a lighter tasting coffee, but others in my household do like robust tasting ones and have been pleased with these.  The K-Cups works well in my Keurig machine. The taste is fresh.

title: Nice Tart Lemon Flavor
text: These Belgian Boys Lemon Cookie Tarts are yummy! They have a nice tart lemon flavor. The cookies are individually wrapped and a serving is 2 cookies. They have a shortbread or butter cookie base with a thin layer of a firm lemon goo. It reminded me of lemon curd, but firmer. The cookies are fresh and tasty!

title: OMG! Delicious!
text: OMG! These cookies are delicious! The cookies come individually wrapped, which is a good thing or else I would be likely to eat them all in one sitting. The mix of caramel and chocolate tastes so good! They're slightly chewy, but not hard on your teeth. The bottom is a shortbread. Then there's a layer of caramel (that's not gooey) and then there's a layer of milk chocolate. My son has already asked me to buy more of them!

title: Delicious!
text: These Belgian Boys Mini Cookie Stash butter cookies are delicious! The caramel flavor is more pronounced than the butter. They remind me of Biscoff cookies. The cookies come prepackaged which is great for portion control or on the go! The cookies are crisp and crunchy.

title: Great Fruit Taste
text: These fruit gummies have a great fruit taste. We haven't decided if they're candy or fruit snacks. Regardless, they are delicious! The mango and peach flavors are spot on and don't taste artificial. The gummies are soft and easy to chew. The bags are more than a single portion size. My 19 and 23 year old kids like these a lot! In fact, I'm sure they are the reasons that the number of bags left has decreased greatly!

title: Dependable
text: The Happy Belly Columbian ground coffee makes a dependable cup of coffee. My husband prefers whole bean coffee, but we always keep ground coffee on hand for in between times. This has a good flavor and wonderful aroma.

title: Not Enough Marshmallows!
text: I must admit, I am a fan of marshmallow cereals. The Minecraft one doesn't have enough marshmallows in my opinion! The ratio of marshmallow to cereal is off. When I was a kid, I used to eat all of the cereal part first and save the marshmallows for last when eating similar type cereals. The marshmallows are the star of the cereal! The cereal part has a pleasant cinnamon taste. My kids are home from college and they have enjoyed it. There are 10 boxes of the cereal so it should last us through the holidays.

title: Very Chocolatey
text: My 22 year old son is following a Keto diet. I like to have grab and go options for him when he's pressed for time. These cartons fit easily in the door of my refrigerator where he can access them quickly. He actually likes these. I tasted it and I wasn't a fan. It goes down to one's personal taste. It does have a very chocolatey taste. He's had several different Keto shakes and ranked this one as one of the top ones. I found it had too much of an aftertaste from the Stevia. He agreed that there was an aftertaste, but it didn't bother him as much as it did me. He found it to be filling and satisfying. Since he liked them, I will consider ordering these for him again.

title: Big Kid Approved
text: My kids (19 & 22) thought this was a nice treat compared to the usual cereals that I purchase. Though both of them couldn't tell that it was cookies and cream flavored. I agree. It tastes like a sweet Rice Krispies. It has a good and satisfying crunch that reminded me of my childhood.

title: Nice Flavor
text: I was actually surprised with how much I liked these crackers. They have a nice flavor and good crunch. I barely got to have any because my family found them and consumed most of them. I thought it was funny that they are called thin crackers. They're pretty thick in my opinion. They're also dense. They could easily hold some dip.

title: Nice Peach Flavor
text: I am a fan of green tea and was excited to give this loose tea a try. It has a very nice peach flavor that's neither too strong or too weak. It also has a pleasant fruity fragrance. It has a good mild taste with no bitterness. I have been enjoying it.

title: Makes a Great Cup of Coffee!
text: My husband only uses whole beans and grinds them at home. He prefers dark roasted beans. This one makes a great cup of coffee. The taste is smooth and dark. It doesn't taste too acidic. The beans are not too oily and they smell wonderful. These are definitely worth getting again.

title: Good Cup of Coffee
text: These capsules work fine in my Nespresso Essenza machine. The flavor is good and not too bitter or acidic. It makes a good cup of coffee.

title: Fun Treat!
text: Ring pops have always been popular with my teenage daughter. These are just as expected in terms of taste, quality, and appearance. This bag is all one flavor of individually wrapped ring pops. Buying a large bag such as this is definitely a better value. And with only 60 calories per ring pop, it's a low calorie sweet treat!

title: Compostable
text: These coffee pods have a nice, vanilla taste that isn't too strong or artificial tasting. They work well in my original Keurig machine without any problems. I like that they are compostable. My community doesn't have a commercial composting system, but if more products started making their packing compostable, more communities might start offering it.

title: Tasty Snack!
text: The men in my home love beef jerky. These are low carb and have zero grams of sugar which is hard to find in the dried meat world. It has the chewy jerky consistency. It's not hard chewy that makes you worry about pulling your dental work out, but it's not soft either. The flavors are good. My guys especially liked the spicy one which had a good amount of spiciness to it. Overall, they found it to be a tasty snack.

title: Smooth Taste
text: My husband and I are split when it comes to coffee. He's the pickier one. I'm easy to please and use a Keurig. He prefers whole beans and uses a fancy coffee machine. When we opened the bag, we immediately noticed a pleasant coffee smell. The beans aren't too oily, but they are oily enough. The taste of the brewed coffee is smooth. My husband only adds a little homemade simple syrup to his coffee and he has been pleased with this. It's not the best coffee he has had, but it's good.

title: Lovely Scent
text: I like using sugar scrub cubes. They're less messy than tube or jar scrubs. This one comes in a plastic jar. It doesn't look as nice as a glass jar, but it's definitely better for use in my tile shower. I bought some that came in a glass jar and I was always worried about it accidently falling and breaking! No worries here! The size of the cubes is pretty consistent with other brands. It has a lovely scent that is sweet and fruity. I tend to rub the cubes into my hands and then use my hands to apply the scrub to my body. I have found that if I use the actual cube on my body, I end up dropping it several times. These cubes disintegrate  slowly. They also produce a light lather. As the cube is used and it flattens and shrinks, the consistency isn't too waxy. The last brand that I used ended up very waxy and slippery as it got smaller. This one doesn't.  It has a mild grittiness to it, too. Overall, I like these!

title: Easy Tropical Cocktail!
text: My adult son still lives at home while he's finishing college. Now that he's legal drinking age, we have been introducing him to various cocktails. We recently made pina coladas from scratch. Our recipe only made one drink per adult, so when my husband asked for a refill, we decided to try this. Both were tasty. This one was much easier. But it also had a noticeable "artificial" taste when compared to the fresh one. It wasn't bad, it was just something we could detect. If we hadn't made the fresh ones first, it probably wouldn't be noticeable. This was actually sweeter than the fresh one. We did like it and would drink again.

title: Refreshing
text: If you like unsweetened fizzy water beverages, then you should like this one. It has a light peachy taste to it. It's not sweet at all, just like other similar drinks. The drink is pretty comparable to what I've gotten before.  It's also a good adult beverage mixer!

title: Good Flavor
text: My family is a huge fan of buffalo wings. It's on our menu regularly. We like to grill them to make them a little healthier. This sauce has good flavor and has some spiciness to it, without being too hot. It's a low calorie sauce. The list of ingredients is short and they're easy to pronounce! We will definitely be checking out some of the other flavors.

title: Crunchy Snack
text: I personally didn't like these chicken protein crisps, but my husband and 22 year old son did. So I did take that into consideration when assigning my rating. They have a nice crunch to them. I thought they had a strong protein taste, but my guys felt that it was on par with other similar type snacks. The buffalo & blue cheese flavor is good. It definitely a noticeable flavor. My guys found these protein snacks to be filling and satisfying.

title: 12 Cans
text: I'm very picky when it comes to water. I prefer filtered, chilled water. Tap water is okay, sometimes, but it just depends. I don't like the tap water at my dad's house, but the tap water at my house is okay. I have been purchasing less bottled water and trying to use refillable water bottles. There are occasions though, when disposable water containers are needed. So for that, I really like these aluminum cans. The taste of the water is okay, but not great in my opinion. Other family members liked it better. I speculate that it could be due to the added electrolytes. It didn't taste bad, just not what I like. The aluminum can is a tall boy style and there is no way to save it for later by putting a lid on it. And also without a lid, it isn't travel friendly because once it's opened, the water can easily spill.

title: Fun Fun Fun!
text: My 19 year old daughter loves Boba Tea and now with these pearls, she's making her own! These pearls are the good ones. They're the popping ones, not the chewy ones. I've mistakenly ordered the chewy ones and I didn't like them, so I was so pleased to see that these are the ones that pop in your mouth. The flavors are good. They're sweet and fruity. They are just like the ones we've had at the stores. My daughter has been making flavored fruit teas and adding these to them. It's not quite like the Boba Tea she has gotten in the specialty shops, but it's pretty darn close. I wasn't sure what to do with them after they're opened. We have been putting them in the refrigerator.

title: Yum!
text: These stroopwafels are absolutely delicious! They have a wonderful caramel flavor to them. I was worried that they would be messy and gooey, but they aren't. They arrived on a nice, hot day so they were warm when I first tried them. The next time I tried setting them on my coffee cup. The mouth of my mug was a little too large to hold them. My 22 year old son tried it on his coffee, too, but he came to the conclusion that our k-cups don't get hot enough to warm them up. He likes to dunk them in the coffee.  We have one left and I think there's going to be a showdown for it! These come individually wrapped. I am going to order more of these and save them for a special occasion!

title: One Step Latte
text: When I ordered this, I didn't notice that it was a "one step latte" that included creamer and sweetener.  The "on step" is an easy way to get your morning cup. My at home coffee is usually plain coffee with sugar free creamer added to it. This one has 100 calories per cup which although not a lot for fancy coffee drink, it's significantly more than what I usually have. I am liking this k-cup latte. The caramel taste is pretty good. It reminds me of burnt sugar. There is an aftertaste, but it's not off putting. I received 6 boxes of these and there are 10 k-cups in each box. My 19 year old daughter is happy to be taking a couple of boxes with her to college this fall.

title: Not as Fun as Anticipated
text: My daughter was looking for these candies back in the spring after seeing them on TikTok. She was excited to give them a try. Unfortunately, they turned out to be not as much fun as anticipated. They are the consistency of runny jello. They are overly sweet. The grape one tastes like medicine. My daughter is in college now, so maybe her tastes are finally growing up! The candies are a good size and the package does come with a lot.

title: Surprisingly Tasty
text: I was a bit wary of these energy bars because of the peanut butter and cranberry combination. However, I found these to be surprisingly tasty. The bars are not very big and they're thin, but they are packed fruit, nuts and grains. You can see the individual ingredients poking out. The peanut butter taste is very prevalent. The cranberry adds a touch of tart & sweet. The bars are soft and chewy. I would consider these both filling and satisfying.

title: Decent Alternative to Dairy Creamers
text: This is a decent alternative to dairy creamers. It's unsweetened, so I had to add a little sweetness to it with my coffee, but my husband liked it as is. Is has a mild, but good nutty/coconut flavor. My daughter has been having some digestive issues with dairy, so she has been enjoying this a lot. It comes in smaller bottles so it doesn't take up a lot of space in the refrigerator.

title: Things are Getting Spicy!
text: Things are getting spicy at my house, with 6 bottles of hot sauce! My son and husband are frequent hot sauce users. They add it to eggs, chicken, and all kinds of foods. They were both excited to see the contents of this box!  The taste and quality is what they expected from this brand. I have never purchased it before, but they were both very familiar with it from using when dining out. This would be an easy gift for someone who enjoys hot sauce.

title: Good Coconut Flavor
text: These k-cups have a good coconut flavor, noticeable through the last drop. It does have a pleasant coconut smell, too, but it's not as strong as some other ones that I have tried. The k-cups work well with my Keurig machine and I have not had any problems with them not working correctly. I would definitely consider reordering these.

title: Okay
text: The Swiss Miss hot chocolate is not bad, but it's not really that good either. It's not that different than the packets. It does taste how I would expect a hot chocolate made in the Keurig machine to taste, so there are no surprises. It is easy to make. It works well in my machine. I've just become a snob over the years when it comes to hot chocolate  and I make mine from scratch. With that being said, my daughter enjoyed this and will take some of them to her dorm room this fall.

title: Easy to Brew
text: This tea is very easy to brew. I am a bit lazy, so cold brews are always more likely to get done. It has a mild, fruity taste that resembles fruit flavored water more than tea. It's a pretty red/purple color. It's not bitter at all. I drink my tea unsweetened, but it would probably taste delicious with some added sugar or simple syrup.

title: As Expected
text: I grew up in the seventies and my parents bought dry milk a lot. When it's cold, it's not bad. I don't usually get it for drinking, but I do have several recipes that call for it. And during the beginning of the recent pandemic, I thought I would get some for backup, but I couldn't find it anywhere. Everyone else had the same idea. There were a couple of recipes that I couldn't make recently because I didn't have any. This is pretty much as expected. It's comparable to other brands that I have tried. It isn't any harder to blend than others. I am satisfied.

title: Nice Flavor!
text: This Chipotle spice blend has a nice flavor. It's spicier than the traditional taco/Mexican spice packets we usually get. We've used this in place of that, but we've also used it directly on chicken. Yum!

title: Good Flavors!
text: It's grilling season, so I love having some new salts and seasonings to work with. These tins are magnetic which has been handy. We keep them on the side of the refrigerator which happens to be next to the stove. The spices are sealed in a plastic bag inside the tin. The flavors are good and taste fresh. Most of these are new flavor blends/combinations for us. Overall, we're enjoying them.

title: Fun Treat!
text: My 19 year old daughter bought a huge container of similar jelly candy a few months ago. When this arrived, she was excited to try them, too. She liked the addition of coconut, but if you don't like coconut, you might not like them. They taste better chilled, according to her. Overall, they're a fun treat.

title: Quality Coffee Beans
text: My husband prefers whole coffee beans over pre-ground coffee. The beans are wonderfully fragrant and shiny without being oily. They are a good quality. The packaging says that these are a medium intensity which I would agree with. My husband really likes darker coffees, but he says that these are good and he likes them enough that he would order them again.

title: Tasty!
text: I drink a cup of coffee every morning. Usually, I use my Keurig machine, primarily for the convenience. My husband wakes up about an hour after me and brews a pot, but I don't have the patience to wait for him. I have tried brewing my own coffee, but I always seem to have trouble with it. The k-cups are just so much easier. I recently got a sample of Steeped coffee in my Be Kind subscription box. So when I saw it on Amazon, I immediately recognized it. It's really easy to use. It's basically using a tea bag but you're making coffee instead of tea. I followed the directions, which were easy.  I was pleasantly surprised by how much I liked the taste of it! It was stronger and more flavorful than most of my K-cups. I didn't notice any grounds in my cup. I added my creamer and  thoroughly enjoyed my cup. I did notice some black sediment at the bottom of my cup. I do think it's a bit pricey. It comes out to just under $2 a cup. It's cheaper than going to the coffee shop, but more expensive than what I usually do. They would be great for traveling and for that reason, I will consider ordering more.

title: Hot Hot Hot!
text: My husband and 22 year old son like hot peppers. They've talked about trying ghost peppers, so I thought that they should actually go through with it. This plastic jar is a good size and comes with a nice amount of dried ghost peppers. The actual peppers vary in size. The ground up a portion of one pepper. They each ate a "grain of rice" sized piece. They found it to be hot, hot hot! It took lots of milk and water before the effects of it were lessened enough for them. This had to be the hottest pepper they've ever tried. And while it was super hot, they did like it and have been talking about ways to use these in cooking.

title: Creamy
text: This is a huge can of cheese sauce. Canned cheese isn't something I usually purchase, but I was willing to give it a try. There is a tab on the can lid to help with removing the it which I thought was nice. We used about a third of the can when we first opened it. We used it for nachos. It's a smooth, pudding like consistency. We heated it up on the stove and it didn't take long to get it heated all the way through. As far as taste goes, 3 out of 4 of my family members that it was fine. My 18 year old daughter didn't care for it, at least with nachos. She said she'll try it on pasta, but she doesn't like cheddar on nachos. It is very similar to other canned cheese that I have tried and reminded me a lot of cheese sauce used at sporting events. We put the unused cheese sauce in a plastic tub and then put it in the refrigerator. My husband wants to try it with soft pretzels. I do like that it's 100% real cheese.

title: Not Too Acidic
text: This is a tasty coffee that's not too acidic. The flavor is bold. The capsules work well in my Nespresso machine. It's always nice to find good capsules that are compatible with it.

title: No Complaints!
text: I use a lot of broth in my cooking. When my daughter is home (she's vegetarian), I use vegetable broth, otherwise I use chicken broth. This broth is comparable to other brands that I have used. It tasted as I would expect. I have no complaints.

title: Fresh Tasting
text: These pretzel snacks are fresh tasting. They have a good crunch to them. They have a good amount of salt and are neither too salty or not salty enough. These are comparable to brand name pretzels in my opinion.

title: Great Flavor!
text: I love finding new coffee capsules that are compatible with my Nespresso machine. These capsules work fine in it and produce a lovely cup of coffee! These have a great flavor and smooth taste. They aren't too acidic and don't flare up my GERD. I would definitely order these again.

title: Bold Flavor
text: These coffee capsules work well in my Nespresso machine. They have a bold taste, which my husband loves. The taste is smooth, too. We're always on the lookout for capsules that are compatible with our Nespresso machine, so it is good to have some choices! We would definitely order these again.

title: Fresh!
text: These vanilla wafers are pretty much the same as any other boxed vanilla wafers that I've tried. They're pretty basic tasting, but if you usually buy the regular ones or even the store brand ones, you will find these to be very similar. They are fresh and crisp. Mine were mostly intact with little breakage.  These could definitely be used in your banana pudding recipe!

title: Decent Mac & Cheese
text: This is a decent mac & cheese. It's comparable to other store brand versions that I have tasted. Boxed mac & cheese is a staple for my vegetarian 18 year old daughter. She said it was better than okay, but not great. She would eat it if that's all we had, but prefers a different brand.

title: Good!
text: These graham crackers are pretty good. They have a nostalgic quality to them and bring back many memories from my childhood when graham crackers were doled out like cookies. They are comparable to other brands of graham crackers. They are adequately crunchy and fresh tasting. My daughter commented that they "break nicely".

title: Smooth Taste
text: My husband prefers the bolder tasting coffee. He usually brews a whole pot of coffee in the morning but he will often make a cup using the Nespresso in the early afternoon. This has a smooth taste, and bold flavor. He has been very pleased with them so far.

title: Good Tortilla Chips
text: These are good tortilla chips and comparable to other brands in the store. I was afraid it would contain a lot of broken pieces, but surprisingly most of the chips were full size. They aren't too salty. They have a nice crunch to them. They were enjoyable.

title: Good Flavor
text: The men in my household love jerky. They were very excited to see this added to the pantry. It has good flavor. The consistency is a little on the chewy side, but not to the point where you are concerned about your dental work. My guys were especially happy that it contained less than 1 gram of sugar! They're following a Keto diet and a lot of jerky products contain sugar. This is a great snack for them.

title: Decent Keto Granola
text: This is decent Keto Granola. It's heavy on the seed/nuts which is why it's Keto friendly. The taste is good, but if you're looking for a more traditional granola taste, this is not it. It comes in cluster/chunks which makes it nice for eating just out of the bag. There are 2 different varieties and they came in a large gallon sized zip baggie. The nutritional information is on the baggie not the actual products, so I've had to keep the baggie for reference.

title: Tasty!
text: These Brazil nuts are quite tasty. They're firm and have a nice crunch. They taste very fresh and as I would expect them. They are raw without any added salt.

title: Nice Variety
text: This set of k-cups has a nice variety of flavors. Some of the flavors are better than others, but for the most part I am enjoying them all. I have noticed that some of the flavors are a bit artificial tasting, but it's not necessarily a bad thing, it's just an observation. They all have a wonderful aroma, especially the maple one. They work fine in my Keurig machine . I have been having fun picking out my morning coffee!

title: Tastes Great!
text: Arizona Tea is a favorite beverage at my house. These are the peach ones and the taste great! The bottles are square, plastic ones. While the tea is sweetened with sugar and peach juice, they have just 60 calories per serving. However, each bottle has 2.5 servings. Other than that little piece of information, we are happy with them. They're easy to take on the go. The peach flavor is really good.

title: Good Flavor
text: My family has been following a low carb diet lately. Unfortunately, this contains more carbs than I had anticipated. Most of the jerky type products we eat have just a couple of net carbs per serving. At 11 carbs (10 net carbs), a serving of this contains half to a third of our daily carb intake. The second ingredient, right after the Ahi tuna, is sugar. It does taste good and the flavor is tasty. My husband and I thought it did taste a bit fishy and we could easily distinguish it from other types of jerky. The texture and consistency are fine.

title: A Good Sugar Substitute
text: My family has been following a Keto diet for the past six months. My favorite sweeteners have become monkfruit and erythritrol blends such as this. They are easy to use in cooking. While they do contain sugar alcohols, I have found that I have milder reactions (gas, bloating) with the blends than I do with full eryhtritrol products. This  brand is fairly comparable to the Lakanto sweetener that I have used. Sweeteners like this help me to stay on track.

title: Good Sugar Substitute
text: My family has been following a Keto diet for the past several months. If it wasn't for good sugar substitutes like this, it would not have been so easy. Several of my recipes call for this type of sweetener. It dissolves well and doesn't have a foul aftertaste. It does have sugar alcohols in it, so I personally have to avoid too much consumption or else I end up digestive issues. I was a little concerned that this product is from China. However, I did some research and it looks like Stevia and Monkfruit are grown/harvested in several other countries and China is one of them. This product reminds me a lot of Lakanto brand that I've used frequently, which is also made in China.

title: Low Calorie
text: My husband and I drink meal replacement shakes most mornings and even some lunches. This one is low calorie and only has 150 calories per serving. We first tried shaking this in a cup with a lid. This cup did not have one of those shaker balls in it. It did not blend well at all and left lots of clumps. I tried drinking it, but the clumps tasted awful! We poured the rest into a blender and mixed it that way. That was much better and it was pretty smooth. It tasted better without the clumps. The vanilla taste is good, but it I found that it left a gross aftertaste. The shake was satisfying, but it didn't stave off hunger and I was hungry within thirty minutes. My husband always makes a double portion of his shakes. He wasn't hungry for a couple of hours later.  He didn't complain of an aftertaste either. Overall, it was okay.

title: Delicious!
text: My family has been following a Keto/low carb diet for the past several months. This was such a nice treat to have! My 22 year old son especially liked it and has asked me to order more. It's not a traditional granola cereal. It's heavier on the nuts and seeds. It is sweetened with a low carb sweetener. It is very crunchy and tasty. There's no gross aftertaste. The serving size is pretty small and the price is pretty high. I compared it to other Keto granola cereals out there and the price is on par with them. It makes sense because nuts and seeds usually cost more than oats. I'm glad to have found this product!

title: Fresh!
text: This rubbed sage is fresh and fragrant. It tastes as expected. The Happy Belly line has an affordable line of kitchen spices. I have tried several different ones and have been pleased with all of them.

title: Tastes Great!
text: These cookies taste great and as expected. If you've had Chips Away before, you know what to expect regarding taste. I ordered these to include in a care package to my daughter who's away at college. When I was putting together her package, she asked me not to send any food right now because she and her roommate had brought back too much after the holiday break and didn't have any room to store it. I was needing chocolate, so I broke into the package. I was very disappointed to see that nearly half of the cookies were broken. I was very glad that I didn't send them to my daughter!! That didn't effect the taste, thankfully. This would be perfect if we owned a FroYo shop and had broken cookies in the topping bar.

title: Delicious!
text: This was a fun gift set! It's full of 12 delicious biscotti biscuits. There were so many different flavors and choices, it was hard to pick out which ones to eat! There was some breakage among the biscuits leaving lots of crumbs and small pieces. However, that didn't interfere with the taste of them at all! The flavor and taste of these is excellent!!

title: Delicious!
text: It's been several years since I've had a Toblerone bar. It brought back a lot of memories when in the early 1990's and I was on a tour of Europe with my grandfather. That was the first time I had ever had one. They were hard to find in back in the United State, unlike now where many stores carry them. This is a set of 6 bars. Three of them are the original milk chocolate and the other 3 are different varieties -white chocolate, dark chocolate, and crunchy almond. The quality is good and what I would expect from the brand.

title: Outstanding Olive Oil!
text: This is outstanding olive oil. It is ready for gifting. This has two bottles of different olive oil. One is an extra virgin one and the other is a blend. We go through a lot of olive oil and this is just as good or better than ones we've purchased at the local store. I also really like their statement and company.

title: Great Portion Size!
text: These snacks are great for keeping in your bag or grabbing on your way out the door. The portion size is great! They're a mix of nuts and dried cranberries. I found that they had more walnuts than I like, but that's just a personal opinion. My family loves walnuts. I would probably like it better if there was a little more salt. The cranberries had a nice amount of sweetness. My family is following a low carb diet and these have 10 net carbs per serving. That's not too bad considering they have the dried fruit. Overall, my family has been enjoying these.

title: Minty Fresh!
text: This variety of gum is minty fresh! There are 6 different mint flavors, with 2 packs of each flavor. The mint flavor lasts a long enough time, and is comparable to other mint gums. It's not too sticky that I fear for my dental work when chewing it.

title: Tasty!
text: My son and husband are following a low carb (Keto) diet. They've been eating a lot of jerky and dried meats. This is a tasty alternative to the traditional options that are available at the store. It's fairly soft and easy to chew whereas jerky products are chewy and tough. There's a good amount of black pepper added to it. A single packet is actually pretty comparable to a single bag of jerky. It didn't last long because they ate it all in just one sitting. I would order it again.

title: Easy Way to Drink Green Tea
text: I enjoy a nice cup of green tea in the afternoon. This is an easy way to make your green tea fix. The cups work well with my Keurig machine. The taste is as expected. I would consider ordering again.

title: Tasty!
text: My family has been following a low carb diet. We often snack on pecans, almonds, and walnuts. These almonds are very fresh and tasty. We used some of these for spiced nuts with monkfruit and they were amazing!! I would definitely considering ordering these again.

title: Great Taste!
text: My family of 4 (2 parents and 2 college students) all drink coffee, so we go through a lot. While the kids and I aren't that picky about our coffee, my husband is very selective about the coffee he drinks. He prefers whole bean and likes to grind it himself. This pound comes in 2 smaller 8 oz packages. This allows it keep fresh until you're ready to use all of it. The beans smell wonderful! The taste of the coffee is somewhere between a medium and dark roast. It makes a great tasting cup of coffee!

title: Love That These are Biodegradable!
text: I've been using pod style coffee for years. These work well in my Keurig machine. I love that they are biodegradable! The flavor of the coffee is good, but it doesn't seem that different from other similar flavored coffee pods. The cinnamon scent is very noticeable. I would order these (or a different flavor) again.

title: Good Taste
text: Coffee is part of my morning ritual. I enjoy a cup while checking emails and social media in the morning. I never mastered the traditional coffee maker, so I use a Keurig machine. These k-cups work well in my machine. The varieties are not flavored. They produce a good, dark and rich beverage. It looks like coffee and not tea like some k-cups do. The taste is as expected -nothing special, but definitely reliable.

title: Holiday Treat
text: Peppermint bark is one of my favorite holiday treats. This is a good sized plastic jar filled with peppermint bark. The chocolate is dark and has a good flavor. I found that the chocolate over powered the peppermint some. There were some larger pieces and some smaller ones. There were also a lot of crumbs, possibly due to shipping. My family did enjoy it!

title: Not Bitter
text: We go through a lot of coffee at our house. My college kids and I prefer milder blends where my husband likes strong dark ones. This is definitely a milder one. It makes a decent cup of coffee. It isn't bitter nor does it have a strong acidic taste. The can is a good size and should last a while. It smells great! My husband will drink this if he doesn't have anything else.

title: Good Bold Taste
text: This coffee has a good, bold taste to it. My husband is picky about coffee. I can't buy the cheap stuff for him. He actually likes this one. The brewed coffee is nice and dark. It doesn't look like tea as many do. He told me I can order more of this!

title: Good Chocolate Taste
text: My family is following a Keto diet. One of my favorite treats is to make a mousse type dessert with whipping cream, Stevia, and cacao powder. This cacao powder is perfect for that! I'm not sure if it's because it's in raw form or what, but this cacao powder has less than 1 net carb. Other cocao powders that I have used have between 2 and 4 net carbs. When you're tracking your net carbs and are limited to how many you can have during a day, every one counts! It has a good chocolate taste, too. I would order this again!

title: Filling Snack!
text: These bars are not traditional jerky bars. They are a softer product. It's more like compressed meat. It's a filling snack and great for those following a low carb diet. I don't like extra flavoring, so I'm very pleased with just sea salt and pepper.

title: Easy to Chew
text: This is a great snack, especially for those on a low carb diet. My husband and son think this is a great alternative to traditional jerky. It's softer and easier to chew, which is a big plus for me. I have so many dental crowns, etc., that I don't like chewing really hard foods such as jerky. The garlic flavor is tasty. The pieces of meat vary in size with lots of little bits in the bottom of the bag.

title: Nice Flavor
text: This dried beef has a nice flavor. It's not as firm as jerky and easier to chew. My son and husband and have been enjoying this as a good snack and since there's no sugar, it's Keto friendly! The product is a bit crumbly and has lots of little pieces. It's still tasty though.

title: Perfect for Keto Diet!
text: My husband, adult son, and I are all following a Keto diet. It can be difficult finding low carb food items because of hidden sugar. These have no sugar and less than 1 net carb per serving. They are much softer than jerky which makes them easier to eat. They're in smaller pieces, and even some crumbs. I found them to be a little too acidic, but my son and husband like it. It's great to have these on hand for snacking!

title: No Artificial Smell
text: Coffee is an important part of my day.  It's not just the caffeine, it's a morning ritual. I sip my cup while checking emails, social media and the latest news every morning. This coffee has a good, natural taste to it. Some coffees have a powdery scent to them, usually ones that are flavored, but some nonflavored ones as well. This one has a great, "just coffee" scent. Nothing artificial in the smell. The cups work well in my Keurig. I haven't had any problems with any of them not working properly. I would definitely consider ordering these again.

title: Mild Flavors
text: I like having choices when I am choosing my coffee for the morning. This set has 4 different varieties - one flavored and the others not. The flavored one has a mild flavor and not too artificial. I'm not a fan of flavored ones that have a strong fake taste to it, but this one is fine. The brewed coffee is fairly dark and not too weak or watery. There are 96 pods so this should last a while!

title: Nice Variety!
text: This is  a nice variety of flavored K-cup coffees. They aren't over powering flavors. I have found the flavor to be pretty subtle. There are 4 different Girl Scout cookie flavors in this assortment. They do have a pleasant smell, too, which isn't very strong. They work in my Keurig well.

title: Good Taste!
text: I have been pleased with these Kona K-Cups. The color of the brew is dark. The acidity seems mild - I have acid reflux and haven't had any issues with it when drinking this. The aroma is as expected. I drink my coffee with some sugar free creamer and it's been fine.

title: Nice Variety!
text: This is a nice variety of lollipops. They are all recognizable and familiar brands. They arrived fresh. The majority of them were in tact with only a couple that were broken. And the ones that were broken, were still usable and still mostly on their sticks.

title: Easy to Make!
text: I never masted gravy making. My mother could make homemade gravy without even thinking. I did try once, but it was a big fail! We don't eat a lot of gravy, but when we do, we make it from a mix. This is pretty easy to make. It tastes like other gravy mixes. It's a decent substitute for the real thing. The bags they come in are pretty large and probably more suited for a professional kitchen rather than a family of four.

title: Good Flavor!
text: These croutons have a very good flavor. They're crisp and crunchy, without being too hard. They're a great addition to any tossed salad!

title: Good for On the Go
text: I have been a fan of Premier Protein for a few years. I like the new containers. The shape of these is easier to hold and pour from than the older box style. These are pretty palatable as far as pre-made meal replacement shakes. They are smooth and easy to drink. They definitely taste better when chilled. They are satisfying and filling. They don't leave a yucky aftertaste either. I will definitely order these again.

title: Nice Variety!
text: This is a nice variety of Starbucks capsules for the Nespresso machine. There's something for everyone! My husband prefers the darker blends whereas I like the milder ones. They work fine in our Nespresso Essenza Mini. I have found that 2 capsules, on the Lungo setting make a nice small coffee for me. The quality of the coffee is what I would expect from Starbucks. We have been happy with every flavor/variety that we have tried.

title: Good Taste!
text: My husband enjoys espresso. I think part of it is the ritual of making it on the stove top in his espresso pot. This espresso coffee has a good, traditional taste and meets his approval. He's also used it in the regular coffee machine and it worked for that, too, though he preferred it as an espresso. He is picky about his coffee, and likes strong tasting coffee so that tells me that it's got a strong flavor.

title: Nice List of Ingredients
text: These crackers have a nice list of ingredients. However, the taste of these just didn't cut it. The original ones were the least enjoyable. They tasted like what I would expect cardboard to taste like. I think a little salt would have been an improvement. The garlic and herb ones were the best tasting. The flavor of those was pretty good. The everything one was okay and definitely better than the original ones. They all left an aftertaste and had an almost burnt taste to them. Most of them arrived broken and in pieces. They were crisp and crunchy. I probably wouldn't buy them again.

title: Smells Great!
text: This ground coffee smells great! It makes a decent cup of coffee, probably an average score on the scale of coffee taste. It's definitely not the worst out there. My husband has been brewing this daily for the past week or so. It's not very strong (which is a plus for me) and when I put my creamer in it, it really doesn't taste any different than other coffees. My husband, though, finds this to be a bit on the weak side and prefers a stronger taste.

title: Tasty Assortment
text: We have a small Nespresso machine. Because it's small, we recently took it on vacation with us to use in our condo. I brought this nice assortment of capsules. They are labeled well so you know the intensity level. I like lower intensity levels while my husband prefers higher ones. We made lungo size coffee drinks every morning and thoroughly enjoyed them. My sister and her husband were in the condo next to ours and started coming over every morning for their morning cup, too. The capsules worked perfectly in our machine and delivered excellent results. We are very pleased with this assortment.

title: Smells Nice
text: These coffee beans smell very nice! The first pot we made with these beans was a lot lighter than we expected. It looked like tea. It tasted alright though. It wasn't very strong. The second time, my husband added a lot more coffee and it turned out better. It still wasn't as black looking as a lot of other coffees are when brewed. Overall, it's okay. My husband and I prefer a darker, stronger coffee.

title: Nice Crunch
text: These Quinoa curls have a nice, satisfying crunch. They taste a little plain to me, but they're not bad. If given the choice between these and real non-healthy potato chips, I would probably go with the potato chips, but as a healthy alternative, they're okay. My husband has been dipping these in hummus and he has enjoyed that.

title: Filling!
text: My family has been trying to eat healthier lately. My 21 year old son likes to grab a protein shake to help him stay on track. As far as protein shakes go, this one is comparable to other protein shakes. It has a good chocolate flavor. We don't really notice the marshmallow taste. It does leave a slight aftertaste, but that's not unexpected. It's easy to drink (especially when chilled). It's satisfying and filling.

title: As Described
text: I received one package of Grandma's Choice Assorted Food Coloring. It is as described and comparable to the food coloring sets sold at the grocery store. I use this type of food coloring to dye eggs at Easter time, to add color to home made bath products (soap and bath bombs) or for baking. I prefer gel color for frosting, but I have used this type when I didn't have gel coloring handy.

title: Nice Variety!
text: This is a nice variety of K-cups. There's something for everyone. I'm not usually a fan of flavored coffees, but the Calypso Coconut one is amazing! It has a wonderful aroma and you can taste the coconut notes. The other varieties (light, medium, and dark roasts) are fine and taste as expected. I would not think of Margaritaville as a coffee brand, but I am glad to have discovered it. There are 72 k-cups and they work well in my standard (not 2.0) machine.

title: More Than Enough to Share!
text: These salad toppers are yummy! They come individually portioned in a generous size. I think there is more than enough to share and have been splitting the bags with my husband. They are fresh and add some crunch and flavor to your salads. I would definitely consider reordering these!

title: As Expected
text: This canola oil is as expected. It is comparable to the store brands that I usually use. It's great for cooking and baking. I would order this again.

title: Good Flavor
text: These Nespresso compatible pods have a good flavor. They're somewhere in between a light and dark roast. They work fine in my Nespresso Coffee machine. It takes 2 pods to make my morning cup. I am always happy to find alternatives to the brand name pods!

title: Tasty Cup of Coffee!
text: Coffee is an important part of the morning at my house. I usually go for the quick pod type coffee, but my husband brews a pot or two each morning, and insists on grinding coffee beans. These beans have a great aroma right out of the bag. They're not too oily or dry. The taste is pretty good. My husband really likes it. I found it to be a little stronger than I prefer, but with some creamer and sugar, I couldn't tell any difference.

title: Pleasant Taste
text: This lemon-ginger tea has a very pleasant taste. It's not bitter or tart. I can easily drink this on its own without adding anything to sweeten it. I like that probiotics have been added to it. I can't really notice a difference since I've started drinking them. There are 6 boxes of tea, with 18 bags in each one. Since they're caffeine free, I've been making these a part of my afternoon decompression time when I get home from work.

title: Such Fun!
text: My daughter and her bestie had such fun using this Easter themed cupcake set. The girls decorated 4 dozen cupcakes for our Easter party. It comes with paper liners, assorted sprinkles, bunny ear picks, carrot picks, grass, and a cute spatula. We have enough left over decorations that we can make more next year!

title: My Favorite Sugar Alternative!
text: About 50% of the time, I'm trying to eat healthy. The other 50%, I'm not. But when I am trying to be healthy, this is my "go-to" sugar alternative. It tastes great without any aftertaste. It dissolves well, so it doesn't make your food/beverages taste grainy. Sometimes, even when I'm not being healthy, I will go ahead and use it.

title: Tastes Good
text: I'm more of a milk chocolate fan, but when I'm trying to eat healthy, I do try to replace my milk chocolate with dark chocolate. This dark chocolate tastes good. It's not overly sweet, but it does satisfy my sweet tooth. The salted almonds are a nice addition. It does not leave any bad aftertaste nor did it cause any digestive issues, as some sugar substitutes do. My husband really liked this a lot!

title: Really Sweet!
text: When I am eating healthy (which I need to start doing again), I use Stevia sweeteners instead of sugar. I usually can't tell the difference between Stevia and sugar in my coffee and smoothies. However, this sweetener is really sweet and noticeably different. I have a horrible sweet tooth. So the first time I added this to my morning coffee, I squeezed what I thought was a reasonable amount of it into my beverage. I practically gagged because it was so sweet! I have since then been much more careful about dispensing it. A little goes a long way! I've even just put a drop on my finger and tasted it and it was really sweet. I like the addition of vanilla, though I would like to try the original plain one. The small size is convenient. I love that it's plant based and zero calories!

title: Good for Low Carb/Sugar Free Diets
text: While these are good for low carb and sugar free diets, they definitely do have that diet taste. That's not bad, it's just an observation.  For a sugar free drink mixer, these are pretty good. You're not going to mistake them for the real thing. They do leave a slight aftertaste. They are easy to use and very convenient. If you are following a sugar free or low carb diet, it's good to have options such as these available to you.

title: Tastes Good
text: I'm not crazy about dark chocolate, but when I am trying to lose weight, dark chocolate can be satisfying. I also have better self control around dark chocolate. This tastes pretty good for dark chocolate. It's slightly bitter, but no more bitter than other dark chocolates. I can't tell a difference between the Stevia or sugar in other dark chocolate bars. There are lots of almond pieces in these. My 21 year old son really liked this bar. It didn't leave any bad aftertaste nor did I have any stomach issues after eating this. I  would consider ordering it again.

title: Huge Bottle!
text: This is a huge bottle of BBQ sauce! It requires refrigeration after opening, but it wouldn't fit in my refrigerator! I had to rearrange the shelving to get it to fit inside. For reference, it's a little taller than a gallon milk jug. This is a tangy, vinegar based BBQ sauce. It's a bit runny, but the consistency is on par with other similar BBQ sauce flavors. It tastes good, but I personally prefer the sweeter BBQ sauces, so I may give the Sticky Sweet variety a try.

title: As Expected
text: These mints arrived and are as expected. The wint-o-green scent can be detected immediately. The bags are full of individually wrapped mints. This came with 2 huge bags of mints. They taste fresh. These are great to have out at parties!

title: Great Bold Taste!
text: These Lipton tea bags are just as expected. The quality is exactly what I buy at the grocery. There are 5 boxes with 80 tea bags in each box. I really like the bold taste that these offer. I use them to make iced tea.

title: Excellent Taste!
text: My husband is a fan of meat sticks, jerky, and such. He says these are some of the best ones. They have a good consistency and they're not greasy like some meat sticks. He feels that he's getting a better quality meat stick product than others. He loves the flavor. The jalapeno flavor is spicy, but not too hot. He does have a higher tolerance for spiciness. Even our cat is a fan of them. When she hears him opening one, she runs to him and starts begging. He gives her a tiny piece and that seems to satisfy her.

title: Fun Snack!
text: These Cheeze-Its Snap'd crackers are a fun snack. They're orange like traditional Cheeze-Its, but they taste like sour cream and onion. They're lighter and crispier tasting, too. They tasted fresh. The flavor is good, too.

title: Spicy But Not Hot
text: My family loves dipping sauces. It's fun having a variety of flavors to choose from. We found this hot white sauce to have a nice, unique flavor. It's spicy, but not really that hot. It's not very thick, and a bit runny, but it adds a good flavor to our meals.

title: Tasty
text: First of all, I only received a box of 3, not 12. However, I am not basing my review on that. This microwave popcorn tastes good, though a bit plain because of the lightly salted. My 17 year old daughter who eats microwave popcorn several times a week has enjoyed them. The popcorn setting on the microwave was adequate. It's not oily or greasy.

title: Tastes As Expected
text: This nutmeg tastes and smells as expected. It is comparable to other spices priced similarly at my local store. I would reorder.

title: Fun Snack!
text: These raisins look like regular raisins, just a little different in color. They are more of a reddish purple color. They surprisingly smell like watermelon. They have a sour taste which appeals to my teenage daughter. I found them to be too sour, but I am not a fan of sour candies. I think this raisin makeover is a great way to get kids to eat this fun and healthy snack.

title: Can't Tell the Difference
text: I can't tell the difference between this variety and the regular Equal sweetener. It tastes the same to me. But I am a believer in zinc & vitamin C as ways to reduce the severity of colds, so I am happy with that addition.

title: Tastes As Expected
text: We go through a lot of chili powder. I find that I have to add it to my shopping list several times a year. This tastes comparable to other chili powders that we use.  It adds some heat and flavor to our dishes. I would order this again.

title: No Bitterness
text: These Fair Trade, organic coffee beans smell amazing. They are quite oily, but it doesn't seem to have a negative impact on them or the finished product. They make a fairly smooth cup of coffee. There is no bitterness or pungent notes. I would consider ordering them again.

title: Good Flavor
text: We go through a lot of cinnamon in our house. We use it in French Toast, Cincinnati Chili, and assorted desserts. This bottle of cinnamon is comparable to others that we have used. It has a good flavor. I would repurchase this.

title: Good Low Calorie Sweetener
text: This is a good, low calorie sweetener. I can't tell any difference between this and the original Equal. It dissolves well in my morning coffee and provides the sweetness that I desire without the calories.

title: Good Taste
text: My husband enjoys adding peanut butter powder to his chocolate protein smoothies. This is pretty comparable to other brands he's tried, though this one does have the chocolate flavor. The chocolate doesn't cover the peanut butter flavor, but it does enhance it nicely. It mixes well into the smoothie and is not gritty. It also doesn't leave any aftertaste.

title: Good Strong Espresso!
text: My sister got me started on my afternoon espresso habit. I was happy to try a new brand of capsules for my Nespresso machine. These work well in the machine. It's not always easy to find compatible capsules, so I am happy about that. The flavor is strong, but good. I didn't find it to be too bitter at all. It's just what I need in the afternoon and it gives me enough energy to finish the day.

title: Nice Flavor!
text: I am fairly new to the Keurig K-Cup scene, as I just bought my Keurig machine a few months ago. I've tried several different flavored K-cups and haven't been that impressed with them. They tend to have a strong artificial taste to them. These cups have a nice, subtle flavor, but I can still detect the mint chocolate. It does not have the strong artificial taste I've experienced with some other K-Cup brands. I also tried the Vienna Mocha Chunk. Although I prefer this Mint Chocolate Chip, the Vienna Mocha Chunk is also good. Neither of them taste ice creamy, but they are good and I would definitely consider ordering them again.

title: As Expected
text: This vinegar is as expected and is comparable to vinegar that I have bought at my local store. It comes in a plastic bottle. I am satisfied with it.

title: Delicious Treat!
text: These graham crackers are individually wrapped which make them perfect for on the go. I’ve been putting one in my lunch each day. They are a good quality dark chocolate covered graham cracker. It has the right amount of chocolate coating. They taste fresh! They aren’t too sweet and I personally found one at any one sitting was satisfying. I would definitely consider ordering these again.

title: Good Peanut Taste
text: This crunchy peanut butter has a good peanut taste. It is comparable to store brand peanut butters that we have tried. My family loves peanut butter and this one has been enjoyed by all. We did not do a side by side comparison to the more expensive name brands, but we were able to compare it to our store brand and there was really no difference. I would purchase this again.

title: Great Flavor!
text: A lot of my regular recipes that I use require chili powder, so we go through a lot of it at our house. McCormick's brand is one of my preferred brands. This is a "dark" chili powder. I honestly don't know the difference between the dark powder and the regular chili powder. They taste pretty much the same to me. This has a great flavor and tastes as expected. The size of the bottle is at least double the size of what I normally purchase and fits on my spice shelf without any difficulties. I would order this again.

title: Great Flavor!
text: My husband likes spicy food, so several of our usual recipes require Cayenne pepper.  The McCormick brand is one of our go-to brands that we use regularly. This is a larger bottle than we usually get. A smaller bottle will last us about 2 months, so I anticipate this larger bottle to last a month or two longer for us. This has a good flavor and tastes just like we would expect.

title: Palatable
text: Over the past couple of years, my family and I have tried a lot of different protein bars. These are pretty palatable as far as protein bars go. You're not going to think you're eating a candy bar, but it actually tastes equal to or better than some of the other plant based protein bars I've tried. Prior to opening the wrapper, I was worried that it was going to be hard on my teeth to chew, but they're not. They're very firm feeling, but soft with a slight chewiness. There are actual (and identifiable) pieces of peanuts inside. They don't have a strong protein taste either, which is good in my opinion. There also isn't any bad aftertaste. I've had to practically force myself to finish some protein bars in the past, but I didn't with this one. They are satisfying and leave me full for at least a couple of hours. I would consider ordering these again.

title: Light & Refreshing
text: This is a light and refreshing low calorie carbonated drink. It has a good, berry flavor. Stevia is my preferred sweetener, but it's hardly noticeable at all in this beverage. My family & I think this tastes similar to plain, flavored carbonated water or even flavored seltzer water. It does leave a slight aftertaste. Overall, it's okay. We do like that it's organic.

title: Nice Kit!
text: This is a cupcake kit, without the cake mix. It includes 2 tubs of frosting, 2 jars of sprinkles, and cupcake liners. The frosting actually tasted pretty good, especially when compared to other tubs. I had to stir it a bit to soften it up for spreading. It is convenient to use.

title: Yum!
text: This has to be some of the best beef jerky ever! It's surprisingly tender and not tough. I didn't worry about any of my dental work coming out!! The flavor is subtle, and doesn't detract from the beef, but it is noticeable. The packages are a good single serving size. This has been a big hit with my son and husband, too.

title: Tasty But Not Very Strong
text: These cinnamon mints are tasty, but not very strong. They're small and dissolve slowly. The cinnamon flavor is good, I just wish there was more of it. They don't leave any aftertaste, but they also don't leave much cinnamon taste behind either. I would consider ordering them again because I do like them.

title: Crunchy!
text: My husband has been enjoying these as a snack during the last couple of weeks. These are crunchier than the company's pork rinds, but tasty nonetheless. The chili lime flavor is subtle and not very strong. My husband has to eat these in moderation or it's hard on his digestive track. He has that issue with similar products, too. Overall, he's happy with these.

title: Tasty!
text: My husband enjoys snacking on pork rinds. These come in smaller bags than he usually gets, but that's good because it stays fresher and you don't worry about them going stale quickly. They are just the right amount of crispy and do melt in your mouth. They aren't hard or dry. The flavor is mild and not really noticeable unless you're looking for it. They are a bit salty, but it's not bad. They were fresh and tasty.

title: Great Variety!
text: My teenage daughter is a fan of Push Pops. These are exactly as expected in quality, taste, and operation. The variety is a nice mix of flavors. We got 4 Mystery Sour ones, 3 Watermelon, 3 Blue Raspberry, 4 Strawberry, and 4 Berry Blast.

title: These Aren't Too Bad
text: I have tried lots of protein bars over the past few years in my attempts at healthier living. I usually eat them as a meal replacement, but sometimes as a snack. When I compare these to others that I have eaten, they're not too bad. I would say they are in the middle on my imaginary protein bar scale. The strawberry flavor is okay. They don't have a strong protein taste. They are palatable and they don't taste like cardboard. You won't mistake them for a treat either, they're definitely a protein bar. They easy to chew and bite.  They are more of a snack than a meal in terms of how long they satisfy hunger. Overall, they're okay. I would buy them again to have on hand because they are reasonably priced.

title: Good Flavor
text: My husband loves jerky. This one has good flavor with a lot more spiciness than expected for an "original" flavor. The package had a lot of small pieces, almost crumbly. I only received one package instead of the 8, so I'm not sure if they are all that way or not. They are a bit tough and chewy. I have a lot of dental work (crowns and a bridge), so my husband actually told me that I probably shouldn't try it. Overall, he liked it.

title: Tastes Good
text: My husband likes bars like this. He said the flavor was good. A spice but not spicy. It was softer than jerky and not too chewy or hard. It wasn't his favorite, but it was decent. I was only sent 1 package, not the full 12.

title: Softer Than Other Brands
text: My son and husband follow a high protein/low carb diet. They have been enjoying these grab and go snacks. This comes with 12 packages, but there are 5 individually wrapped sticks in each package, so you really get a lot! The sticks are softer than other meat sticks and easy to chew. The flavor is good. My husband did find a small piece of bone in one of his sticks. Although that's not desired, he says it's not uncommon in the world of meat sticks. He's eaten several of these and hasn't had any issues with the others. Overall, they like them.

title: Delicious!
text: Boy does this bring back memories! I'm a child of the 70's and before there were fruit snacks or fruit roll ups, we had fruit leather. It was considered health food. This reminds me a lot of that. There's no added sugar, but it's got the natural fruit sweetness. It's soft and easy to chew. It's not sticky. It's just tasty fruit goodness! I can't really single out any particular fruit, but since it's a blend, that's expected.  They don't take up a lot of space, so you can easily slip one (or two) into you bag for a snack later on. There's 30 fruit strips in the box.

title: Good Coffee Taste
text:
I originally reviewed the Energy Boost Coffee, but a few months later I ordered the variety pack. I didn't realize that they shared a listing, so I am unable to leave another review. I've updated my review to include the other flavors.
Original review: This medium coffee has a good taste. It's not bitter or too strong. It has a wonderful aroma! I find that some K-Cup coffees don't really smell like anything, but this has a good coffee smell to it. I personally can't drink my coffee black, so I have been adding flavored creamer to mine. The taste is definitely stronger than some K-Cups, but it's not too strong. I like the idea of the added superfoods and probiotics. Those don't effect the taste of the coffee, but I also haven't noticed any of the benefits of them either. I also haven't noticed any increase in energy - at least nothing more than what I would get from coffee in general. I do like this and I appreciate that it is Fair Trade. *New to include variety pack: The variety pack comes with 6 boxes of hot beverage K-Cups. Half are coffee and half are tea. I am more of a coffee drinker, so I will start with that. Overall, the coffee is pretty tasty. Some of the flavors have a cinnamon smell/taste to them. I'm fairly neutral when it comes to cinnamon, so I can take it or leave it. I haven't really noticed any of the claimed benefits. As far as the teas go, I really disliked the Beauty one, but the others are good. I don't add anything to my tea (sugar or milk), so I found that the taste of the Beauty one was too strong and bitter.

title: Tasty!
text: I don't really consider this a substitute for mayo, because it's definitely different. It doesn't taste like it. The consistency is a little different. However, it is tasty and more of an alternative for regular mayo. The combination of chipotle and lime is yummy! It is the perfect sauce for my fish tacos! I love that it's made from avocado oil! It's not a low fat or low calorie food, but it is made from a healthier fat which is good. This is something I would expect to find at the high end, "health" grocery stores.

title: Great Flavor!
