text: I personally am not a fan of beef (or other meat) jerky, but my son and husband love it. I did have a taste of this and I was pleasantly surprised by the flavor. I think one of the issues that I have with jerky in general is that texture and consistency. I find it hard on my teeth. This one was actually easy to chew and I didn't feel any concern that I was going to lose a crown! The flavor is a nice balance of sweet and smokey. The price is reasonable and comparable to what I usually spend on jerky for my guys. Between my husband and son, all of the packages were gone within a few days. While I don't think I will start eating jerky, I will definitely consider this brand and flavor when purchasing jerky for my family.

title: Pleasant Coconut Smell
text: I haven't totally embraced all the uses for coconut oil, but I have picked up a few of them. My husband likes putting it in his coffee. I've tried it to remove my eye makeup when I was out of eye make up remover. (It was okay - left a little more greasiness behind than I like, but it did the job.) I often use it as a lip balm and it offers temporary relief to dry lips. I've used it for cooking a few times successfully. I would say that this is pretty comparable to other coconut oils that I have tried. Because it's cooler out now, it arrived in its solid form. It has a pleasant (not over whelming) coconut smell. It doesn't really taste like coconut, so you can use it in cooking items and not worry about changing the taste. I personally love the taste of coconut, but I will agree that some things just don't need to taste like it. The jar is a decent size and it should last a while.

title: Strong Smooth Taste
text: This cold brew coffee has a smooth, but strong taste. It was a little too strong for me, so I added plenty of my flavored creamer to it. For iced coffee, it was extremely simple to make. You just pour it over ice and add 8 oz of water. I added the creamer after that. It is definitely a timer saver!

title: Nice Minty Taste
text: I'm not usually a fan of spearmint, but this gum is making me change my mind. It's got a nice minty taste, without being over powering. It's a soft gum with a firm (but not hard) shell coating. It leaves a fresh taste in my mouth and is perfect for times when you're not able to brush your teeth!

title: Excellent Quality
text: My family prefers fresh ground pepper over pre-ground pepper. They'll choose it every time. I like it because it captures more senses. When you grind it, you release the aroma of the pepper. Ground pepper is just flat compared to it. In fact, my family won't even use ground pepper on their food, but when I have pepper grinders, they frequently add it. As for the salt, I like being able to use it when it's more pure, before it's been sent to the factory and processed. All of these grinders are easy enough to operate. The variety offered is great, though I personally can't tell the difference between the two salts (other than color) or the two peppers. I would definitely order these again.

title: Tasty Tuna
text: These tuna packs are quite tasty! I wasn't sure what to expect with the sun dried tomatoes, but it's tuna with small bits of the sun dried tomatoes and spices mixed into it. The cans are small, but it's enough for a single serving. They have a good flavor.  I've found some recipes using these which sound interesting. It's definitely more exciting than just plain tuna.

title: Delicious Variety of Trail Mixes
text: My family has been devouring these trail mixes! I had to hide a couple for myself. The portions are a satisfying single serving. I like the variety of flavors with the berry & coconut one being my favorite. I've purchased this brand at the store before and liked them. They arrived fresh and taste delicious!

title: Not Bad
text: My kids (ages 17 & 20) were a bit hesitant to try this chickpea pasta. I made a small batch along with a full pot of whole wheat pasta for dinner. I asked everyone to give it a try with and without sauce. The consensus was that it "wasn't bad". With sauce, I couldn't even tell the difference between it and the whole wheat pasta. Alone, it did have a slight different taste, but it was palatable. When I compared the nutritional value, it had a slightly higher protein amount, and lower carbohydrates, but less fiber. The calories were the same. Everyone said they would eat it again. If I found this at my local grocery store and it was priced reasonably, I would consider purchasing it. My family all agreed that regular pasta is better (not the whole wheat).

title: Wonderful Vanilla Smell
text: I have just a regular Keurig machine, not one that does lattes or other specialty drinks. The first time I used one, I set it on 8 oz without realizing that it was actually an espresso. I could smell the vanilla almost immediately while it was brewing. The color was dark, but a little watery which I attributed to the size of the drink. I took a tiny taste of it before I added my creamer and I could detect a little vanilla, but it was pretty faint. I added my creamer and it was delicious. My creamer was flavored, so I really couldn't tell if I was tasting the vanilla creamer or the vanilla coffee. Regardless, I enjoyed my cup. I used the 6 oz size on my next cup and steamed/frothed some skim milk to make a latte. It took a little more work, but it was great! This time I could detect the vanilla taste in the coffee. Overall, I think these are good coffee pods and would definitely consider repurchasing them.

title: Helps Satisfy Sweet Cravings
text: I have a sweet tooth and I have found that these lollipops do help satisfy my sugar cravings. The flavors are pretty good and overall, I found them to taste pretty good. They do have a rough texture and slightly irritate or scrape my tongue when eating. It does help to keep me from snacking. I do think they are a bit pricey at costing more than a dollar a piece. I probably wouldn't pay that much. I was a little concerned that they might cause tummy issues because of the ingredients used to curb hunger, but I haven't had any issues. Overall, they're okay and do seem to work.

title: A Time Saver
text: I cook with a lot of garlic. I usually buy the minced garlic in the jar, but every now and then I will hand crush garlic cloves on my own. This is a huge time saver! I tasted it out of the jar and it tasted just as I would expect dehydrated garlic to taste. Once it was reconstituted, I could still tell that it wasn't fresh, but it was definitely acceptable, if not good. I used to use the dry minced garlic that's in the spice section and this is much better than that. I'm glad that I was able to try it because it's perfect for when I'm rushed to cook dinner.

title: Spicy!
text: I like to keep nut snacks on hand for my family. Single size serving ones such as these are great for taking on the go. These are perfect for that, as long as you have something to drink with it. The level of spiciness was greater than I expected. I am not a fan of the hot flavor snacks. My husband did enjoy them a lot. They have a powdery coating that is baked on. I didn't notice any bad aftertaste. They were definitely fresh and crunchy. It reminds me of something you might pick up at a gas station food mart while traveling.

title: Excellent Quality
text: These four spices show up frequently in my current favorite recipes. In fact, I usually have to add one to my grocery list at least once a month. They taste just as expected and are comparable to other brands that I have purchased. They all have a "best by" date of January 2020 which is much longer than they'll be in my cabinet.

title: Great Assortment!
text: I have been a fan of McCormick's Montreal Chicken Spice, so I was excited to give these a try. I received the 4 different spices pictured in the description. They all have January 2020 or February 2020 "best by" dates. The Smokehouse Maple is suggested for use with chicken, pork, or salmon. The Mesquite is suggested for use with chicken, ribs, or pork. The Chipotle is recommended for chicken, pork, steak, or veggies. The Spicy Montreal Steak is for steaks and burgers. Of course, those are only suggestions. They all smell really great and true to their names. The Smokehouse Maple smells just like it should with that name. It's a smokey maple smell. The ingredient lists are all recognizable with no chemicals or additives. We've been doing a lot of grilling lately, so we've had fun trying out these different spices. I sprinkled the Chipotle & Roasted Garlic directly on some chicken that was coated in olive oil. It added a nice flavor to the chicken. The garlic is not over powering. I've also sprinkled it on roasted broccoli. My husband has used a couple of these in beef marinades. I think this is a nice variety to have on hand. And the price is good at $3 a bottle, that's less than what I can buy at the grocery.

title: Great in Smoothies!
text: I frequently add flax seeds to foods for nutritional value. In the past, I've gotten full seeds which get stuck in our teeth! This bag is ground or milled, so that's not an issue at all. My husband and I have been adding it to our morning smoothies. I can't even tell it's in there because it's pretty finely ground. It doesn't really change the taste either. The directions say to add 4 scoops for a serving, but I've been adding less. It's reasonably priced, especially for the amount you get. I paid close to that for a lot less of the full seed ones in the past. I would definitely consider ordering again.

title: Love the Updated Silicone Items!
text: Wilton is the name I think of when it comes to candy making and cake decorating. I love the updated tools and products they have for their candy making kit. The silicone melting cups and bottle are my favorites. They are easier to clean than the sturdier plastic ones. The flex nicely when using. The tongs are a little large for a lot of the candy making that I do. I find that I have to use toothpicks or bamboo skewers for a lot of my chocolate dipping projects. The pre-cut parchment sheets are so quick and easy to use. And they look a lot neater than the torn pieces I get from the roll. Overall, these are great quality tools and perfect for home use.

title: Tasty Drink Mix
text: I would compare this to Crystal Light. I found it easy to drink, though a little sweeter than I was expecting. I mixed it in a 17 oz stainless steel bottle of water. It was easy to mix up and didn't leave any clumps. I didn't notice any weird aftertaste. It uses aspartame as its sweetener. I would love to find a similar drink mix that was made from Stevia. The flavor is pretty good, a little more raspberry than lemonade, but good. I did like that it has Vitamin C added to it. I was a little disappointed to only receive one box instead of 12, but I did not let that influence my review. Overall, I think this is a low calorie drink mix that is comparable to Crystal Light and other similar drink mixes.

title: Great for Paleo Diet!
text: My husband and 20 year old son have just started following a Paleo diet. I've been trying to make sure that there are plenty of Paleo friendly snacks and food around, especially for my son who likes to snack. These beef sticks have been perfect for them. They are a bit pricey as far as snacks go, at about $2 each, but that's pretty comparable to other sugar free beef sticks. I personally don't like meat sticks or jerky at all, so I have not tasted any of these, but my guys are really enjoying these. According to them, they are flavorful and satisfying. The spice level isn't too strong at all. They would actually be okay with more spiciness. They aren't too chewy or hard. My guys both said they would approve if I were to reorder these.

title: Tasty Protein Drink
text: Protein shakes have become quite helpful when I'm on the go. It's easy to grab and drink. I've tried other Premier Protein shakes and these are pretty comparable. They're palatable and easy to drink. These are not really a meal replacement drink, but good for snacks or part of a meal. The peach flavor is tasty. They do leave a slight aftertaste, but nothing off putting. They are definitely better cold than room temperature. They are filled with lots of vitamins and a great source of protein without too many calories.

title: Great Idea!
text: Ranch dressing mix in a canister is perfect for cooking! My Taco Soup recipe requires a packet of ranch dressing. My daughter is vegetarian so I have to make 2 batches of soup. I make her a single portion because she won't eat leftovers. So what I do is take a little bit from the packet for hers and put the rest in the beef batch. Well that means that we're getting less flavor in our soup. Now with this nice size canister, I can measure out the amount for our soup and then get some for hers. There are a few different portion amount instructions so you can make exactly how much dressing you want to make. My husband has been sprinkling some on his food, too. We would never open up a packet just for that!!

title: Great Texture And Consistency, But Leaves An Aftertaste
text: The texture and consistency of these protein cookies is great. It is just like a soft baked store bought chocolate chip cookie. My first thought when I had my first bite was that it wasn't that bad. But before I was done with that bite, I started to notice a strong, protein taste and less of the chocolate chip cookie taste. They left an unpleasant and strong aftertaste as do some protein bars. They are palatable, but it's not a substitute for a treat.  I eat protein bars for on the go convenience when I don't have the time to eat a healthy meal or snack. Some are tastier than others therefore easier to eat. These are ones that I almost (not quite) have to force myself to eat. In some ways that's good, because I won't be overeating them. They do leave me satisfied and full which is a good thing. I do find that I have to go brush my teeth almost immediately afterwards to get rid of the aftertaste.

title: Tasty Roasted Nuts
text: I buy a lot of roasted nuts for my family to snack on. They're high in protein and have multiple health benefits. These were a hit with my family because of the addition of pistachios. The nuts are crunchy and fresh. The ratio of salt to these nuts is perfect. They don't leave your hands greasy feeling after eating them. They do have a lot of peanuts, but I would say that it's as advertised and less than half of the mix. I would definitely consider ordering these again for my family.

title: Delicious!
text: These arrived on an extremely hot day and I was afraid it was going to be a huge mess when I opened them. It wasn't! They are soft caramels, but they do not stick to the wax paper wrappings. They aren't too sticky nor are they so chewing that you're afraid they're going to pull out any dental work. They have a delicious, rich taste. I can't really detect any mocha in these. They definitely have a chocolate flavor, but I can't taste any coffee flavors. The container is a generous size. I'm actually surprised that my family hasn't devoured them all yet. I think it's because they do have a rich taste, you can't eat more than a couple at a time. These would make an excellent gift.

title: Yummy!
text: My heart sank when I saw that these were on my front step. It was nearly 90 degrees outside and I had no idea how long they had been out there. I was positive that these were going to be a gooey mess. I was delightfully surprised to find that although they were soft, they were not gooey at all. They didn't stick to the wax paper wrapper. The caramel was soft, but slightly firm at the same time. They didn't stick to my teeth (or my dental work). They reminded me a lot of the home-made caramels that my mother-in-law used to make at Christmas time. The caramel is smooth and has no grittiness. It has a buttery caramel taste. There are just a few crystals of salt scattered through out each piece. These were a big hit with the whole family. My only complaint is that it was the smaller container!

title: Fragrant Loose Tea
text: This loose tea smells amazing! It has a nice, fruity fragrance to it. The pieces of tea are varied in the size. There are some large pieces as well as some dust. I had difficulties putting some of the pieces in my infuser because they were so long. Then when my tea was done steeping, I noticed some bits floating in my tea. The finished tea has a beautiful pink color. The taste is mild with a hint of fruitiness. I drink my tea unsweetened, so I did not add any sugar or sweeteners to it. Because of the presence of caffeine, I have been drinking this in the mid morning when I tend to get hungry. It does seem to do a good job of curbing my appetite. I don't feel hungry after drinking it.  I have not noticed an increase in my metabolism, but that's not to say that there is one. Overall, I am enjoying this tea and would consider purchasing it again. I am also interested in trying some of the other flavors.

title: Smooth & Rich Taste
text: These coffee beans smell wonderful. I received the Espresso blend, but we've been using it for regular coffee rather than espresso. The beans are slightly oily, like most coffee beans. They grind well. The taste is smooth and rich, similar to other dark roasted coffees. It's not the best coffee, but it is good and comparable to other independent brands. I would consider ordering this again.

title: These Didn't Last Too Long in My House!
text: These didn't last very long at my house. I was lucky to get one! These have a good balance of sweet and salty. The nuts are more prevalent than the chocolate. And the flavor of the peanuts is the most noticeable. The sea salt is not very strong, but it can be detected.  I've had similar bars that are almost difficult to bite into, but these were not. Although crunchy, they were chewy enough that I wasn't afraid it would break my teeth! I would order them again.

title: Flavorful
text: This is an interesting product that adds some flavor along with some nutrients to your food. My husband and I have tried this on a cottage cheese, steamed vegetables, and eggs. It's not a hot, spicy flavor, but there is minimal heat in it.  Adding it to cottage cheese reminded me of a more flavorful wheat germ, probably because of the texture. I really liked it on vegetables. My biggest issue with the topper is that it does add a lot more calories than I would like to add to my food. Although they seem to be healthy calories, they are still calories.

title: Blends Well
text: My teenage daughter has been enjoying the Peach Matcha Green Tea smoothie for her breakfasts. She mixes it with orange juice and frozen mixed fruit. She puts it in the blender until it's smooth. The Matcha taste is fairly mild and does not over power the smoothie. The box says to add one cup of juice or milk plus some fruit. One cup of liquid makes for a very small smoothie, so she's been adding at least double the amount of liquid. She doesn't love it, but she does like it enough.

title: Smooth Gravy
text: Gravy is something I've never learned to make. So whenever we want some, it comes out of a jar. This gravy is a pretty tasty. It has a good blend of spices that is not over powering. The consistency is smooth and lump free. It is fast and easy to heat up. I wasn't quite sure that I got all of it out of the carton because you can't see through it like a class jar, but I do appreciate that it can be crushed down in size. Ts comes with 8 cartons  so it should last a while.

title: Easy Mix!
text: Pancakes are a weekend tradition for my family. These mixes are easy to use. All you have to do is add water. We found that we needed to adjust the suggested amount of water. One package was too runny and the other was too thick, but it was easy to remedy by either adding more water or mix. The finished pancakes were tasty. They weren't as fluffy and light as some mixes we've tried, but they were still good. One package was enough to feed my family of 4, twice.

title: Great Flavor, But Needs Salt!
text: These snack crackers have a great, flavor. The herbs are flavorful and noticeable. They are fresh and crunchy, the way crackers should be. However, I thought they were a bit boring and really need some salt. They are great for dips where the lack of saltiness isn't detected. There are two boxes of individually packaged crackers. Each box contains 12 packages. My teenage daughter didn't care for them, but my husband really likes them.

title: Tastes Good, But Wrappers are Super Sticky
text: The Brach's Kiddie Mix Sweet & Sour assortment is full of brand name treats. The candy was fresh and tasted as expected. There were definitely more of the single Jawbreakers, Lemonheads, Now & Laters, and Super Bubble than there were of the larger boxed Chewy Lemonheads & Trolli Sour Crawlers. I did have at least 5 of the Warheads that some other reviewers didn't get. I do have to agree with those who said the contents were sticky. All of my candy was wrapped securely. I opened it from the top and the first couple of items that I tried, did not have any stickiness on the outer wrapper. But when I put the bag on its side and cut it open from top to bottom, almost everything was sticky. It's so sticky that I'm trying to decide if it's even worth it to try and salvage. I know my teenagers will probably be okay with eating it, but in this condition, I could definitely not pass it out to trick or treaters.

title: Yummy!
text: Absolutely delicious! The kernals were fresh and crunchy. Each one was well coated in caramel yumminess. These were priced cheaper than what my local grocery store sells them for. I will definitely be ordering these again!

title: Good Taste
text: I was looking for a new meal replacement bar and found these. I've been eating the Oh Yeah! One! Protein Bars, but they are a bit pricey. The price on these was much more attractive. I'm a big fan of coconut, so I thought I would give these a try. They taste good. There's no bad aftertaste. They remind me of the Kind Healthy Grains bars in the taste department. I was hoping for a stronger coconut flavor. I can barely detect the coconut at all. The bars are filling. I've been eating one around 7 am for breakfast and I'm good for at least 3 hours before I need a snack. I'm following Weight Watchers right now and each bar is 6 WW smart points.

title: Yummy Caramel Flavor
text: This is a 3 pack of the small cones. I didn't read the serving size, but I ate one cone per sitting. They aren't very big, so it felt like it should be a single serving size. The popcorn was evenly coated in caramel. There were no pieces that were skimped on the caramel. Crunchy without being hard. It has a good overall flavor. I would definitely buy this again.

title: Huge Bottles!
text: These bottles are huge! With that being said, they still fit in the cup holders in my minivan. They extend too much out of the side pockets of my backpack though. I keep them in the door of my refrigerator. As for the taste....it tastes like water.  I can't taste any difference in this water from teh water that dispenses from my refrigerator. There's no off putting smell. I've tried another PH water and it did have a slight smell when it was at room temperature, this one does not. I like the addition of the minerals. I do think it's a bit expensive. It comes to about $2.80 per bottle. However, I do occasionally buy a 16 oz bottle of water for $2, and since these bottles are double the size, the cost looks more reasonable.

title: Good Chocolate Flavor
text: I thought these gluten free, protein cookies were okay, but husband and 19 year old son really liked it. The cookies are generously sized, but one cookie is actually two servings. I personally would prefer single serving items, even if that meant they were smaller. The cookies are more cake consistency than cookie. They reminded me a lot of Vita Muffin Tops. The chocolate flavor is good. There's a noticeable coconut flavor which I like. I thought they were a little on the dry side, but my husband and son didn't agree with me. I'm currently doing Weight Watchers, and one serving (half a cookie) comes to 8 smart points and the full cookie is a whopping 16 smart points! If I am going to use that many WW smart points, I would choose something else.

title: Great Natural Taste
text: These are tasty fruit snacks. My teenage daughter is picky when it comes to fruit snacks, but she actually likes these. I've eaten a few packets and they taste like typical fruit snacks to me. They're not too gummy or chewy. The fruit taste is pretty natural. They are sweet without being overly sweet. I do like that the colors and flavors aren't artificial. There is a little bit of fruit juice and fruit puree inside. I would say that the taste is pretty comparable to other fruit snack products out there. I wouldn't say they were healthy snacks by any means, but they are a quality fruit gummy snack that's made a little better than some of the other fruit snacks out there.

title: Good Flavor
text: These Clif bars are quite tasty! They are filling as well as satisfying. I'm currently doing Weight Watchers and they calculate to be pretty high points compared to a lot of other protein bars. One bar equals 9 WW smartpoints. However, if I plan my meals carefully, I can enjoy one of these on occasion. I tried the coconut/almond/chocolate bars. The flavors are good, but I wouldn't mind a stronger coconut taste. The bars are dense and substantial.

title: Tasty Snack
text: These were a big hit with my family. The almond quinoa clusters were firm and crunchy. They are a bit on the dry side, but not in a bad way.  A serving size is 4 pieces which was surprisingly filling. They are lightly sweetened and don't taste overly sweet at all. The sweetness is very mild and not very noticeable. The taste of almonds is the strongest of the ingredients.  My husband and I are doing Weight Watchers and the serving size equates to 5 WW smart points which isn't too bad for a snack. The package is a good size and lasted my family of four (two adults, two teenagers) for several days.

title: Thick & Heavy Cream
text: This facial cream has a mild, natural scent. It doesn't smell like any fragrance was added to it, which is good. It's thicker and much heavier than what I would use for daytime. It reminds me more of a night cream. It seems to absorb into the skin well and it doesn't leave a greasy feeling behind. I've had some minor blemishes come up while using it, but I'm not certain if it was related to this cream or more of a hormonal issue. It does leave my skin feeling soft and hydrated though. My preferred day time moisturizers are light weight and contain sunscreen.

title: Best Tasting Protein Bars!
text: My favorite protein meal replacement bars! My husband, son, and I are doing Weight Watchers and we like these for meals on the go. The flavors are fun and tasty. I prefer ordering the variety packs so we aren't stuck with a single flavor. Most of these end up being 6 Weight Watchers Smart Points per bar.

title: Good Flavor
text: This EVO comes in a large, sturdy plastic bottle. The oil has a good flavor and comparable to other olive oils that I have purchased as the supermarket. I have used it in cooking and with Balsamic vinegar as a salad dressing and I have been pleased with it. It should last a while, but I would definitely order it again.

title: Yummy!
text: I started Weight Watchers about six months ago. The Oh Yeah One bars have been a life saver! I keep one in my purse at all times, so if I get hungry, I have something I can eat that won't use up all my daily points. The variety pack is a great way to try out a bunch of different flavors. I have been able to find a few flavors at my local grocery, but more than half of these are not found there. My favorites are the Peanut Butter Pie, Blueberry Cobbler, and Maple Doughnut. My least favorite one is the Mint Chocolate Chip one which isn't included in this variety. They don't leave much of an aftertaste. They taste so good that they are almost like treats. These are definitely the best tasting meal replacement/protein bars that I have tried. Most of them work out to be 6 smart points on the WW plan.

title: Great for On The Go!
text: I had difficulties find the sugar free individual creamers in the grocery stores. I like to use these when traveling or when I'm not at home. These are just as expected. I purchase the larger bottles for use when I'm at home.

title: Good Flavor
text: My husband took our Tassimo machine to keep at the office. He really likes the Tim Horton's T-Discs. It has a strong, coffee taste and comes with 14 T-discs.

title: No Peanuts in these Mixed Nuts!
text: This is a great assortment of mixed nuts! First of all, there are no peanuts! I personally like peanuts, but a lot of mixed nuts use them as filler and include fewer deluxe nuts. This one only has the deluxe ones. The nuts arrived fresh and tasty. They were mostly whole nuts, with some pieces. The salt ratio is good. They were not overly salty. My family has been enjoying this high quality, high protein snack.

title: Delicious!
text: These glazed pecans are amazing!! I'm currently trying to lose weight, so I very carefully measured my servings. If I didn't, I'm sure I would have eaten way too many! A serving size is a quarter of a cup which was more than adequate to satisfy any of my sweet cravings. Luckily (or unluckily) my family liked them, too, so they didn't last for long. The pecans were fresh tasting. They didn't leave any stickiness on my teeth or any aftertaste. They have a buttery taste which is yummy! I would definitely order these again.

title: Good Peach Flavor
text: We recently got a Nescafe Dolce Gusto Esperta 2 machine. This peach tea has become a favorite for my teenage daughter. I'm not a fan of sweetened teas, but my daughter loves it. She said it's a little sweeter than she would prefer, but it has a nice, peach flavor.

title: Good Cinnamon Flavor
text: We go through a fair amount of cinnamon. I usually purchase regular ground cinnamon, as opposed to organic. I like the idea of using organic, so I have been gradually purchasing organic as I run out of ingredients. This cinnamon smells wonderful. The taste isn't over powering or too strong. It tastes as cinnamon should. I can't tell much of a difference in the taste as compared to a non-organic ground cinnamon, but it does taste fine.

title: Delicious!
text: The Salted Cocoa Truffle Spread is amazing! I've never been a fan of Nutella, but this is one sweet spread that I like! I didn't expect it to taste so much like the inside of a fancy truffle, but it does. It's very rich tasting and I have only been able to eat a little bit at a time. It's about the consistency of creamy peanut butter. It spreads easily. The chocolate and salt flavors are easy to pick out, but the caramel was a little more elusive. While I personally thought the sweetness was appropriate, both my teenage daughter and my husband found it to be too sweet. It does have a high calorie content, but because it of it's richness, I couldn't eat much of it at one sitting anyway.

title: Great Assortment of Snacks
text: I have a son in college. I have purchased a few different care packages for him. This one was actually much nicer than I expected. I found it listed as an Amazon Daily Deal, so I did get it for a little less than it is original listed, but I would consider it at the full price, too. First of all, the actual box was larger than expected. Some of the care packages that I have gotten have been in really small boxes which made me question how much stuff they could fit inside it. There are several different chips, cookies, crackers, and candies. The picture is pretty accurate as to what comes inside. I've made my own care packages before and in order to get the variety of items that you find in this, you have to spend a lot more. Most of these items are sold in multi-packs so you end up with a lot of additional packages just so you can include a few of one thing in the care package. My son appreciates getting a large variety of snacks instead of one with less variety. All of the items were fresh and with expiration dates of at least a couple of months out. I'm sure everything will get eaten within a few weeks anyway.

title: Great Spicy Flavor
text: Ever since I purchased an electric pepper mill, my family started using fresh pepper all the time! It's so much better than pre-ground pepper. I was never really a fan of pepper until we started grinding our own over our food. These peppercorns have a great, peppery flavor. They are fresh and flavorful.  I have my grinder set on coarse and love the spicy bite this gives off. The jar is generously sized and should last a while.

title: Yummy!
text: These are yummy!!! I was introduced to Violet Crumbles by an Australian friend, but those are difficult to find in the US. I had heard that these are pretty similar, so I was excited to try them. They are delicious! Very similar product to Violet Crumbles, but easier to find. The price for a dozen was very reasonable.

title: Dark Roast Coffee
text: I've been too busy to head out to the mall to get my Tassimo coffee t-discs. This is a new flavor to me. It is a dark roast and a little strong for me, but my husband likes it. I've been trying to go for lower acidic coffees anyway, so that's okay. There are 16 t-discs and each one makes a standard cup size.

title: No Heartburn!!!
text: I enjoy waking up before the rest of my family. I like to sip my morning cup of coffee in a quiet house while catching up on emails and social media. It's my routine. I have GERD, but until recently, coffee didn't really affect that. Over the last few months though, I started getting heartburn after my morning coffee. I get heartburn from a lot of the foods that I eat, but getting it after my coffee was new to me. I did some research and discovered that there are coffees out there with lower acid, so I decided to give it a try. I chose the mocha java flavor only because it was lower priced. If they were priced similarly, I would have gone with a French vanilla or even one with no flavor, but I didn't want to spend a lot of money on something I wasn't even sure would work. I usually add a lot of creamer and some whipped cream to my coffee, so the flavor isn't really a big deal anyway.  This is whole bean, so my husband ground it for me and I put it in an air tight container. I didn't really notice a big mocha smell to the beans or ground coffee. It smelled a lot like coffee. I added my usual creamer and whipped cream to my fresh brewed coffee. The taste was mild. My teenage daughter who doesn't care for coffee unless it's in an iced blended coffee drink, liked this, too. And the best part of it was - I had no heartburn at all!!! I was afraid that I was going to have to give up drinking coffee, but now I don't! I can continue my morning routine! I am beyond thrilled to have found this.

title: Tasty Flavors
text: This is a nice assortment of floss sugar flavors. We recently bought a personal cotton candy machine and wanted to try out a few different flavors. I decided to go with this brand because the sugar is a well known brand. It comes with 50 paper cones which meant that we didn't have to order those separately. My teenagers have been reusing the cones since it's for personal use. I do wish that the sugar came in resealable bags. Our cotton candy machine only uses a small bit at a time so I have been rubber banding the bags closed when not in use.

title: OMG Delicious!
text:
This tray of roasted and glazed nuts arrived on a hot day. Well, it's summer in Georgia, every day is hot. Well, my teenagers and I opened it right away. Because they were warm, they almost tasted like they were right out of the oven! They were delicious!! My family had no self control over these. They were fresh and tasty. My 18 year old son liked the macadamia nuts best whereas my 15 year old daughter favored the pecans. My husband and I liked them all. The divided tray is a little smaller than I had hoped. But then I started comparing it to the glazed nuts you get at the amusement park or sports arena. Each compartment was probably about what you get in the regular sized paper cones at those events. So that's like getting 4 paper cones of glazed nuts. With my family of four, I shouldn't have been so surprised that they were all gone later that evening. It was comparable to everyone having their own paper cone. Except we didn't. My daughter and I agree that it was more like her father and brother got three paper cones to share and we shared one. Oh well....they were yummy and enjoyed by all of us.

*I purchased this at a discounted price in exchange for my honest & unbiased review. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

title: Nice & Basic
text: My son is graduating from high school in a few weeks and this banner will be perfect! It's a simple, basic banner similar to what you might get at the party supply store. I would say that it's a mid-quality product. It's not a high end banner, but not dollar store either. It should be able to last for multiple events.

title: Great Taste
text:
Popcorn is a favorite snack at my house. My teenage daughter eats it almost daily. We’ve started microwaving our own popcorn instead of buying prepackaged stuff. This red popcorn is delicious! The actual unpopped kernels are a little smaller than the regular ones I have gotten at the grocery store. When popped, it’s still a little smaller, but they are bright white in color. I didn’t notice any fewer unpopped kernels than what we get with the store bought ones. The taste is really good.

*I purchased this at a discounted price in exchange for my honest & unbiased review. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

title: Beautiful!
text: This is my first time purchasing dried lavender buds. My daughter wanted to make bath bombs and really wanted to add some flowers to them. These are a lovely blue-purple color. It has an authentic, real lavender scent to it. It comes in a resealable plastic bag. It says the shelf life for these is 18 months. There are a few stems and leaves in the bag, but it wasn't a problem for us. They ended up looking beautiful in our bath bombs! We only used a small bit, so we have quite a lot left. We're thinking about making some sachets or something.

title: My Family's Favorite Popcorn!
text: I am a busy full time working mom. Recently my daughter asked me to pick up some microwave popcorn because we were out. Between work, driving kids around, and meetings, I just didn't have time to make the trip to the store, so I decided to order some. This brand and flavor is a family favorite. The popcorn has a real buttery taste as opposed to an artificial butter taste. It's lightly salted. It pops up pretty well as far as microwave popcorn goes.

title: Cute Basket!
text:
[[VIDEOID:540ffca206235a2d5e9c5311ccbfbbde]] This is a cute Easter gift basket. The basket itself is well constructed. The handle is not very stiff, but it is strong enough & I'm not worried about it not being able to hold the contents. The bunny's face decorations are stitched with thread, not printed on to the fabric. The ears have wire inside so you can pose them if you desire. I purchased this for my kids for Easter, but I did go ahead & open up the chocolate eggs so I could taste one. The eggs are a high quality chocolate and do not taste gritty or waxy. The chocolate bunny is a nice size and comes with a little "Tale of Peter Rabbit" booklet. The whole thing was wrapped in plastic shrink wrap and had a little bow on it. The basket is very nice and would make a child very happy on Easter.

*I purchased this at a discounted price in exchange for my honest & unbiased review. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

title: Nice Flavor
text:
The Perfect Spice is a nice blend of spices. It is full of flavor. We just used it on grilled chicken breasts and it was delicious. The spices aren't listed, but I could definitely pick out the taste of crushed peppercorns. I'm glad that I ordered the low sodium version. It's not sodium free, so it does have some sodium and we felt that it was more than enough. The description says to use it on everything, but I would be interested in specific suggestions because I am not very good at pairing spices with meats and vegetables.

*I purchased this at a discounted price in exchange for my honest & unbiased review. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

title: Nice, Low Calorie Snack
text:
My son and husband love summer sausages, jerky and meat sticks so I am always looking out for new snacks for them. These are nice because they are a good source of protein with only 80 calories. They are generously sized. I have purchased similar meat stick products that are much shorter than these and about the same width. The garlic flavoring was good, but could have been stronger. The quality of the meat was pretty good. There were no big fatty pieces. I didn't notice that they are supposed to be refrigerated after opening because there was a sticker over the ingredients and information label. Overall, we found these to be good, but not the best meat sticks out there.

*I purchased these at a discounted price in exchange for my honest & unbiased review. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

title: My Favorite Breath Mint!
text: These are my favorite mints & they have become difficult to find. I'm afraid that they may be discontinued because I can't find them in most of my local stores anymore. These are nice & minty without being overly strong.

title: Great Seasonings!
text: A friend of mine brought me some of this from a trip to Louisiana and I have fallen in love with it. It's a nice blend of spiciness! I have a Cajun Chicken Pasta recipe that calls for Cajun Seasoning & I have been using this. I just recently ran out of it and I have been unable to find it in the local stores. This container is much larger than the one I had, so I am excited to know that I am not going to be running out anytime soon.

title: Tasty Side Dish
text:
This Quinoa/rice dish is easy to prepare. From start to finish it took approximately 22 minutes. It has a nice texture with a little bit of crunch from the lentils. The flavor is mild and in the opinion of my family, it needed salt. We are not ones to immediately salt everything and only do it when a dish needs a little enhancement. Other than adding the salt, we did not do anything extra to it. We wanted to try it plain first. I do see a lot of potential with this such as adding chicken to make it a meal or using it as filling in a burrito. I love that all the ingredients are organic! We enjoyed it, including my two teenagers.

*I received this directly from Hodgson Mill for the purpose of trying it out & reviewing. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

title: Love the Caramel Flavor!
text: This is one of my all time Tassimo favorites! It has a nice, Caramel flavor. Not many of my local stores carry the Tassimo products, so I was pleased to be able to purchase it at an affordable price here.

title: Nice & Bold Coffee Flavor!
text:
My husband and I have made coffee part of our regular morning routine. But as the weather starts to turn colder, my husband will often partake of it later in the day. I don't seem to have much difficulties with caffeine, but my husband does. Too much of it affects his sleep. So when we were given the opportunity to try the Latitude Bold Half Caff, I was excited to do so. The flavor is nice & bold, nothing fancy. It's just a good cup of coffee. My husband prefers the bolder coffees and this meets his preference. We use a single cup coffee maker that has a built-in filter, so we don't usually use paper filters. This coffee, though, is very finely ground and we found that we did need to use a paper filter to keep the grounds from spilling over into the finished cup. The first time I served it to my husband, I didn't tell him that it was a reduced caffeine beverage and he was not able to tell any difference. So now my dear husband can have that additional cup of coffee in the afternoon without all the additional caffeine!

*I purchased this coffee at a reduced price for the purpose of trying it & reviewing. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

title: Light Coconut Taste
text:
I was given a code to purchase the Latitude 23.5 coffee at a discount directly from the company's website. In return, I agreed to try it out & leave an honest review.

I ordered the Paradise Crunch flavor. I have always loved coconut coffee beverages and was excited to try it at home. The flavor is described as "captivating coconut with a dash of vanilla". I've been using it in my Mr. Coffee Latte Maker and have been making delicious lattes. The coconut taste is very subtle and I don't notice it in every sip. The same goes with the smell - it's not over powering. I personally would not have minded a stronger coconut presence. The coffee is extremely smooth tasting and didn't cause any troubles with my Acid Reflux. I am just starting to jump on the Organic bandwagon, especially when there's not a huge price difference. The retail price of this Latitude coffee is on par with other coffee products so I would definitely repurchase at full price. I love that it comes with a resealable tape! Sometimes it's the little things! It is very frustrating when you have to track down a clip or something to close your open coffee bag.

title: Great Flavor & Easy to Make!
text: I received a box of the Twinings Peach Cold Brew tea with a gift about a year ago. Ever since then, I have been looking for it when I'm at the grocery & have never been able to find it!! I finally decided to just order it on Amazon. I ordered the set of 6 boxes & I am so pleased! This should be able to last me a while. I've tried other Peach flavored ice teas, but none as as flavorful as the Twinings one and the fact that it's a cold brew formula, it's super easy to make! Each tea bag comes individually packaged, so I've started keeping a couple in my purse for when I'm away from home. I can't believe I waited a year before I ordered it!

title: Delicious!
text: We buy a lot of snack bars. I was a little skeptical about these premium snack bars because of the price. I usually buy a box of store brand bars for the price of one single "Nothin' But" bar. But I was totally wrong. These snack bars are incredible! First of all, I was able to order a package of 4 bars directly from their website as part of a promotion. They arrived in a cute little drawstring bag and included a bonus "Nothin' But" Cookie.  They are soft, not crunchy. It doesn't crumble and make a mess. There's enough chocolate taste that it actually satisfies my chocolate cravings. When I asked my 17 year old son what he thought of it - He said it was much better than he expected. He eats a lot of  snack bars & he said this was one of the best ones he has ever had. My husband really liked it, too. He has been wanting to try Alton Brown's recipe for snack bars and his comment after trying one of these was "That is probably close to what Alton Brown's bars tastes like". That translates into "They are really good!". It is quite filling. I found that half a bar was just the right amount for my breakfast. With 2 teenagers, we go through so many snack bars each week. I probably wouldn't replace all of them with these, but I would definitely purchase them in addition to the others.

title: Flavor is very good & smooth!
text: My husband only buys whole bean coffee. Good quality beans have been harder to find in the grocery stores recently. Ground coffee is more readily available where I shop. My husband prefers dark roast, bold coffee & he has been very pleased with this. He says the flavor is very good & smooth as described. This is a little more expensive than what we usually buy, but it seems to be a case of "you get what you pay for". Better coffee is worth a little more!

title: Great for kids!
text: I received some Lawry's Signature Southern Crispy Oven Bake from BzzAgent for free. I don't usually use preseasoned coatings like this, but I enjoyed trying it. I used it to make homemade chicken nuggets. It was easy to use & overall, the chicken was good. I do agree with many of the other reviewers that the flavor was a bit mild, but with kids, that was actually a good thing. They often don't like heavily spicy foods. Someone suggested adding some Lawry's Season Salt and that sounds like a good idea.

title: I don't think I will ever go back to using processed cocoa powder!
text: This is my first time purchasing any type of raw cacao powder. I don't think I will ever go back to using processed cocoa powder! It has a nice, chocolaty smell and although not sweetened, the taste of the powder on it's own isn't as bitter as cocoa powder. I made some Brownies with it & my husband was able to tell the difference in the type of chocolate used right away, in a good way.  I've been reading online about the benefits of cacao powder & have been impressed. The bag is resealable, but we had some difficulties with it. We ended up folding the top over a few times & putting a clip on it. I will probably transfer it to some type of air-tight canister or jar in the future to keep this Super Food fresh!

title: Yummy!
text: What a great deal this was! The truffles were delicious. I especially enjoyed the crème brulee ones. I hope Amazon offers these again as a prime special. Yummy!

title: Nice Vanilla Taste
text: My local stores have a very limited selection on Tassimo T-discs. Somehow I have ended up with lots of latte discs without the espresso T-discs to go with them. (I think my husband was using them, but didn't use them for lattes). So I have a few boxes of latte discs. I ordered this French Vanilla because it doesn't come with any latte discs so I can use them up with some nice flavored coffee. I know these aren't espressos, but they still taste good with the latte discs. I do have to use a larger mug though to accommodate the larger amount of coffee this makes (compared to the espresso serving size) when adding the latte disc. These have a very nice vanilla flavor. Smells yummy, too!

title: Not the same as my first order…a waste of money!
text:
I am SO disappointed. I ordered these before when they were on sale and they were delicious so I decided to splurge and pay full price to purchase another container (I say splurge because with taking a pay cut due to the virus...but it was a special treat). This batch was so hard! I bit into the first piece, expecting it to be soft and buttery like the first batch, and I literally hurt my tooth! Th outside was soft but just a tiny bit in the caramel was hard as a rock. I carefully tried another piece thinking the first piece was a fluke and that was the same. I wasted the money for a useless container of caramel I’ll have to pitch. 😕

If you decide to order, I hope you get a batch like the first batch I received because those were delicious! They were the perfect mix of buttery with a touch of salt.

title: My grandson loves....
text: My grandson is a type one brittle diabetic so he enjoys these drinks very much I send them to him occasionally they live in another state so Nana sends what she can when she can.

title: Tendernesseans everything.
text: I buy a lot of beef jerky from you the last time I received the two pack it was not very fresh at all I was very disappointed. I will however buy again because I trust that this was just one of those things that happens every once in awhile. Otherwise tender, the flavor is great and I've definitely sent it as gifts and will continue doing so. I recommend to all my friends because of the bargain that it is and that it's definitely delivered straight to your door which is a plus and quite fast. text: These were a gift I sent to friends 2 times and they loved them. Said they were perfectly chewable, creamy, with a perfect hint of sea salt. Fast delivery as well. I definitely will be ordering again. Sorry I don't have any photos but they were definitely enjoyed, guaranteed.

title: Made my granddaughter happy.
text: Unfortunately I don't have any photos or an unboxing. But I do have my daughter's approval on these. text: Be aware that sometimes the chocolate may arrive slightly melted and rehardenef or with white bloom. Request a replacement if this occurs. Don't order during hot season.

title: Drool!! So Good!
text: OMG!! I was not expecting these to be THIS good. I cannot stop eating them. They are so incredibly soft, gooey, and delicious. There is just the right amount of salt on top of each caramel. The crazy part is they really don’t stick to your teeth! They are sweet, salty, buttery, and mouthwatering. These are easily the best caramels I have ever had. I will be buying more!

title: Very High Quality Jerky - All Top Round
text:
Other people have said why this is a great beef jerky and they are correct. This jerky comes from an old mom/pop recipe and it also utilizes all top round which is a whole, relatively expensive cut of beef. You won't find a bunch of gristly pieces you have to chew around and then wonder what part of the animal you just ate. The jerky pieces are more tender and some are more chewy depending on how they were cut up - some are against the grain a little more than some which are purely cut along the grain. This gives you a little variety in the bag which is sort of neat.

This is also not a jerky product made of meat pieces and meat glue. It's honest jerky that's cut well, seasoned beautifully, and not over or under dried. I have never seen any beef jerky that was really good, and also cheap.
It's not supposed to be cheap and if you find jerky that is cheap then it's a given that you will get what you pay for.

text:
Please don’t stop making these
They’re delicious and with hyperemesis gravidum I’ve been hospitalized twice for vomiting and not being able to eat
These pops are one of the only things I can hold down

Update: in my third trimester and I can eat again! (though I’m occasionally still nauseous and vomit sometimes). I have continued to love these ice pops. They are a nice little snack when I feel a bit queasy. They feel good on my throat with the pregnancy acid reflux. They’re absolutely delicious and they’re better than any other ice pops out there. I love them so much I NEVER want to be without them in my life. I saw them once in Sam’s club and got so excited.

Please keep making these !!!

title: Only thing I can keep down pregnant and nauseous
text:
I’m pregnant and extremely nauseous and the last three days I’ve thrown up every day and can barely eat or hold anything down. I went searching for nausea snacks and found these and ordered in desperation, wanting anything with some calories. They’re the only things I can keep down right now and will at least hold me out over the weekend until I can talk to a doctor and get some more help.
I’m grateful I found these or I would have nothing in my stomache. These don’t bother me at all.

title: Versatile, delicious and easy
text:
It’s hard to find a soup on Amazon that’s vegetarian, GF, healthy AND tasty. This soup ticks all the boxes. My boyfriend is vegetarian and I am not but I love to cook and I love him.
I also have fibromyalgia and don’t always feel up to making multiple meals both vegetarian and non. Enter Pacific Foods Vegetable Quinoa.

You can add extra things to it like cheese or olive oil or veggies or tofu. If you’re a meat eater you can add chicken or shrimp.

Even when I made it plain for my partner he loved it and raved about it and he’s honestly not the raving about food type.

So definitely get it!

title: I was so happy to have found GF Harvest organic/gluten-free rolled oats on ...
text: I was so happy to have found GF Harvest organic/gluten-free rolled oats on Amazon. The oatmeal is delicious, cooks in 2 minutes, and I've been eating it 3 times a day since July with pastured butter, raw sugar and a sprinkle of cinnamon. Tastes like dessert to me!  Adding oatmeal to my diet was not an attempt to lower my cholesterol (I see it as comfort food), so  I was amazed to find my total cholesterol dropped from 256 to 222.

title: If you love cashews, these are the best!
text: Food-to-Live organic cashews arrive beautifully vacuum-packed. They are the best I've tasted: fresh and ready to toast. I laid my cashews out in a single layer on a foil-lined, lightly greased, rimmed cookie sheet (you need the rim so you can stir the nuts while baking). Then bake in a 350 degree oven for about 10 minutes, or until light golden brown. Watch carefully while baking, as they burn easily. Stir often to toast evenly. After removing from the oven, I brushed my cashews with melted Kerry Gold unsweetened butter and sprinkled on Herbamare seasoning. When cooled down, they are crisp and delicious. I keep mine in the fridge in a tightly sealed container. They are a real treat and I can't wait to order more!

title: Kirkland Pine Nuts from RokBuy are delicious!
text: I toast these pine nuts and sprinkle a couple of spoonfuls onto my tossed salads. Great taste and healthy too! It is suggested that pine nuts not be eaten out of hand (as you would potato chips!). Some people have experienced an allergic reaction that affects the taste buds. I have had no problem using pine nuts in salads and that's the only way I would recommend Kirkland Pine Nuts.

title: Kidney Bean & Corn Salad
text:
Several months ago, I switched to a plant-based diet. In an effort to eat enough foods that provide protein, I've been buying Eden organic no salt added kidney beans for a simple and delicious salad made of these beans (rinsed thoroughly and drained) combined with frozen Bird's Eye corn (I use the individual Steam Fresh packet), lots of diced organic celery for crunch, two tablespoons of Goya extra virgin olive oil and Alessi white balsamic vinegar. I have found that adding the vinegar to individual servings when ready to serve has a better taste than mixing it into the entire salad during preparation. I'd like to say that this is the first time in my life that I have eaten kidney beans and didn't know what I was missing (and I am 82 years old!)I keep this salad in the fridge, and have it as a side dish twice a day.

Another food that I didn't know existed is Eden Red Inca Quinoa. Another absolutely amazing food that can be added as a nutritious protein boost to just about everything. I add it to pasta sauce for extra body; Amy's organic low in sodium soups that I dilute and add wild rice blend and the quinoa, as well as anything else that I can think of along the way. I'm learning a whole new way of enjoying mealtime. It's exciting and good-for-you eating!

title: I never like the taste of a processed product more than the ...
text: This sounds crazy, but I actually prefer the taste of these eggs to whole eggs. And, trust me, I never like the taste of a processed product more than the original. I bought these because my daughter has a swallowing problem, and I thought I could make these loose enough for her to eat like with instant potatoes. These eggs did not really work for those purposes; however, I fell in love with them myself. They are buttery and rich with a real egg taste, but somehow I like the texture of these more. title: They are perfect in every way & I need more!
text:
This was a very nice gift for myself (although I shared it with my family). This is three reviews in one. My hubby said it has a good flavor but too sweet & too soft (might need refrigeration). My son (16) said it was very good but he liked hard candy with fruit flavors better. (But somehow, I kept finding the jar in his room.) My review - they are perfect & I wouldn’t change a thing.
I recently had my teeth removed and all the treats and snacks that we’re used to eating are suddenly too hard & scratchy. I’ve always loved caramels, so when I needed another $10 to escape shipping charges, I took a chance and bought Tara’s.
From the first piece, the flavor unfolds on your tongue. The sea salt is perfectly balanced with the sweetness of the caramel and you can actually identify the vanilla flavor. My grandma never made caramels so this was a true treat for me.
I asked my family if they liked caramels. Both of them wrinkled their noses and said ‘not really’, so I figured the candies would be all mine. They arrived today and are gone. I need to put them on my ‘favorites’ list and on Christmas lists for the family. They are perfect!

The flavor is much better in bone-in salmon when cooking the salmon. title: What a huge disappointment and embarrassment.
text:
This brand of cream cheese is very inferior in quality as compared to other brands. It does NOT have a smooth, creamy texture and it's tasteless.

I used it to make a cheesecake for my friend's birthday. I left the cream cheese sit out until it was softened, but when I tried to blend it into the other ingredients, it wouldn't blend smoothly and my cheesecake ended up having large clumps of unblended cream cheese throughout.

I was mortified when my friend made a comment about the lumpy texture of the cheesecake; however, she quickly smiled and said that the exact same thing had happened to her when she used 365 cream cheese in her red velvet cake recipe.

I've also tried to spread this brand of (softened) cream cheese on crackers, but it's so thick in texture that it crumbles the crackers.

I most definitely do NOT recommend buying this product.
