text:
Excellent water. The bottles are made of sturdy, recyclable plastic. Other inferior brands sometimes use cheap thin plastic bottles that collapse as you try to remove the bottle cap.

I do NOT recommend purchasing this water from an online distributor, it's WAY OVERPRICED. Do yourself a favor & buy it at a different local store.

title: Stale, tasteless, dried out. Have a beverage nearby to wash it down as you 'attempt' to eat it.
text:
365 bagels are the WORST tasting, dryest bagels ever.

When Whole Foods delivered the bagels, I tried one, but I could only eat a few bites & then I threw it in the garage due to the dryness & terrible taste. The next morning, I toasted one for my breakfast & spread butter & preserves on it thinking they would offset the dryness & terrible taste... unfortunately, I took one bite & once again had to throw it in the garage.

These bagels are a total waste of money. I definitely do NOT recommend them.

title: Terrible quality and bad tasting water. I'll never purchase this brand of spring water again!
text:
The 365 brand of spring water tastes terrible, it's the worst tasting water that I've ever had the MISFORTUNE of buying!!!

The plastic bottles are so thin that when you remove the cap, the bottle collapses and water comes spilling out of the bottle all over your clothes.

The water is pricey, especially for the poor quality of the product. You can buy high quality, good tasting spring water in other grocery stores for much less money.

I definitely would NOT buy this brand of water again.

title: Poor quality product that was mouldy.
text:
When Whole Foods delivered these Bell peppers to my house, many of the peppers were spoiled and mouldy. I never had the chance to taste them, they went straight into the garage.

I definitely would NOT buy them again.

title: Mouldy green beans with lots of stems.
text:
This item 'might' be a good bargain if it was a quality food product; however, when Whole Foods delivered the green beans to my house, they were past the expiration date and they were mouldy and slimy. Also, the package contained a lot of stems.

I definitely would NOT buy this item again.

title: Terrible quality!!!
text:
I'll never buy this brand of ice cream again.

It lacks flavor. It's way overpriced for the poor quality of the product. Terrible texture, not creamy at all.

Also, when Whole Foods delivered the ice cream to my house, the ice cream was so melted that it was oozing from the carton.

I definitely do NOT recommend buying this product.

title: Stale and tasteless
text:
These are by far the worst hamburger buns that I've ever had the MISFORTUNE of buying. They were stale, tasteless and over-priced for the poor quality of the product.

I absolutely do NOT recommend this product.

title: Flavorless milk
text:
This milk is terrible. It's flavorless and has a watered-down consistency and appearance.

It had a very short expiration date, and the milk turned sour within three days of the delivery.

I definitely DO NOT recommend.

title: Really good product.
text:
Very good product. The flavor is excellent and the texture is smooth and creamy.

However, the boxes arrived dirty and crushed. I recommend purchasing the pudding at your local grocery store.

title: Great cucumbers.
text: Very good cucumbers. However, an inferior substitute was delivered to me this time,  and no refund was offered.

title: Terrible, flavorless ice cream. Way overpriced for an inferior product.
text:
This brand of ice cream is terrible. It has zero flavor and the ice cream has a gray color, instead of a pink strawberry color.

The product was so melted when it arrived that it was oozing out of the carton.

I DO NOT recommend this brand, and I don't recommend buying ice cream online.

title: Wilted and too close to the expiration date.
text:
The lettuce arrived wilted and was too close to the expiration date.

By the next day, the lettuce was so wilted and slimy that I had to throw it in the garage.

I DO NOT recommend this brand of lettuce.

title: Chips were burnt, flat and definitely NOT the kettle cooked variety.
text:
Chips were burnt and were definitely NOT the kettle cooked variety. They were flavorless, flat potato chips (not the kettle cooked variety). They had been overcooked to the point that they were burnt.

I had to throw them in the garage.

I DO NOT recommend.

title: No expiration date was listed on the carton.
text:
I definitely will NOT purchase this brand of eggs again. They arrived warm from sitting too long in a hot delivery vehicle. There was *NO EXPIRATION DATE* listed anywhere on the carton. I even used a lighted magnifying glass, but no date was listed on the outside nor on the inside of the carton. Also, the carton arrived damp and was too flimsy to sufficiently support the eggs.

I had to throw the eggs away since I didn't know if they would be safe to eat.

I definitely don't recommend this product brand.

title: Rotten and moldy. Totally uneditable.
text:
The item arrived rotten, slimy and moldy. It was totally uneditable.

I DO NO T recommend buying a jicama from Whole foods.

title: Tasteless and a waste of money.
text:
These are the worst tortilla chips that I've ever had. They were absolutely tasteless and we're not crunchy.

I definitely DO NOT recommend.

title: Dried out and tasteless.
text:
The bread was stale, dried out and tasteless. I tried to cut the bread with a sharp high-quality bread knife, but the bread was so hard, I had to throw it in the garage.

I definitely DO NOT recommend this product.

title: Excellent raisin bread.
text:
Excellent raisin bread, about a thousand times better than other brands of sliced raisin breads.

The large loaf arrived fresh, loaded with raisins, in perfect condition, and full of yummy flavor and sweet aroma.

I'll definitely continue to order this bread in the future. I highly recommend.

title: 20 carnations arrived with "ALL" of the flowers broken off at the top of the stems.
text:
I ordered 20 carnations and they arrived with "ALL" of the flowers broken off at the top of the stems. All of the carnations we're brown and dried out.

I can't believe such a disastrous mess was delivered to me. They were a total waste of my money and they had to be thrown into the garage.

title: HORRIBLE!!!!  TASTES AND SMELLS LIKE SOAP.
text:
DO "NOT" BUY JOLLY RANCHER WATERMELON HARD CANDY FROM THIS SUPPLIER. THE SHIPPING ENVELOPE AND THE CANDY SMELLS AND TASTES LIKE SOAP.

I'VE PURCHASED THIS SAME PRODUCT FROM SEVERAL OTHER AMAZON SUPPLIERS IN THE PAST AND THE CANDY WAS VERY GOOD; HOWEVER, THE BAG OF CANDY FROM THIS SUPPLIER IS HORRIBLE.

title: Absolutely Delicious!!!
text:
In the past, I purchased a different brand of spicy chicken sausage from Whole Foods; however, that brand wasn't available this time. I'm happy that I tried the BILINSKI Organic Spicy Italian sausage because I think it's of a much HIGHER QUALITY than the other brand that I had been buying.

The other brand has a tough casing over the sausage which is rather discussing to chew, so I always removed the casing before I cooked them. Often, I found pieces of bone and chunks of gristle in the other brand.

Whereas, the BILINSKI brand doesn't have a casing and there weren't any surprises of any unwanted bone or gristle.

There's a lot of flavor in the BILINSKI sausage and just the right combination of spices that make these sausages absolutely delicious. I highly recommend the BILINSKI brand.

Thank you, BILINSKI, for manufacturing such an excellent product.

title: Exceedingly high quality and great taste. Grown and processed in the USA.
text:
I've purchased several different brands of ground beef from Whole Foods in the past, and most times I was disappointed with the quality even though the purchase price was quite high.

Once I started purchasing the COUNTRY NATURAL 90/10 pasture-raised ground beef, I'll never purchase any other brand.

This product is CONSTANTLY of excellent quality at a very reasonable price. The meat is grown and processed in the USA.

I definitely recommend this brand over any other brands that Whole Foods sells.

title: Rotten, mushy & disgusting.  The Whole Foods shopper needs training.
text:
I've purchased aloe vera leaves from Whole Foods in the past and they were perfect, they were fresh and slightly firm. The one that I received today was MUSHY, ROTTEN AND HAD A STRONG OFFENSIVE ODOR.

EVIDENTLY, the shopper who selected the leaf for my order knows absolutely nothing about what an aloe vera leaf should look like or smell like.

title: Tiny size, not a good value.
text:
This Velveeta cheese is only a tiny 8 ounces. It is definitely NOT a good value.

I do not recommend and I won't purchase again.

Save your money and buy it at the grocery store.

title: Wow! Excellent product, great value and fast delivery.
text:
I'm totally impressed with the level of service for this product. I purchased it on Amazon, but it shipped from Sam's Club. Good job Sam's Club!

This value pack of Heinz products is indeed a great value.

The products were packed very well within the shipping box and the delivery was MUCH FASTER than I had anticipated.

The condiments have a very long expiration date and they come in a handy tote container that's very convenient to take along on picnics or for outdoor family get-together events.

I highly recommend.

title: Lacks flavor and has a very short expiration date.
text:
DON'T BUY THIS BRAND. This New England coffee has a VERY SHORT expiration date.

New England french vanilla ground coffee USED TO BE MY FAVORITE; however, the quality of their product has definitely gone downhill very quickly.

I do NOT recommend. Save your money and purchase a different brand.

title: Wonderful treat!
text: The chocolate was fresh, creamy and absolutely delicious! I definitely recommend this brand.

title: No flavor.
text: I was disappointed, this bread lacks flavor.

title: Fantastic flavor! Fresh product and competitively priced.
text:
I love the flavor of watermelon and these Jolly Rancher candies have a true natural watermelon flavor, there's nothing artificial tasting about the product.

I've tried several other brands of watermelon hard candy, but Jolly Rancher is by far the best.

I definitely recommend this brand. The pricing is quite fair and it's a great bargain for a great product.

title: The World's Worst
text:
These gummies are the "World's Worst". They're flavorless and they all taste like the same bad flavor, they arrived melted together and they're coated with a terrible tasting oil.

I absolutely DO NOT recommend this brand.

Save your money and purchase a different brand.

title: Tasteless pizza, except for the sickening sweet fig sauce.
text:
This "Italian" cheeseboard pizza doesn't tastes like anything you would ever eat in Italy. It tastes as though very low quality cheeses were used in this product and the fig sauce is sickening sweet. The creamy white sauce that's under the top layer of cheese tastes like watered-down unflavored ricotta cheese that remains liquidy even after the pizza is baked and the top cheeses are browned.

The price is rather high for such a small pizza. If you plan to serve this pizza to more than one person, then plan on making a salad to go with it or you'll go away hungry.

I am not one to write negative reviews but this item was truly awful-tasting.

title: Dry and tasteless, except for one stick that was heavily coated in ground black pepper.
text:
I enjoy good mozzarella cheese sticks; however, I found that the WFM brand is dry and tasteless. I made sure that I followed the baking instructions that are listed on the box, but the cheese sticks just weren't good. The cheese was rubbery and one of the cheese sticks had so much ground black pepper on it that it burned my tongue and made me start to cough. Where's the quality control for product consistency? Also, there wasn't any marinara dipping sauce included in the box.

Do yourself a favor and buy a different brand.

title: Wow, what a fantastic price for such high quality bay leaves.
text:
I highly recommend this product.

When I received my order, I was amazed at the high quality of the product. Every bay leaf included in the container was whole and the leaves were of a nice large size and all of them were without any blemishes on the leaves. Many other brands include small broken pieces with their products that look as though bugs were chewing on the leaves. That definitely wasn't the case with McCormick's brand.

When I opened the container a wonderful fresh aromatic fragrance of the bay leaves greeted me and when I used them in my recipes, I was not disappointed with the exceptional flavor that they added to my favorite dishes.

Try them, you won't be disappointed.

title: Pure vanilla all natural extract, not vanilla flavoring. Reasonably priced.
text:
Shopping for vanilla extract can be a bit confusing with so many different brands made available. I'm sure you can appreciate how expensive it is and how many products are offered both online and in the grocery stores; however, many options are only vanilla flavoring and not pure vanilla. McCormick's brand is pure all natural vanilla and it is priced very reasonably.

When shopping for pure vanilla extract, take a minute to read the ingredients on the label; some brands claim to be pure vanilla, but the first ingredients listed on their package has cane sugar and water listed as their main ingredients. McCormick's lists vanilla as their main ingredient. I've tried several other brands, but McCormick's is the best.

I highly recommend.

title: YUMMY!!! One word says it all. 😊
text:
The bakers at Bauducco certainly know how to create absolutely delicious Panettones. I've tried several other brands, but Bauducco far exceeds the other brands in quality, freshness and taste. Their Panettones are better than homemade.

I highly recommend.

title: Great price for a fantastic product!
text:
Herb Ox sodium-free bouillon is the best bouillon product on the market. I add it to a lot of the recipes that I prepare for an extra level of richness and 'healthy' goodness. I add it to stews, soups, spaghetti sauce, gravy, mashed potatoes, rice, meats, seafood, poultry, quiche, eggs and more. It never overpowers the other flavors in a recipe, it just enhances the flavors without the added salt.

The price for the 100 packets of bouillon is extremely reasonable, plus a set of high-quality measuring spoons is also included free of charge.

I highly recommend this product. I've been using Hormel Herb Ox bouillon for many, many years and it's consistently of the highest quality. I'll never use any other brand.

title: You're going to love these Jordan Almonds! Yummy!
text:
These Sohnrey Jordan Almonds are fresh, great tasting, and are a fantastic value for a generous 24-ounces of the product. The outer shell is nice and crunchy; however, the consistency of the shell still allows you the option of bitting into the almond without breaking a tooth. In addition, they were shipped to me very promptly.

I've purchased several other brands of Jordan Almonds from Amazon and other stores, but the Sohnrey brand is by far the best. I highly recommend. You won't be disappointed.

title: Terrible product, greasy and tasteless. 365 brand thin crust pizza is much better and costs less.
text: Very poor quality product. The flatbread was greasy and the crust was hard and tasteless. I took one bite and threw the rest in the garbage. 365 thin crust pizza is much better and costs less.

title: Very poor quality product with greasy, grissly meat on the flatbread. One bite made me ill.
text: Terrible product, I took one bite and it made me ill, I threw the rest of the flatbread in the garbage. Very greasy, poor  quality, grissly meat on the flatbread and the taste was disgusting.  Do yourself a favor and buy a different brand.

title: The best lemon pepper seasoning on the market. I highly recommend.
text: Wow, this lemon pepper seasoning adds so much flavor to soup, chicken, fish, pork, stir-fry, stews, salad dressings and many other recipes. I've tried several other similar products; however, none are as good as McCormick's lemon pepper seasoning. Some of the other brands are powdery and have a strong unpleasant artificial bitter taste, but McCormick's lemon pepper is a much higher quality. The seasoning enhances the flavors of the recipes without being overpowering; it's consistently the best lemon pepper seasoning product on the market.

title: Don't purchase, the cucumbers rot very quickly and don't have much flavor.
text: I've purchased these cucumbers several times from Whole Foods and have found that I needed to eat them within one or two days; otherwise, they start to rot very quickly. The cucumbers don't have much flavor and are expensive when compared to the pricing in other stores.

title: Flavorful and really good
text: Flavorful chicken stock and a good value for the money. The stock was tasty enough on its own without adding extra ingredients; I cooked some noodles and enjoyed a delicious bowl of soup.

title: Tasty and fresh.
text: Fresh, flavorful, a nice blend of fruit and nuts and a good value for the money.

title: The best grapes that I've eaten in the past several years.
text: Very flavorful grapes, the best store bought grapes that I've eaten for the past several years. The container that the grapes come in protects the quality of the grapes and prevents them from becoming bruised or damaged. The grapes are ripe and of a firm texture. I highly recommend this product.

title: Good quality product.
text:
Jeff's pepperocini products are a fairly good product at a reasonable price; however, they lack enough taste.

Jeff's mild banana pepper rings are beyond fantastic. I highly recommend that you try Jeff's mild banana pepper rings...they are very flavorful and are excellent in a salad, in scrambled eggs, on a sandwich or on pizza.

title: Don't buy.
text: Whoa!!! Bad, bad, bad product with weird flavors.

title: Delicious!!!
text: These grapes are absolutely delicious! Very flavorful, fresh and of high quality. Great value for the money.

title: Sometimes the bananas are good and other times they're of poor quality.
text: The bananas are only good about half of the time. Whole Foods needs to drastically improve upon the quality of their produce.

title: Fairly good for store bought pizza.
text: Fairly good for store bought pizza. I'd buy it again.

title: Ready to use and fresh
text: High quality, fresh and lots of flavor. It's great that the shallots are peeled and ready to use in your recipe.

title: Fresh and flavorful.
text: Great value for the money. Fresh and high quality with lots of flavor.

title: Flavorless and spoils quickly.
text: Save your money and buy a different brand. Daisy sour cream is flavorless and spoils before the printed expiration date on the carton.

title: Shop at a different grocery store for your produce.
text: Bruised apples that spoiled within two days and had to be thrown away. Whole Foods has very poor quality produce and it gets consistently worse with every order that I place. It's time for me to shop at a different grocery store.

title: ROTTEN, ROTTEN, ROTTEN!!!
text: More than half the times that I buy onions from Whole Foods, they are consistently rotten. On my last order, I requested white sweet onions and received yellow rotten ones.

title: Really good product.
text: Really good product. It has lots of flavor and is of high quality. I definitely recommend.

title: Flavorless and stale.
text: Stale and flavorless...save your money and buy a different brand.

title: Yummy!!!
text: All I can say is yum, yum, yum! These buns are absolutely delicious for hamburgers, sandwiches or eating without anything extra added. I highly recommend, you won't be disappointed.

title: Past expiration date
text: Product was past the expiration date when I received it. I do not recommend buying it.

title: High quality
text: McCormick products never disappoint me, they are consistently fresh, flavorful and of high quality at a reasonable price.

title: I became extremely ill within minutes of eating this product.
text: I became extremely ill within minutes of eating this product. There is NOT a safety seal on the product. The flavor tasted like the pistachios were rancid and as though the gelato had been thawed and refrozen. The color of the gelato was grayish green instead of pale green.

title: As good as homemade pizzelles without any of the work.
text: As good as homemade pizzelles without any of the work. The pizzelles are fresh, crisp and have a delicate, delicious vanilla flavor. The easily accessible reclosable packing container keeps the pizzelles from breaking apart. Fantastic value for the money.

title: Once you try these, they will quickly become your favorite banana peppers.
text: The best tasting banana peppers that I've ever had. The flavor and quality of the product deserves to be rated as 10-stars.

title: High quality milk at a great price.
text: Comparable to more expensive name brand milk. Has a long expiration date.

title: Becomes very stale within a day or two.
text: Bread becomes hard, stale and developes an unpleasant taste within a day or two.

title: Multiple countries of origin.
text: After reading where the cashews originate from, I'll never buy a Planters product again.

title: INACCURATE WEBSITE DESCRIPTION.
text: The website reflects that these tomatoes were grown in the USA; HOWEVER, the five containers of tomatoes that I received today (with my online Amazon Whole Foods order) were grown in MEXICO.

title: Terrible product
text: I bought two half-gallons of this buttermilk on two different occasions and both unopened bottles spoiled before the expiration date.  I do not recommend this product, other brands are much better.

title: Fantastic product, fantastic price.
text:
Super bargain! High quality product. The honey is from the USA and Canada. It's a large quantity for the price, about half the price of comparable brands.

I highly recommend.

title: Total waste of money!
text:
This French bread was so dried out and hard that it could be used to pound a nail into wood.

I couldn't cut it with a knife and I couldn't break off a piece. I threw it in the trash. It was a total waste of money!

title: ABSOLUTELY TERRIBLE EGG ROLLS
text:
Save your money and buy a different brand.

The egg rolls were tough and chewy, and the filling was a disgusting mix of mostly edamames, garlic and a strong onion flavor. There wasn't even a dipping sauce included, which might have masked or perhaps improved upon the terrible taste of the egg rolls.

The absolute worst egg roll I've ever tasted. I ended up throwing them in the garbage.

title: Great product.  Great price.
text:
New England brand coffee is my favorite, I especially enjoy the French Vanilla flavor.

I've purchased lots and lots and lots of various brands of coffee in the past, but none were as consistently good, cup after cup, like New England brand is.

I highly recommend.

title: Yogurt that's beyond scrumptious!!!
text:
Do yourself a favor and try Icelandic's yogurts. Oh my gosh, yogurt just doesn't get any better than this!

Thanks, Icelandic, for producing such a creamy delight for your customers' tastebuds.

title: Don't buy this product.
text:
Terrible flavor and the consistency was gritty and sickening. I put them in the trash.

I will NOT purchase anything from this company in the future, and I definitely would not recommend them to anyone I know.

title: Nice candy
text: These tara Carmels are great

title: one minute in microwave taste good
text: Easy good taste great one minute in the microwave

title: What is sweeter than honey?
text: Pure sweetness.  It's a little bit gooey, but once you get it on your toast, waffle, biscuit, etc. it stays in place and doesn't drip or run, which is the main advantage of this spun honey.  Yummy!

title: Not Happy
text: My tummy was not happy after eating this cranberry & nuts trail mix.  Not sure what else to say except that I won't be buying it again.

title: Yum yum yum!
text: If you've got a sweet tooth, and you like bananas, you'll probably like these.  To me a perfect combination of sweet, gooey, and with a slight crunch texture from the tiny banana chips.  The bars are kind of small, so don't be surprised if you "need" to eat 2 or 3 of them at a time!

title: OK, but quality is inconsistent
text: These peanuts used to be good, but based on the last two bags I've ordered, the quality has declined.  The taste has been "off" - stale and old - including a few rancid peanuts.  They are a good value, but quality is inconsistent.

title: Help Wanted:  Product Expiration Specialist
text: Order received date 2021-09-20.  Product "Use By" date 2021-07-27.  With ingredients like heavy cream and butter with no preservatives, I wouldn't eat this after the product has expired.  Why would Amazon ship a food product to me just so that I could throw it away?  Seems rather wasteful.  Perhaps some process improvement is indicated to check the expiration date of products before shipping to customers.  Yes, I got a refund, but still.  I have had these caramels before, and they are good.

title: Good for small cup size - could be stronger
text:
This review is for the Dark/Medium varieties (French Roast, Dark Roast, and Colombian). The flavors are all distinct for these three, and all are pretty good, but they are all somewhat weak for my tastes. My brewer supports 4oz, 8oz or 10oz brews. For an 8oz brew, only the French Roast is strong enough to be reasonably flavorful. For Dark Roast or Colombian, a small 4oz brew is required to get a full flavor (akin to brewed retail Starbucks coffee). And that means for an 8oz cup of flavorful coffee, you'd need to use 2 K-Cups in 2 4oz brews, which is kind of wasteful.

The coffee is good quality, but when it's brewed in a Keurig, it doesn't saturate the ground coffee well enough and long enough to extract all the flavor that's there. As a test I opened up one of the unused Dark Roast cups, transferred the coffee out into a paper cone filter, and used a manual pour-over method to make a 6oz cup of coffee. It was very good, with some nice flavor notes I didn't taste in the brewed K-cup. So in summary, I'd say the coffee is good. But when brewed as a K-cup, it's just not as good as it could be. Ah, the compromises of convenience!

title: No Longer "Yellowfin" but "Solid Light"
text: I've been a regular purchaser of Starkist Selects Yellowfin tuna in EVOO for several months using Subscribe and Save for this product listing.  But this last time I received a different Starkist product, not Selects, not Yellowfin, but "Solid Light" tuna in EVOO.  Both me and my cat are disappointed.  It is not the same product.

title: Watch out for the brown ones
text: These peanuts are a good value, but watch out for the brown ones.  They are rancid and taste and smell like vinegar.  I find them in about 1 out of 5 bags.  If you bite into one, you'll know it right away.  Visually inspect the peanuts in your hand first before eating them.

title: Below average quality
text: The quality of "chunk light" tuna has gone down over the years.  Among the major brands, Starkist canned chunk light seems the worst.  In my purchase, I found little to no chunks.  The tuna looked minced and was possibly blended in a Tuna-O-Matic '76.  I found small bones, black parts, and white circular bones / scales.  The color was pinkish-tan and didn't smell too fresh, perhaps akin to what Sheriff Brody was slinging off the back of the Orca.  Purchased in 2020, the exp. date on these cans was Oct 2023.  An older Starkist can I'd had in the pantry of the same product with earlier exp. date (2021) was better quality.  Maybe I just got a low quality batch in this purchase, but based on many other reviews, this may be a trend that newer batches are of lower quality.

title: A Lightly Salted Not Sweet Snack
text: If you know what to expect, these are a pretty good.  I've had fried plantains before, so I was expecting these to be at least somewhat sweet, but they are not sweet at all.  The taste and texture are similar to Lay's potato chips.  These are less greasy and a bit drier.  Arrived fresh and crispy.  They're different but pretty good.

title: Not As Good As They Used To Be
text: If you like today's Chupa Chups, this is a decent selection of the regular-sized pops:  Strawberry, Choco-Vanilla, Orange, Lemon-Lime (Gatorade-flavor), Strawberry-Cream, and a couple of Apple and Cola.  I used to like Chupa Chups, but not anynore.  Like so many products, the formulas and flavorings seemed to have changed over the years.  The fruit flavors now have an artificial floral perfume taste, not very good.

title: Way too salty!
text:
Very salty, in powdery form, most of which has been absorbed in the raisins.
Inedible unless you pick out the raisins first. Seems like much more sodium (sea salt) than the 35mg per 1/4 cup listed on the ingredients. Maybe a bad batch.

title: Good strong coffee best using pour-over brewer
text: This coffee is ground very fine, and it produces a weak cup of coffee with most automatic drip coffee makers.  However, using a basic pour-over brewing technique, the resulting coffee is good - bold but smooth.  Just pour over small amounts of just-below-boiling-temperature water (2 oz or so at a time) until the water has passed completely through the filter.

title: Consistency Problem - Doesn't taste like Samples
text: I bought a 48 count of the Martinson House Blend after trying and liking the taste of the 3 count Martinson House Blend samples.  The taste of the samples however were much different and much better than the 48 count product I received.  The samples (from November, 2012 I believe) had a nice mellow flavor and a smooth finish.  The 48 count product I bought (stamped with "BB/MA 2013 DE 15 15:46") have no such flavor and the finish is bitter and alum-like.  I will likely throw away the rest.

title: Not Very Good
text: I've tried coffee from several of the new Keurig-compatible vendors.  The vendors and varieties I have most liked are San Francisco Bay (Fog Chaser), and Brown Gold (Peruvian).  However, I did not like the coffees of the Brooklyn Beans Variety Pack.  The K-Cups seemed to be airtight, and the expiration date on the box was 9 months in the future.  A few of the varieties were marginally drinkable, but I did not finish most of the cups I brewed.  Overall I would characterize the taste as old and stale with an aftertaste of cardboard.  I can't recommend this brand.

title: WAS One of the best new Keurig K-Cup compatible brands
text:
San Francisco Bay Coffee Fog Chaser is among my favorite new Keurig K-Cup compatible coffees. Many K-Cups fail to produce a cup of coffee of sufficient strength and quality that it actually takes like fresh-brewed coffee. This one does. It ranks up there with some of my long-time favorites such as Green Mountain Lake and Lodge and Caribou Mahogany, but at a much lower price. My only negative comment is that some residue will settle at the bottom of your cup - so just remember not to down that last swig!

UPDATE 4/26/2013
I purchased this item again in early April 2013 and I must say the quality and flavor of this coffee is not what it used to be. It is now a much weaker coffee without the full bodied flavor. The BEST BEFORE date is 20140307 on this latest order. Very disappointed and I will be switching back to the pricier Caribou Mahogany.

title: One of the best K-Cup varieties I've tried
text: Santa's Buzz is one of the best K-Cup varieties I've tried.  It's strong but not overpowering, well-balanced with a slightly nutty aroma and flavor.  Santa's Buzz has a truly "brewed" coffee taste, unlike some K-Cups that taste like instant coffee that's had hot water run through it.  This one is a winner.

title: Really delicious caramels
text: Highly recommend those caramels!

title: Great tasting honey
text: I enjoyed this honey. The package was also very nice done with an enclosed note and a magnet from the seller. I will definitely order again!

title: Best Caramel I’ve Ever Eaten (And I’ve Eaten a Lot)
text: Oh man. I’m honestly speechless. As a foodie, I bought Werthers Chewy Caramels and Tara’s salted caramels to compare. Let me be so clear when I say there is NO comparison between the two. Completely different levels of caramel. This caramel is everything that is good & right. It’s soft & chewy & delectable.  You can literally taste the ingredients. I could taste the butter and a hint of vanilla. I could taste the delicious caramel flavor. Just all in one, it’s incredible. I couldn’t so much taste any salt but I get that it’s personal preference. I like mine “extra salted” so I licked the top & sprinkled on some extra sea salt. Heaven. I will be buying many more tubs in the future. Everyone should try this caramel. It’s next level.

title: Versatile and attractive
text: I really like this set of tiny flameless votive candles.  They can be used in so many ways, but my favorite is nestled among the leaves of garland above the fireplace.  I also like them on the dining room table.  They are very well priced for the number you get (24), and though the candles are smaller than they look in the photo. they are a good value.  The only improvement I would make is to include a remote on/off switch, but then they would cost much more.  I do not know how long they last, as I just started to use them, but right now I highly recommend them.

title: Excellent product
text: This assortment of chocolates is beautifully boxed and makes an excellent gift presentation.  The chocolates are somewhat smaller than the usual candy assortment. The flavor is superior, a bit less sweet than the usual.  I consider this assortment more European than American.  The chocolate coating is thicker than I am used to, and the fillings are more solid.  The candy is extremely fresh.  The chocolate itself is not exactly bittersweet or dark, but the flavor is definitely more subtle than most American milk chocolate candy, though it looks like milk chocolate.  I really enjoyed this assortment and would recommend it to anyone who wants a beautiful gift or a box to pass around at a party.

title: Excellent vanilla; excellent price
text: First of all, this is not expensive Mexican vanilla for which you would pay forty dollars online.  But it is pretty darn good, and I say that as one who does a lot of baking and uses a lot of vanilla.  I was delighted to find Grandma's Choice (kudos to the marketing department for the name!), especially as you get 16 ounces for the price of four ounces in the grocery store.  The taste is excellent, and I think you would have to have a very advanced palate to tell the difference between this vanilla and the ultra expensive ones.  I will definitely get this vanilla again.  Highly recommended.

title: Excellent taste
text: I really like this vanilla, not only for the price, but for the superb taste.  Highly recommended.

title: A great caramel
text:
These are without a doubt the best caramels I have ever had. They are clearly not just a cut above, but several tiers above what most people think of as a caramel. They are smooth and soft, so if you prefer your caramels hard, you may want to refrigerate them. Though I am not a huge fan of caramel, I ate several of these.

The packaging is excellent as well--clear and attractive, and the jar could definitely be reused. Highly recommended without reservation!

title: Good, with some reservations
text:
If you like Starbucks coffee, you will really enjoy this selection of dark and medium roast coffees. Although a little pricey, this is a good selection of mild to full-flavored coffee blends. I think the key is whether you enjoy Starbucks flavors, which some in our family have found to be a little sharp. If I were buying this assortment, I would want to be aware that some of the flavors are bold, and if that is what you want, you will enjoy them. But if you are looking for a more donut-house flavor coffee, this is not it.

I priced this item in our local store, and the Amazon price is much more reasonable. But you can do even better price-wise with other brands in the supermarket when the k-cups go on sale.

title: A tasty treat
text:
These cashews arrived well packaged and easy to open. There are 14 little packets in the box, each containing a moderate serving of cashews. The nuts are mostly halves and pieces rather than whole cashews, and they are lightly salted. They are fresh tasting and delicious.

One thing I like about them is that they are packaged in individual bags, which means that the remaining cashews stay fresh longer. Also, you tend not to overeat when you have only a small packet. I do think the price is a little high, but the product is very good.

title: Excellent Assortment of Nuts
text: Happy Belly Deluxe Mixed Nuts is very appropriately named.  First, there are only tree nuts in this assortment:  Brazil nuts, cashews, almonds, pecans, and hazelnuts.  There are no peanuts at all, although the label does say that the package has been assembled in the vicinity of peanuts, so if you are highly allergic to even the hint of peanut, you may want to be cautious.  Second, the nuts are mixed, but have more almonds than anything else; the pecans are hardest to find.  The nuts are lightly salted and taste great. I was concerned that they may not be fresh, but my concerns was wasted.  They are fresh and crunchy. I used them at a graduation party and got great comments from everyone who tried them.  I was even asked, "Where did you get these nuts?"  I am happy to recommend Happy Belly!

title: Great coffee
text: I cannot say enough good things about this coffee.  It is delicious, and I wish it were available locally and at a slightly lower price.  However, I will continue to buy it through Amazon, as their delivery and packaging are superior.  Highly recommended.

title: Delicious Coffee
text: My husband and I enjoyed all six flavors of coffee in the Java Factory Variety Pack.  By far our favorite was Choconut, a blend of chocolate and coconut, but we also liked all the other varieties.  The only other flavored coffee was a French vanilla; the others were normal coffee flavor of varying strengths. All were smooth, with no bitter taste or post-coffee stomach upset.  We have used about half the box, and all have worked perfectly in our basic Keurig (NOT the Keruig 2.0).  My only issue is that the flavors are not evenly alloted; there are more of the "regular" coffee and fewer of the flavored coffees.  In fact, our favorite, Choconut, had the fewest of all.  But that was a minor problem.  We are still enjoying the coffee and recommend it without reservation.

title: Good taste; great bargain

title: Great product

title: Excellent tuna
text: I like canned tuna a great deal and always buy solid white, usually packed in water.  I decided to get this tuna and I was so happy with it that I ordered four more cans.  The tuna is packed in oil, and it looks great in the can--perfectly solid with no little flakes.  I decided to try it on greens with just a little fresh lemon and a few extra veggies, and a tiny bit of Hellman's mayo.  It was excellent.  I was going to make a regular tuna salad with onion and celery, salt, pepper, and mayo, but I decided I like the tuna flavor "straight."  I am delighted with this tuna and recommend it to anyone.  I will be buying this from now on, even though it is a bit more expensive than supermarket brands.  The quality is well worth the cost.

text: I found the medium roast to be amazing and the darker roasts were too acidic for me. The medium was very flavorful, fresh and smooth.

title: Taste good
text: Kids and adults think these taste good. Seem to be good quality treat with some added health benefits.

title: Tastes good
text: We have ground turkey tacos once a week and use taco seasoning and this worked well for them. Newmans is usually a quality product and this didn’t disappoint.

title: Good
text: Fun change from plain decaf coffee. Tastes good hot or iced.

title: Nice flavor
text: Nice flavor with a little bit of caffeine. Some of the can's came a bit smashed up but didn't prevent me from using them.

title: Works great
text: Seems to work great and be high quality. Easy to take. Helps with energy.

title: Deluxe chips ahoy
text: These are like fancy chips ahoy. They are crunchy cookies but have a rich buttery, vanilla, chocolate flavor. My kids liked them too. There were some broken but not too bad and the pieces still tasted good.

title: Artificial colors
text: Really disappointed this has artificial colors in it. Even Kraft doesn’t use them anymore. The taste is great though and will make good max and cheese or taste great on popcorn.

title: Great tasting
text: These cookies taste really great and I am looking forward to having them as a treat in the road or on a hike. They are soft and flavorful and have great texture. Took off a star because serving size is half a cookie which is barely anything. The nutritional value should be based on a whole cookie. Other than that they seem high quality and would make a nice gift to someone with food allergies or sensitivities.

title: Seem good
text: We go through a lot of food coloring with the kids crafts, Easter and baking so these will come in handy. Seem to be good quality.

title: Good
text: Recently discovered blueberry flavored coffee at our local donut shop and purchased Maud’s brand kcups from Amazon. I’d say this one is almost just as good and has a more lighter blueberry flavor than the mauds. Overall a good cup of coffee.

title: Fresh
text: This is a great assorted mix of small dried fruit. Every fruit in it tastes great. Flavorful and fresh and great for snacking or adding to stuff.

title: Good
text: These are a decent keto protein bar. I prefer a less sweet bar, but this one is still good and tastes like a treat.

title: Really good
text: I am a huge fan of ginger. I already have these in my pantry in the plain ginger flavor without lemon and love them and was a bit nervous about adding anything to the ginger flavor but the lemon is a great compliment and it goes well together. I probably like it just as much as the original and a fun change from the original. Great texture and satisfying to suck on.

title: Great
text: I don’t have an almond cow machine but use shredded coconut on top of yogurt, smoothies and oatmeal and also in baking. This smells and tastes fresh. Large bag.

title: Great tea
text: Great green tea. I normally have a cup of green tea every morning. Sometimes matcha sometimes the green tea bags from Costco. This seems like a quality one and nice to change up from what I normally have.

title: Spicy
text: This is some spicy salt. It is really flavorful from the chili’s in it, but you only need a little to add some heat.

title: Fun to try
text: My favorite is the exotic mix. Reminds me of Tarra chips. The beet chips are the best part of it. So flavorful. The puffs are just ok to me. Nothing special. And the cassava chips are good too, like a hardy potato chip.

title: Great for dry rub
text: Great for bbq dry rubs and other recipes. Well known brand.

title: Great flavor
text: Great cheesy flavor that tastes like a better quality Kraft cheese flavor. The pasta is thick and hearty and really fills you up. I cooked it for longer than suggested so it was softer. Got two big portions out of it that I ate for lunch a couple days. It reheated well the next day and almost tasted better the next day. Seems like a high quality keto product.

title: Great
text: I’ve only had white stevia so was surprised when I received this, I like that it is more pure and seems to work just the same.

title: Taste good
text: These are crispy, buttery and great tasting cookies. They are fresh and flavorful. Taste good with a cup of coffee. The nuts are very subtle but add good flavor and extra crunch.

title: Great
text: We make a lot of smoothies and this is great to have on hand. Normally buy the frozen wild blueberries from Trader Joe’s but this seems just as good and flavorful. Easy for kids to use as well and add to their smoothies.

title: Great
text: Perfect timing to try these during summer. All my kids loved them and they are just as good as you would expect if you have had the original ones.

title: Really good
text: This tea is really good. I got it mostly to make ice tea and it made the best ice tea. Flavorful and sweet without any sweetener. Reminds me of teavanna teas. The loose tea is really pretty too with the blue flowers in it.

title: Taste great
text: Great substitute for wheat pasta. Great texture.

title: Fun and great tasting
text: Everyone in the family enjoyed using the special tool included to open the nuts and everyone also loved the flavor of these. The nuts are very fresh and have the best flavor, like a sugar cookie and caramel flavor. Would make a fun gift or addition to a gift basket.

title: Tastes good
text: This chili tastes as good as you would want and expect a canned chili to taste. It’s a little salty and rich to eat the whole can in one sitting and probably best eating with something else like a chili dog or baked potato. Can’t tell it’s not real meat.

title: Really good
text: These are great snacks to take on the go. My 6 yr old loves them. They taste like a watermelon fruit leather. They are really sweet and flavorful. I almost wish there was a bit of a tartness to them like some lemon juice to mellow out the sweetness, but they are still great as is and I love that they are just a single ingredient.

title: Quality brand
text: I love bob’s red mill products and these items seem high quality as well.

title: Flavorful
text: My 13 yr old loves ramen and trying new foods. We used google lens to translate the directions on the package. We made as instructed and added a halved soft boiled egg on top and he really liked it. The broth is really flavorful and tastes like a restaurant to me. Quick and easy to make.

title: These are great!
text: These smell great. I like the taste and they work well to bake with.

title: Tastes good
text: This cold brew has a great flavor. Not sure why it has added natural flavor as the other ingredient to coffee though. It has a bit of a chocolate taste so maybe that’s what was added. It tastes great mixed with almond milk and ice. I’m sensitive to caffeine and found it really woke me up and made me a bit jittery so I diluted it with water and it still tasted great.

title: Great lentils
text: Great lentils. Work great in soups, curry and chili. Would recommend.

title: Great
text: Great salt. Perfect for cooking. Seems to be good quality.

title: Great
text: Great ginger powder. I love ginger and this is convenient since I don’t have fresh on hand usually. It smells and tastes fresh and flavorful.

title: Soft cookie
text: These cookies are more a the soft variety. They have great chocolate chip cookie flavor and are good when you need something sweet.

title: Very good
text: I added about half a teaspoon to a small mug of warm oat milk and it was delicious. I also added a tiny bit of agave syrup but I think it’s good without it too. I love the warm spices and it tastes almost like egg nog to me. Very comforting. Going to try it before bed.

title: Tastes great
text: This tastes better than I expected. Great pistachio flavor that is really flavorful and doesn’t even need salt. It is smooth and creamy. Not sure how to use it yet other than eating it by the spoonful, but it would probably be great on toast or with sliced apples.

title: Really good
text: I drink green tea every morning and really like this one. I normally get the green tea bags from Costco and that has a bit of matcha in it and a more earthy taste. This is a really smooth but flavorful cup of green tea. No bitterness. Really enjoying this one

title: Great
text: This is great quality pasta that definitely tastes better than the cheap stuff at the store. Everybody enjoyed it.

title: Excellent pasta
text: We eat spaghetti about once a week and this was definitely a treat. Really tastes like quality pasta. Would recommend. My kids enjoyed it too.

title: Fun
text: This is a fun box of sour candies. The gummy eggs were a favorite, thought they would be like jelly beans but they are like a candy coated gummy. They are pretty addicting. Perfect for summer and taking to the beach and pool or movies.

title: They are skittles lol
text: If you haven’t had skittles you should try them. For all others that have these are what you would expect. No complaints. Used them to make candy leis for graduation. Snacked on some as well and they were great.

title: Great set
text: This is a nice set. A couple cookies broke in shopping but still plenty to decorate. Kids will enjoy decorating.

title: Pretty good
text: These are better than I expected. They remind me of the sour cream and cheese ruffles with a subtle bacon flavor. I could do without the bacon flavor, but if you like bacon it isn’t overpowering. The chips are crunchy and satisfying if you need a salty snack.

title: Great
text: I love bars like these to grab and throw in my purse or backpack. These taste great and seem to be high quality. They remind me of a more firm Lara bar. The coconut is my favorite.

title: Great kit
text: This is a great kit and was happy to see how well it came packaged with no broken cookies and ready to go for a fun cookie decorating party. Comes with so many fun frostings and sprinkles. Looking forward to using at our next party.

title: Great
text: Great gummy Candy! Flavorful, soft and chewy. I love that they have no artificial colors. Makes a great gift as well.

title: Kids enjoyed this
text: My kids love food challenges, sour candy and spicy food so this is perfect for them. They mostly just wanted to try each Candy than play the game. Great quality candies.

title: Tastes great
text: We use a lot of lime juice in sparkling water and cooking and this is perfect for those uses. Great flavor and tastes fresh.

title: Tastes great
text: We use a lot of lemon juice to add to sparkling water, baking, and cooking. This has a great lemon flavor.

title: Good quality
text: This is a good quality light roast. Tastes fresh, flavorful and smooth.

title: Great
text: Great tasting whole raw almonds. Filling and nutritious.

title: Great quality
text: This is great quality cocoa. I have tried several King Arthur products and they are always great quality. This smells amazingly fresh and flavorful.

title: Tastes good
text: This is a great tasting granola. Only downside for me is I have a sensitive stomach and I think the inulin used to sweeten it bothers my stomach. Would prefer stevia or monk fruit.

title: Crunchy
text: These are good and crunchy and go well with tea. I like the almonds and raisins in them but wish the cookie itself had some almond or anise flavor.

title: Great
text: Great molasses but leaked during shipping.

title: Great wing sauce
text: Great wing sauce. Slightly different than the franks we usually get, a bit spicier but was a nice change.

title: Great sauce
text: We use a lot of pasta sauce. This one tastes great and does the job. Looking forward to making a big lasagna or baked ziti with it.

title: Seems to be great quality
text: I plan on using this to make peanut butter balls with peanut butter, dried milk and honey. Great protein snack.

title: Great
text: These are great! I don’t miss the gluten. Crunchy, fresh and flavorful. Would recommend.

title: Great
text: Great quality vanilla beans. I plan on using these for making homemade vanilla ice cream and vanilla extract. The smell amazing and seem to be great quality.

title: Excellent
text: This is the best decaf I have had. Great flavor and quality. Would highly recommend.

title: Great flavor
text: I’ve used this with beef, chicken, fish and veggies. Works great for all of these. Nice flavor that helps give a nice kick to you meat or vegetables.

title: Tastes great
text: I drink green tea every morning. I normally use the green tea bags from Costco. These seems great as well.

title: Great bread flour
text: Great bread flour. Makes great breadsticks and pizza dough. Looking forward to trying it with bagels and soft pretzels as well.

title: Strong coffee
text: This makes a strong, flavorful cup of coffee.

title: Makes great tea
text: I’ve been having a matcha oat milk latte everyday and it really helps me feel good. Nice boost in energy and mood without the jitters. I use about 1/2tsp and add some hot water and wisk it with an electric frother, then fill up the rest of the way with hot water, a bit of honey, and about the same amount of oat milk as you would use in coffee, stir and enjoy. Also taste great iced.

title: Excellent
text: I almost made the mistake of tossing this after tasting a bit straight from the package and finding it had almost no flavor. I decided to try mixing it with some sour cream and water and let it sit for a bit and it got the most amazing horseradish flavor with a good amount of heat which I like. It needs a few minutes to sit and develop flavor. This is so convenient for keeping in the pantry to make horseradish sauce or adding to recipes like potato salad or coleslaw. I think you can also use this as wasabi. Fresh Horseradish is expensive and sometimes hard to find and jarred has way more ingredients than I need in it and not always the healthiest. Would recommend!

title: Best jarred salsa
text: This is probably the best jarred salsa I’ve tried. It tastes really fresh and flavorful. The heat level is perfect for a hot salsa. Spicy but not so spicy you can’t enjoy it. We ate it with tortilla chips and put it on top of nachos and taco salad and it’s tasted great each way. One of the jars looks a little banged up and the safety button on the lid had popped up so unfortunately I had to throw it away. But the salsa definitely deserves 5 stars. Would recommend!

title: Great
text:
Used these to make a quick version of pad Thai and they worked great. I mixed a sauce of 3tbsp soy sauce,
2 tbsp sweetener (honey, maple syrup, brown sugar…I used agave), 2 tbsp rice vinegar, 2 tbsp peanut butter, 1 tsp siracha (or more if you want it spicier). Boil pot of water then add noodles and boil for 4 minutes stirring to separate. Drain noodles. In a skillet sauté with some olive oil half an onion sliced with 2 cloves minced garlic. Move onions to the side and crack and egg and scramble. Once eggs are cooked add noodles and sauce to pan and mix up for a few minutes to heat sauce. Top with chopped peanuts and cilantro. Looking forward to adding to chicken soup and making other meals with these. They seem like great quality.

title: Tastes good
text: I had never heard of green tea being beneficial for allergies. I don’t have bad allergies so not sure how much it helped, but it tastes like good quality green tea. Almost similar to the one they sell at Costco that has leaves and matcha powder in the tea bag.

title: Quality
text: These are great quality and flavorful seasonings. They all smell great. So far I’ve just used the garlic lovers on some air fried chicken to go on top of Cesar salad and it came out great. Looking forward to trying the others.

title: Tastes good
text: This tea tastes good. I was worried about how it would taste but I really like it. It tastes like a cross between a green and black tea. Seems really beneficial if It is fermented and contains good bacteria for your gut.

title: Excellent
text: We usually always have a jar of Nutella for crepes. I prefer this over Nutella though. Has a richer chocolate flavor and a thicker slightly grainy consistency. Also tastes great spread on a banana. Would recommend!

title: Tastes great
text: We eat a lot of homemade popcorn. This popcorn tastes great and fresh. We cook it in coconut oil from Costco then sprinkle with pink salt and nutritional yeast. So good! Great satisfying snack!

title: Tart and really good
text: These are really flavorful and tart candies. The kids and I both really liked them. All the flavors are good. They seem like great quality too.

title: Smells and tastes great
text: Great seasoning blend. Seems fresh and flavorful. Looking forward to grilling chicken with it.

title: Taste good
text: I received a package of the crispy chocolate flowers and they taste great if you like crispy rice in your chocolate. I prefer just the plain solid chocolate but this is also a fun change. Kids love the white chocolate one the most.

title: Great gift
text: This is a really fun gift box. It comes perfectly packed with a wide variety of yummy snacks from turkey. My kids 6,10,13 were all very excited to look through this and pick something to try. They chose the popping candy, a chocolate wafer bar, and a chocolate bar with hazelnuts. They all tasted great and extremely fresh. The item list included has great descriptions of each item and the kids enjoyed looking at it as well. The chocolate is way better than most American chocolate candy. There are sweet and savory snacks so something for everyone. They come in a tiny box that holds way more than I imagined.

title: Lots of packaging
text: This product has a lot of packaging for what it is. Seems like more of a novelty item. The coffee is good. The instructions are not in English.

title: Tastes good
text: This is a great tasting electrolyte drink mix. Easy to mix and tastes good. Has good quality ingredients. I alternate this with other electrolyte mixes I have during the week.

title: Healthy snack
text: Great healthy snack for kids and adults. Great clean ingredients. Tastes fresh and flavorful. We chilled ours first before trying but would be good at room temp too. Easy grab and go. Perfect for hiking or traveling. Seems like a high quality product.

title: So good
text: These are great quality peanut butter chocolates. Creamy chocolate and peanut butter. Tastes fresh and flavorful. Would recommend.

title: Seems good
text: I haven’t figured out how to best use this. I think it’s more of something you take when you have an ailment like oregano oil. It’s peppery. Will try it out more when I think of a need I have. Seems high quality.

title: Great
text: We eat a lot of homemade popcorn cooked in coconut oil and seasoned with salt and nutritional yeast. We go through a lot of yeast. I normally buy it at Trader Joe’s because it is reasonably priced there but this seems comparable and great quality.

title: So good
text: I love peppermint tea and this didn’t disappoint. I brew a pot of it at bedtime for the kids to drink too and they love it. Comforting and tastes delicious.

title: Great
text: Great black beans. Great to have on hand as a quick side dish, to add to salads, make veggie burgers with or black bean salsa. Seems to be good quality and comparable to other canned black beans I’ve tried.

title: Great
text: So far I’ve just used this flour to make waffles and they turned out great. Kids didn’t even notice a difference. Seems to be great quality and would recommend.

title: Great quality
text: I used this mix to make muffins/cupcakes and they turned out great. I keep them in the freezer and pull one out when I need a sweet treat. My picky kids didn’t notice they were gluten free and enjoyed them as well. Would recommend!

title: Works great
text: Used my instant pot to make vanilla yogurt and it turned out great. Lots of recipes online.

title: Tastes great
text: Was excited to try these. Tastes like a chocolate covered candied hazelnut. The chocolate is really good and tastes great and has great texture. The caramel part is more of a toffee/ candied coating that has some crunch to it. The hazelnut inside is yummy. Fresh and great quality. Also included a small sample of candied pecans which were yummy too.

title: Taste good
text: Taste good and just like I expected. Taste fresh and come in pouches. Perfect size for snacking.

title: Really good!
text: I wasn’t sure how this would be with only 3 ingredients… vinegar, jalapeños and salt, but it’s excellent! Very flavorful and has just the right amount of heat for me. It’s spicy but I can still enjoy my food. Must be made with great tasting jalapeños for it to taste as good as it does. I used it on some tortilla crusted talapia from Costco that I put on top of some cabbage slaw and it was great.

title: Amazing
text: This mix is amazing! I followed the directions on the back of the package and mixed in chocolate chips to half the batter and frozen wild blueberries to the other half. Both were so good! Can’t tell they are gluten free. My super picky kids even liked them. Seems like a high quality brand and would recommend!

title: Nice flavor and easy for travel
text: The flavor is good and is smooth not bitter. No issue with my stomach. These are great for travel if I need to take to work or on the go anywhere.

title: If you love ginger…
text: I love ginger so was really happy with this. It was too strong for me made as instructed but I added about twice as much hot water and really enjoyed it. It is not sweet, just really spicy and flavorful. Almost like s broth. Helps to settle your stomach as well.

title: Pepper, garlic and salt
text: I thought this was a blend of other spices as well, but it is simply pepper, garlic and salt. It tastes just like you would expect those 3 to taste together. It is convenient since I use those 3 on a lot of things. So far I have used it to season thin pieces of chicken with a little cornstarch that I stir fried then added veggies and stir fry sauce and it came out great.

title: Crunchy
text: This is a very crunchy cereal. It is on the sweet side for me even though it is low carb. Tastes good out of the bag and with oat milk.

title: Great matcha
text: This matcha is great quality and makes a great tasting matcha latte. I add some to hot water and mix then add oat milk and some more hot water. I use about the same water to oat milk ratio as with coffee. It has a lighter feel this way.

title: Spicy
text: Spicy! If you can tolerate the heat the flavor is great!

title: Hot
text: The heat in this does not disappoint. Very spicy. Will make you sweat. Flavor is good if you can tolerate the heat.

title: Great for fish tacos
text: Will be using this to make a sauce for fish tacos, sour cream, mayo, a little water and some of this seasoning.

title: Flavorful
text: I am late to the balsamic glaze trend but was excited to try this. It is definitely sweeter than I expected. Has a really flavorful grape taste. I thought I could use this on salad like vinegar but definitely needs to be used more as finishing touch.

title: Works great
text: Used this to make açaí bowls. Used frozen bananas, strawberries, blueberries and apple juice as well as a spoonful of this. Made it taste just like using one of the frozen packets. Added granola and bananas on top and was a great treat.

title: Tastes great
text: I normally drink green tea every morning. Usually it’s the green tea bags from Costco that also have some matcha powder in them. Those ones are great but this is great as something different too. It has a different flavor and color than the Costco one. Nice change from my regular green tea.

title: Great quality
text: Great quality celery salt. Perfect for soups, slaws, potato salad. Great flavor. Seems fresh.

title: Versatile
text: So far I’ve used this on some eggs and breakfast potatoes and it adds great flavor. It’s like a seasoning salt with a bit of cumin flavor.

title: Tastes great
text: This honey seems to be great quality. Tastes great and great for your health.

title: Tastes like granola
text: This tastes just like granola but without the carbs. Great flavor, not a strong coffee flavor tastes more like almonds with a bit of sweetness and crunch. Great out of the bag or on top of yogurt or with some oat milk.

title: Tastes good
text: Love drinking chamomile before bed or during the day when I need something warm without caffeine. Also helpful when someone’s stomach doesn’t feel good. This was easy to brew and tasted great.

title: Tastes good on salmon
text: We used this on some air fried salmon and it came out good. A bit of heat and a little sweet. I was hoping for a bit more of a blackened time flavoring but this was a good seasoning and will use it again.

title: Ok assortment
text: This is an ok assortment of candy. Got it to put in a piñata and it will work well. It does look different than the picture with only a few of the name brand candies and a bunch of smaller candies I have never heard of.

title: Nice set
text: This is a nice wooden box and variety tea sampler. I love tea and love trying all these different teas. I normally have Costco green tea for breakfast every morning and while I like the Costco one better, this one tasted good in its own way. My kids like trying the caffeine free ones as well. Would make a nice gift.

title: Great
text: We love nutritional yeast on our homemade popcorn cooked in coconut oil. Such a treat. We go through a lot so usually have large pouches on hand. I normally buy from Trader Joe’s since I’ve found it to be the least expensive. This one tastes great though and the shaker is convenient.

title: Tastes great
text: Quality seasoning. Very flavorful. Tastes great on salmon and breakfast potatoes and lots of other things.

title: Taste great and versatile
text: This hot sauce tastes great! It is pretty spicy but not unbearable. Very flavorful. So far I’ve had it on fajitas and scrambled eggs and it tasted great on both. Adds great flavor. Has a smoky/chipotle flavor.

title: Great seasoning salt
text: Great seasoning salt. Tastes great on some homemade French fries. Great flavor.

title: Great curry powder.
text: Great curry powder. Added some to my chicken salad and it added great flavor to it.

title: Tastes great
text: Great quality matcha. I used hot water and warm oat milk to make this and it was great.

title: Tastes good
text: Nice quality earl gray tea. Smells fresh and tastes good. Used some oat milk on it and it tasted good cold as well.

title: Excellent
text: These beans smell amazing and seem to be high quality. I use these to make homemade vanilla extract. I bought the cheapest bottle of vodka at the grocery store and sliced these open and dropped them in. Takes about 6 weeks and shaking it every so often.

title: Great seasoning
text: Worked great added to ground turkey for taco night. Seems like a quality product.

title: Excellent quality
text: Great quality sauce. Tastes excellent. Have added ground turkey and ground beef and both taste good. High quality ingredients and naturally sweet tomatoes that don’t need additional sugar added to the sauce.

title: Great chocolate
text: Great tasting chocolate. My kids love the milk chocolate hearts and the adults like the dark chocolate. They are both rich and flavorful and melt in your mouth. There are solid dark and solid milk chocolate hearts in the container.

title: Minty
text: Great natural gum. The xylitol is great for teeth. Nice minty burst and makes teeth and mouth feel clean.

title: So good
text: These are so good. The salty crunchy pretzel inside is such a good combination with the chocolate and peanut butter.

title: Kids like them
text: These are quality freeze dried fruits. They all have large unbroken pieces. All are extremely flavorful and taste like candy. They stick in your teeth a bit, but similar to other freeze dried fruit. Can use in cooking and smoothies as well.

title: Excellent
text: Restaurant quality sauce. I love that there is no added sugar yet the tomatoes have a sweetness to them because it is made with quality ingredients. Everybody in the family enjoyed this on their spaghetti. Added some ground turkey to it as well.

title: Tastes good
text: This chai latte mix tastes good and is a nice sweet treat. It has good flavor and sweetness.

title: Great manuka honey
text: Great honey. Lots of health benefits. Eat it by the spoonful or use it in food and beverages or skincare.

title: Great Treat
text: This was a great treat. I couldn’t tell it was dairy free. I just mixed with hot water. My kids prefer it made with milk. Seems to be good quality. Would recommend.

title: Tastes good
text: These are convenient little containers of vanilla plant milk. Easy to take on the go. My kids weren’t a big fan, but I really liked them. I drink them from the container or use them in my coffee and tea. I like that they aren’t to sweet. I normally get unsweetened dairy free milk. My favorite is Aldi’s unsweetened oat milk.

title: Tastes good
text: I drink green tea every morning. I usually use the green tea bags from Costco. It has tea leaves and a little matcha powder. This has a different flavor than that one. It’s a smoother flavor and less grassy. I used a teaspoon to start and it tasted great. I might try more next time. The price is a bit high, but it seems to be great quality.

title: Great treat
text: These small candy bars are a great treat. Perfect size. Tastes just like a Twix. Seems to be high quality ingredients.

title: Yummy
text: These are yummy cookies. They don’t have a strong anise or almond flavor but are crunchy and slightly sweet and have great texture and flavor perfect to go with a cup of tea or coffee.

title: Tastes great
text: This is great vegan chocolate. You can taste the chocolate liquor a bit but it still tastes great. Rich flavor and is creamy and melts in your mouth.

title: Great quality
text: These seem to be great quality chickpeas. Looking forward to making some hummus and Indian dishes with these.

title: Works great
text: Made pancakes with this almond flour blend and they came out great.

title: Tastes good
text: Great gluten free cornbread mix. Light coconut flavor. Easy to make and went well with chili.

title: Great snack
text: This is a great snacking granola. Lots of large chunks to snack on. It’s the least sweet granola I’ve tried but still tastes good. It doesn’t have much of a banana taste to me. Great on top of yogurt or with oat milk.

title: Great quality
text: Large bag of great quality dried mushrooms. They are nice large pieces and have a great mushroom flavor.

title: Sweet and spicy
text: These a tasty snacks. They have a sweet and spicy flavor. I wasn’t sure what to expect but I really like them. They are crunchy and fresh.

title: Great mix
text: Made great muffins. Added some chocolate chips. Great treat or breakfast. Great quality ingredients.

title: Nice set
text: This is a nice green tea set. I drink a cup of green tea every morning. Usually the one from Costco. Plain green tea is my favorite from this and second the one with mint and lastly the jasmine. The jasmine is very fragrant and smells really good. I am a purist though and love the simple taste of plain green tea. This set seems to be great quality.

title: Tastes and smells great
text: We go through a lot of vanilla making vanilla milk steamers, crepes and other baked goods. This vanilla seems high quality. We normally buy the bourbon vanilla extract from Trader Joe’s which is really amazing too.

title: Taste great
text: I prefer dried fruit without added sugar. These are great dried mango slices. They are plenty sweet without added sugar. They are chewy and flavorful and a great snack.

title: Pretty
text: My girls loved using these to decorate Christmas cookies. Lots of fun shapes in it and they enjoyed eating them as well.

title: Tastes great
text: Great tasting preserves. I like the lower sugar content. Great flavor and seems to be great quality!

title: So good!
text: This is a really yummy dairy free chai latte mix. Comes in easy to use packets that you just mix with hot water. It is better than Starbucks. Very flavorful and creamy. Makes for a great sweet treat when you need one.

title: Tastes good
text: We eat a lot of popcorn with coconut oil, nutritional yeast and salt. This was fun to try and works great to evenly season popcorn. Seems to stick a little better too.

title: Great quality tea
text: This is great tea, I can’t imagine a better English breakfast tea. Not bitter and very flavorful. Would recommend.

title: Tastes great
text: This honey tastes great and appears to be great quality. Tastes great in tea, on toast, in recipes or by the spoonful.

title: So good
text: We use a lot of olive oil.. for salads, roasting veggies, sautéing… and this is great quality as expected. Very light but flavorful.

title: Very nice
text: Great gift for those who love Italian food. Hugh quality ingredients packaged up very nicely.

title: Really good!
text: Pleasantly surprised by how good this popcorn is. I normally buy the organic kernels from Trader Joe’s and really like them but this is definitely superior. It has a lot more flavor and almost tastes buttery without anything on it. I followed the directions and did 2 tbsp Costco organic coconut oil and 1/2 cup kernels and it made a big bowl with only about 8 unopposed kernels. I seasoned with pink salt and Trader Joe’s nutritional yeast and it tasted as good as popcorn can get. Popcorn is crunchy, fluffy and flavorful.

title: Tastes great
text: I love clean snacks like this. Very flavorful and satisfying. Chewy, sweet and a little bit of crunch from the nuts. Perfect to take on a hike or keep in your purse. Would recommend.

title: Great quality
text: Great quality chocolate. Tastes great out of the bag and also in baked good. Would recommend.

title: Great tasting chocolate
text: These are very cute ornaments filled with individually wrapped chocolate snowmen. I tried each and they are all very good and great quality chocolate. Each snowman is a pretty large chunk of solid chocolate and very filling. These would make cute gifts to neighbors or friends. Might have our elf bring one for the kids to share.

title: Tastes great
text: Small jar but tastes great. Perfect to eat out of jar or add to dishes. Fancy that they are from Italy.

title: Tastes great
text: Tastes great. Kids love putting them on their ice cream sundaes. Seems like great and fancy quality.

title: Tastes great
text: We sometimes get the donut shop coconut mocha k cups and this tastes similar. My husband said it was a bit bitter but I found it smooth and flavorful.

title: Ok
text: Our local Sprouts grocery store used to carry ground chicken with chorizo seasoning but stopped selling it. Tried using this to create my own. I added a good amount of this to some ground turkey. It tastes good but didn’t quite taste like any chorizo I’ve had. It has some warm spices in it like cinnamon that gave it a kind of Indian flavor. I also couldn’t get it to look like the bright red color I’m used to. I added the meat to some scrambled eggs to make breakfast burritos. Seems like a good quality product, just didn’t hit the chorizo spot for me.

title: Smells good
text: Smells good and seems great quality. My bottle broke during shipping so couldn’t try it.

title: Ok
text: So the flavoring on the chips tastes good but the actual chip leaves a bit to be desired. If you can’t eat corn this might be a good option. The chips aren’t as crunchy as corn chips and they have a smell and aftertaste to them. The siete brand is also a good option for grain free chips.

title: Tastes great
text: Great Kcups. Makes a great smooth and flavorful cup of coffee.

title: Tastes great
text: Great quality honey. Great in tea and on toast and plain by the spoonful.

title: Fresh and crunchy
text: The bags are a bit smaller than expected but the cashews seem to be great quality and very fresh. I love the flavor. I was worried they would be too sweet or have a strong maple flavor, but I could barely taste the sweetness and no maple flavor. I just noticed the crunch of the nuts and the fresh and flavorful chili. It was just the right amount of heat and sweetness. Each bag is 2.5 servings but I definitely ate the whole bag in one sitting cause they were so good.

title: Tastes great
text: This is a great tasting bold coffee. Rich and flavorful. Wish the bag was resealable to keep them fresh but not a big deal.

title: Nice iced coffee
text: These make a nice smooth and flavorful cup of cold brew. Easy to use and seems like great quality coffee.

title: Tastes great
text: Great little packet of granola for on the go. Also perfect size to dump on top of a yogurt or smoothie bowl. Love the flavor and all the ingredients. Tastes fresh and flavorful.

title: Tastes good
text: Makes a nice cup of coffee or espresso. Easy to control the strength. Easy to use. Nice to make a little or a lot. Tastes nice and smooth.

title: Smooth cup of coffee
text:
Update: let the filter sit on the cup for a few minutes after the water goes through. The last few drops of coffee make all the difference. Makes a perfect cup of coffee.
I tried this with 8 and 10 oz of water. Both tasted about the same. Kind of a weak cup of coffee but still has a nice flavor. Very smooth and almost chocolatey. I would rather have it like a teabag though. I think that would make it even easier and more convenient and you could also let it steep longer for a bolder flavor. But overall this is nice and great for a rental property or hotel or while camping.

title: Convenient
text: This is a convenient shaker of ground flaxseed. Perfect to quickly add to smoothies, yogurt, oatmeal, and other recipes. Tastes fresh.

title: Great little cookies
text: Great little cookies. Clean ingredients. Taste fresh and perfectly crunchy. Just the right amount of sweetness and lemon flavor. Perfect with tea or coffee. Would be a nice addition to a gift basket as well. I also like their ginger snaps.

title: Interesting
text: So this is a very interesting combo. Coconut chips are great quality, but the wasabi takes a bit to get used to. The taste grows on you pretty quick. Overall a healthy good tasting snack.

title: So good
text: I am a big fan of this brand. Clean ingredients and taste amazing. These bites have a great chewy texture with cru h from the chia seeds. The flavor is great, sweet apple with a hint of cinnamon. Would recommend!

title: Kids like them
text: Crunchy and sweet. Perfect for on the go. Nice sized bags. Pieces are mostly all whole and in nice big pieces.

title: Too sweet for me
text: This tastes pretty good and seems like a quality product but it was too sweet for me with the monk fruit and stevia.

title: Great packaging and product
text: Great idea to get rid of the plastic tray. Pieces were all whole and intact and tasted fresh. Crunchy, salty and a great healthy snack.

title: Seems good
text: Looking forward to using this to make some homemade biscotti. Seems like a quality product.

title: Perfect!
text: These taste great! Crunchy and perfect amount of spice! They taste really fresh and aren’t too spicy but have a nice combination of warm holiday spices. The ingredients are clean and great for gluten free. Whole grain. Taste great with morning coffee and tea.

title: Smells and tastes great
text: This spice blend smells and tastes great. Smells very fresh and just like pumpkin pie. I sprinkle a little in my coffee and it gives it a holiday taste. Would recommend.

title: Excellent
text: These are great snack bars! I love how they taste and the ingredients. They have great texture, chewy and crunchy from the chia seeds. I thought it was sesame seeds at first but realized it was chia. They have a slight strawberry flavor that tastes natural and just enough to not be overpowering. Great on the go. Will keep some in my purse and backpack!

title: Looks great
