text: This stuffing looks great. Great ingredients and nice large whole pieces of stuffing. Looking forward to using it on the holidays.

title: Great quality
text: I’ve purchased health-aide kombucha before and like the quality of it. This product is great quality too. I prefer just regular kombucha though. Although this is just sweetened with monkfuit and fruit juice I actually prefer a less sweet drink. Has high quality ingredients. This is a nice change if you like something less vinegary though than regular kombucha.

title: Good
text: I like pop chips but prefer other flavors to this aged cheddar. It’s got a strong cheese taste that is good but doesn’t really feel crave-able. Would rather sour cream and onion or plain. Crunchy and fresh and lots of whole pieces.

title: Tastes great
text: This is better than I expected. I thought it was going to be watery and bland, but it is hearty and full of flavor. I followed the directions to heat up on the pouch then poured into a bowl and it’s a great meal. Similar to chili with clean ingredients and Whole Foods. Would taste great over rice too. Would recommend!

title: Great tea
text: This is great quality tea. The toasted rice wasn’t for me though. I prefer plain green tea. But still a high quality tea.

title: Tastes great
text: I have this and the plain flavor. I like this one to add a bit of flavor when I want it. It tastes great and you can control how much flavor you want. It has a bit of sweetness and mixes in easily and completely. I add some regular liquid oat milk as well to add some extra creaminess. Seems like a high quality product.

title: Great
text: Nice large bottle of high quality organic tahini. Perfect to make homemade hummus. Love the squeeze bottle, so much easier to use than a regular jar.

title: Smell great
text: I plan on adding these to a bottle of cheap vodka to make vanilla extract. They smell amazing even through the sealed package. Will report back after it’s brewed a while.

title: Tastes good
text: I added this to my coffee but also added some regular refrigerated oat milk to add more creaminess to it. Seems healthy. Would prefer no added sugar, even if it’s coconut sugar. Seems like a quality product with health benefits. No weird aftertaste.

title: Makes a great latte
text: This makes a great green tea latte. I put some in a bit of boiling water then whisked with a little electric frothed, added oat milk and a little honey then microwaved a bit more and it turned out great! Great tasting matcha powder that isn’t bitter or too grassy.

title: Great pepper
text: Works great and ask expected. Filled a pepper grinder and it makes great tasting pepper.

title: Tastes great
text: Plan on using this to refill the grinder bottle I have from the same brand. Love the bottle and how smoothly it works. Salt tastes great and seems high quality.

title: Tastes great
text: Tastes great and love the grinder container. It works very smoothly and delivers a fine grain salt. Tastes great in food and seems high quality.

title: Smells fresh
text: I’ve always used regular paprika in recipes when it calls for smoked paprika so looking forward to using this in recipes. Smells fresh and seems good quality.

title: Didn’t dissolve
text: Maybe there are better batches of this since the reviews are so mixed, but I found mine undrinkable. I mixed it for a long time and couldn’t get it to dissolve completely and it didn’t taste good. The flavor was very off. Love the idea of it, so hopefully they can work out the kinks. I love a good instant coffee and have been using oat milk in my coffee and love the flavor.

title: Great decaf
text: I love a good cup of decaf in the evenings. I find it’s a great cure to a sweet tooth as well. This decaf tastes great and seems high quality. Great rich flavor and I love the plastic free k-cups. Would recommend.

title: Tastes like a mocha
text: This coffee is very convenient and easy to brew. Has a nice smooth flavor, not strong or acidic. It smells and tastes like a mocha. Those chocolate notes really come through. I’m surprised it doesn’t have cocoa powder in it. Tastes great with oat milk.

title: Smooth and mellow
text: Easy to brew and tastes good. Not  strong or acidic. . It has a nice smooth taste that is easy on your stomach. Will also try making cold brew with it. Very convenient design. I find the tasting notes accurate and a great description.

title: Great tea
text: Love this brand. Great quality and great tasting tea.

title: Great calming tea
text: Great tasting sleepy tea. Sometimes I drink it mid day if I am feeling stressed and it helps calm me.

title: Great tea
text: Great flavors for summer. Make great iced tea that doesn’t need any sweetener. I’ve bought this brand in the past from Sprouts grocery store and really like the brand.

title: Great tea
text: I really like this tea brand and have purchased their tea in the past from Sprouts grocery store. It is a great quality tea and so far all the teas from the brand have tastes great.

title: If you like bacon…
text: This is a great flavor if you like bacon. We do but think we prefer the classic honey mustard pretzel pieces more than this flavor. These are fresh and crunchy and a fun change to try. Seems like a quality brand.

title: Great tasting rub
text: Great tasting rub. Looking forward to using it on some smoked meats. Seems like good quality.

title: Works great
text: Used this on some smoked chicken and it came out great. Seems like a quality product.

title: Nice gift
text: This is a cute tin of loose green tea with additional ingredients that make it taste good. Would make a nice gift.

title: Tastes great
text: Tastes great. Seems high quality. Made an iced chai with oat milk and it was great. Flavorful and love that it’s caffeine free.

title: Very good
text: I’m not very picky with coffee but like something smooth and flavorful. This coffee is both. It is very fresh and flavorful and makes a great cup of hot or iced coffee. Tastes great with frothed oat milk using one of those electric mixers. Love the added benefit of turmeric and black pepper, which you can’t taste. Would recommend.

title: Fun kit
text: This is a fun kit for anyone that likes boba or wants to try it at home. Just need your own milk or half and half which I like. Everything tasted fresh and the directions were great. Would make a nice gift.

title: Great seasoning
text: Smells great! Can’t wait to use it for seafood. Perfect as a substitute for old bay. Would make some good crab cakes as well.

title: Not for me
text: The smell of this spice rub was offensive to me even before I opened the box. Not sure what in it smelled unpleasant to me, but I couldn’t even bring myself to taste it. Surprised I’m the only reviewer who thought so, so maybe I got a bad product.

title: Love it on popcorn
text: Our family loves this on popcorn with coconut oil and salt. Great snack and treat. This seems like a quality nutritional yeast and gives popcorn a yummy cheesy flavor.

title: Great brand
text: We have bought beef sticks from this brand from Costco before and like them. These jalepeno ones didn’t disappoint. They have great texture and flavor. Spicy but just enough to add some heat. Great quality ingredients. Perfect for on the go. Would recommend.

title: Great quality coffee
text: Smells and tastes fresh. Nice full bodied coffee with subtle hint of maple and bacon. It goes nicely together. Seems like great quality.

title: Tastes good
text: Tried this out with our air-fried  honey siracha salmon and broccoli. I followed the directions and it came out good. This rice has a heartier texture and isn’t sticky. Would hold up great in recipes like soups and casseroles. The flavor is good as well. It was a great side to our dinner.

title: Great product
text: Great vanilla powder that smells and tastes fresh and tastes great in my tea and coffee. Looking forward to trying it other ways.

title: Tastes great
text: This is a great black tea with a small amount of warm chai spice. It isn’t spicy and tastes great with honey and milk. Seems like nice quality.

title: Tastes amazing
text: I’ve heard of the amazing benefits of Manuka honey had yet to try it until now. This one tastes amazing! So far I’ve eaten it plain, put it on an English muffin with butter and put it in tea. All three ways it was exceptional. Would highly recommend.

title: Great chicken rub
text: Used on some chicken breasts I grilled and they came out great. Nice mix of spices with nothing too overpowering.

title: Great iced coffee
text: This exceeded my expectations. Nice bold flavor that tastes as good if not better than Starbucks. I brewed it in a glass but let it cool a bit before I added half and half and ice. Would recommend!

title: Tastes good
text: This is a good basic BBQ sauce. We usually get Famous Dave’s BBQ sauce. This seems comparible to other store brands or seeet baby rays.

title: If you like fruit flavor
text: Our family prefers the mint mentos gum, but this one tastes good if you prefer a fruit flavored gum. It has a small amount of vitamins in each one which is nice since a lot of people are low. Good vitamins to help give you a little pick me up too.

title: Tastes good
text: These taste great and have a good ingredient list, but my 5 year old prefers a more chunkier apple sauce. These have a smooth texture and I would say they are better for younger babies and toddlers.

title: Taste great
text: So good! I was worried it would be too sweet since I usually only add a little maple syrup or chopped dates to sweeten mine, but this is perfect. I followed the directions and added half cup water and microwaved for 60 seconds and it comes out perfect. I like that it has flaxseed meal in it to make it extra hearty. It’s filling and quick. Would recommend.

title: Sweet and creamy
text: 5 stars for tasking like a Starbucks Frapaccino. Sweet and creamy coffee that only takes a few second to make. Great quality.

title: Great fake Oreos
text: Great faux Oreos. They taste pretty close and I would buy them again. I also like Aldi’s fake Oreos.

title: Great tasting granola
text: Great tasting granola. Just the right amount of sweetness. Great raspberry flavor and the tiny white chocolate chips add a nice touch without making it too sweet. Lots of big clusters. Tastes great out of the bag or with milk or yogurt.

title: Seems good
text: New to millet flour but looking forward to testing it out in recipes. Seems like good quality. Tastes and smells fresh.

title: Tastes great
text: Great coffee! Just as expected. Fresh and flavorful.

title: Tastes great
text: Great hollandaise sauce mix that is just as good as the Knorr brand. Easy to make and perfect for eggs Benedict.

title: Tastes good
text: I normally get the coffee mate or aldi version of this but not fat-free. I haven’t tried fat free before but it seems like what you would expect from coffee mate fat free. It isn’t as creamy as the regular fat one but still works well as a creamer and tastes good. Dissolves perfectly and the flavor is good too.

title: Excellent
text: Excellent dark chocolate. I would eat this even if not on a diet. It has only a very slightly taste of stevia but I think the richness and creaminess of the chocolate is what stands out. It has the perfect amount of sweetness and I love the texture as well. Would recommend!

title: Great instant oatmeal
text: Great instant oatmeal. Nice to have on hand so kids can make it themselves. Flavors are all good. Sometimes I add plain instant oatmeal to one of the flavors if I want something less sweet. Great quality and comparable to name brand.

title: Easy to make
text: Easy to make gel. Lots of directions online. Seems like good quality. Tastes a bit fishy and upsets my stomach a bit but maybe I’ll get used to it.

title: Easy to make
text: Followed the directions exactly as written on the back of the bag which were easy to follow. I added the squeeze of lime like it suggested and it helped the taste which is a bit fishy to me. I tried a tablespoon and got diarrhea so not sure this is for me. But overall it was a fun experiment and seems high quality and healthy and as described.

title: Great tea
text: Great green tea. I have a cup of green tea everyday and really enjoy it. I usually buy the green tea bags from Costco, but this is a nice change.

title: Great coffee
text: Excellent coffee. Exceeded my expectations. Great smooth flavorful coffee. I like all the varieties included.

title: Great tasting GF cake mix
text: Great chocolate cake mix. Nice basic cake mix. I made it as muffins with added chocolate chips and the kids enjoyed them and I thought they tasted just like regular chocolate cake mix. I like bob’s red mill products and this one did not disappoint.

title: Great flavored coffee
text: Great flavored coffee. If you like flavored coffee you will enjoy these. My favorite is the caramel cream. Great smooth coffee flavor that is a great medium roast.

title: Tastes great
text: Great yogurt powder! I used my mini dash blender and put 3 ice cubes, about a cup 1% milk and about a tablespoon of the powder and it blended up great into a great creamy coconut smoothie. Tastes like a healthy milkshake. Would be fun to make popsicles with it too.

title: Tastes great
text: Tastes great! I used my mini dash blender and put 3 ice cubes, about a cup of 1% milk and about a tablespoon of the yogurt powder and it blended up great! Tastes like a strawberry smoothie. Kids loved it too! Would make great popsicles too with chopped up strawberries.

title: Smell and taste great
text: I have been wanting to try cardamom seeds. I don’t know much about them but they appear to be good quality because they smell very fragrant and look whole. I opened one up and tasted one of the tiny seeds and it has a great sweet/floral/citrus/cinnamon taste. Looking forward to trying recipes with them.

title: Tastes great
text: Great smooth and mild cup of coffee. Tastes great and seems to be great quality.

title: Smoky French roast
text: I prefer the donut shop coffee from this brand. This French roast was too smoky for me, but if you like a smoky coffee this is perfect. It’s seems like quality coffee and is just like the description.

title: Delicious, and not just for breakfast
text: I find  these frozen waffles fine for breakfast, along with pancake syrup and hot tea, but, love them for lunch, with pancake syrup and iced tea. Plus, so easy and quick to make. Also, great with a side of bacon or sausage as one prefers, either pork or turkey based. I definitely recommend them.

title: Great cup of coffee
text: Tastes great! Makes a nice cup of coffee. Can’t find anything negative about it.

title: Great present
text: My kids have been begging for some of these! A favorite when I was younger and will make a great present for Christmas. Nice presentation.

title: Great natural dyes
text: I prefer natural colors to artificial ones so these are perfect for baking with my kids. Appears to be great quality and easy to use.

title: Great oyster crackers
text: Perfect oyster cracker. Crunchy, fresh, salty and great addition to soups of just plain from the bag. Great when sick too.

title: Tastes great.
text: Great generic brand Triscuits. Taste just as good as name brand. My kids love these and I like that they are whole grain. Perfect salty and crunchy snack. They taste fresh and arrived packaged well.

title: Not for lattes
text: This is not the type of matcha to make a latte with. It has an unpleasant taste when trying to make a latte. Even with sweeter. Would work best for cooking and baking or maybe in smoothies.

title: Excellent
text: I would have liked more salt on them, but, still excellent taste and freshness. I recommend them.

title: Tastes great
text: Great tasting organic saltines that taste great but for broken up a bit during shipping. I like this brand and usually purchase their peanut butter sandwich cookies from sprouts which taste like a nutter butter but better. Would recommend this brand and product.

title: Fresh and flavorful
text: I love teas so was excited to try this. Not your typical chai tea. The turmeric and ginger are the strongest flavors in it and give it an almost savory flavor like curry. But it has a touch of sweetness and also gives you a nice jolt of energy which I wasn’t expecting since it doesn’t taste much or look like black tea. The tea also tastes extremely fresh and flavorful, like you used fresh turmeric and ginger. Not something I would drink regularly but a nice change on occasion.

title: Great coffee
text: Amazingly fresh coffee beans. Smells and tastes so amazing. Roasted a month ago! And best before end of January. Great quality. Would recommend.

title: Great snack
text: These really surprised me. They looked like they would be so bland, boring and weird but everyone in the family ended up loving them.  I thought they were going to be REALLY big pieces of cereal but they were still small but big enough to make snacking easy. They have the perfect amount of sweetness and crunch and a great snack. They have a very light sweet coating that tastes a bit like vanilla. Similar in taste and texture to the non marshmallow parts in lucky charms. Kids loved them and can’t wait to eat another bag tomorrow.

title: Flavors are ok but prefer original
text: Received 6 packages of Smoothie flavored skittles. Skittles are one of our families favorite non-chocolate candies, but we weren’t all fans of this flavor combo. All the flavors taste ok but we would never buy this flavor over regular skittles or berry skittles. Some have them 4 stars, some 3, and some 2. They almost have a sort of healthy smoothie flavor which doesn’t make them seem like a treat. Strawberry banana is the best one because it kind of tastes like a banana runt. The quality is great and they are fresh and well packaged.

title: Spicy
text: These crackers are good for gluten free and have a good amount of peppery kick to them, so if you don’t like spicy these aren’t for you.  I wouldn’t really describe them as thin. They are a bit hard and dense, but crispy and savory. Would pair well with hummus or dip or cheese and meats.

title: Ok
text: Flavor is good but gummies are a bit hard and there aren’t many of them. If this is your favorite candy I can understand paying the price but plenty of tasty candies to purchase at the store nearby that are equally good.

title: Tastes great
text: Great generic Nutella. Tastes just as great. Consistency is a bit thinner but not a problem. Tastes good by the spoonful or on waffles. Looking forward to baking with it.

title: Tastes great
text: Great generic Nutella. Tastes just as good as Nutella to me. The consistency is a little thinner but not a big deal. Works great to put on waffles or to enjoy by the spoonful. Will put it into mason jars for easier storing and accessibility. Looking forward to trying the 3 ingredient brownie recipe listed on the product page.

title: Fine, but I prefer Kettle brand chips
text:
Texture- 3 stars....Good, but, I prefer Kettle brand chips. These were too thin.
Flavor -
Original - 5 stars. I like the the potato flavor best.
Jalapeño - 3 stars - fine if one likes this flavor.
Mesquite- 3 stars - fine if one likes this flavor.

Overall, I really liked the variety pack, especially at the Prime Day special price. But, I prefer Kettle brand chips because they seemed thicker and more flavorful. But, I do recommend these since they worked fine.

title: Great trail mix
text: Great trail mix. Tastes fresh and is satisfying when hungry. Great for snacking in between meals or on the go.

title: Crunchy
text: Great quality cereal. I prefer the panda peanut butter one from this brand but if you like fruity cereal this is great. Very crunchy and fresh and has a great natural flavor that doesn’t taste fake. Not overly sweet. Filling as well.

title: Unique bars
text: These are good and seem to have healthy ingredients. They are a bit in the sweet side for me, I’d prefer a more salty sweet like peanut butter instead of blueberry flavor. While there is nothing bad about them I don’t know if I would purchase them in the future since there’re are so many other energy bars out there that I prefer over these. If you are looking for a change though the texture of these seems unique.

title: Peanuts don’t taste good
text: This mix was just ok because the peanuts didn’t taste fresh and had an off-putting taste. The bag expires in about 2 and a half months, so maybe that was why. All the other ingredients tasted good (almonds, dried pineapple, cranberries, cashews) but since it’s mostly peanuts I wouldn’t get this one again.

title: Toddler loves them
text: My 4 yr old loves the go-go applesauces and she enjoyed these as well. We received pineapple and mango and they are both great. Love that they don’t have any added sugar. I keep the box in the fridge and she can help her self to them when she needs a snack.

title: So convenient
text: Variety box of Oreos, golden Oreos, nutter butters, and chips ahoy. Convenient two-packs. Great for kids to keep them from eating too many. Perfect for lunches and on the go. They taste very fresh. The Oreos and nutter butters have a bit of broken edges but not bad enough that I would suggest changing the packaging. Similar breakage to what you would find in a package from the grocery store. Kids enjoyed choosing one as a treat. So great not opening an entire package.

title: Great snack
text: Great tasting, crunchy, salty snack. Reminds me of cheese popcorn, but easier to eat. I like that they are mostly all whole rice cakes in the bag and only a little bit of crumbs. Light snack and perfect for on the go at the beach, pool, or park.

title: Great cookies
text: Fresh, soft, buttery and sweet sugar cookies with confetti sprinkles in them. I love that they have no artificial colors or flavors in them. Also like that they sealed in packages of two inside the box. Kids love them, a bit sweet and rich for me, but a great treat.

title: Tastes great
text: Small little snack bar perfect for adults and kids. Similar to a lara bar but more fruity and less nutty. Soft and sweet with lots of flavor. Minimal whole food organic ingredients. Seems to be great quality and tastes fresh!

title: Great low carb snack
text: Great low carb, keto snack! Perfect for snacking on out of the bag or would also be great as a crouton on top of salad or other foods to add some crunch! Great Parmesan flavor. Tastes like quality Parmesan cheese. Sesame seeds are not a prominent flavor but are a nice subtle addition.

title: Amazing!
text: Amazing! These are the best dates I’ve ever had! Dates are one of my favorite foods. They have exceptional flavor, taste and texture. Each one is perfect. Extremely fresh and well packaged. Would make a great gift to someone who loves dates. Better than a box of chocolates! Amazing brown sugar and caramel flavor and texture!

title: Excellent quality and taste!
text: Awesome dates! I also got a box of loose dates from the same company and couldn’t be happier. Extremely fresh, well packaged and exceptional taste, flavor and texture! Dates are one of my favorite foods. These are perfect when you want something sweet. Perfect after dinner or during the day as a sweet treat. Definitely cures a sweet tooth. Tastes like brown sugar and caramel!

title: Excellent
text: Great quality black tea. Great flavor and freshness. Since it is hot out I made iced tea with it and it was excellent. I brewed a teaspoon in a cup of boiling water and was able to add about 2-3 additional cups of water to my cup to get the strength I like. Since I am sensitive to caffeine I water it down quite a bit. Great flavor even when watered down. Great value considering how far a teaspoon went.

title: Darn, they taste so good
text: Darn, they were so good, that I just ordered them again. What I liked is that they tasted great, just the right amount of potato flavor, with a nice crispness, and the can lasted long enough with each meal to be worth the cost. I usually prefer chips, but, these sticks provide a nice variety. I recommend them.

title: Extreme
text: I like bitter but these really taste extremely bitter! Almost like your chewing on a bunch of cloves. I’ve tried with wine and other liquors and still can’t get these to quite work for my pallet. They do smell really good and it only 10 calories. If you want something that is more on the extreme side of things you may really like this, I will keep trying to fine the right mix but haven’t found it yet.

title: Great rice
text: Great rice. Very aromatic and perfect texture when following the directions on the bag. Seems like great quality.

title: Great almonds
text: Great quality smoked nuts. Taste extremely fresh and are very flavorful. Rich smoky mesquite flavor that is salty and crunchy. Great on their own but would also be great paired with an adult beverage or part of a charcuterie board. Comes in a box that can be used as a display for resale. Each bag can also be resealed which is nice.

title: Tastes great
text: Great sugar-free beef jerky. Good amount in each package. Seasoning and flavoring on it is perfect. The ingredients in it are all recognizable and it seems to be a quality product.

title: Tastes great
text: Exactly what you would expect from a hazelnut flavored half-caf kcup. Great flavor and good value.

title: Tastes great
text: Great half-caf medium roast coffee. Seems to be good quality like other Green mountain flavors.

title: Fresh and great tasting
text: Freshest smelling and tasting kcups. Upon opening the bag of kcups it smelled like freshly ground coffee beans and the taste was great as well. Makes a great light roast cup of coffee.

title: Makes great chili
text: Great chili seasoning. Comparible  to name brand like McCormicks. Easy to use. Makes great chili.

title: Great and easy great tea latte
text: I drink a cup of green tea every morning and really like green tea. I buy the green tea bags from Costco that have leaves and a little matcha powder in each tea bag. It is great quality and flavor. I was worried this latte would be too sweet but was pleasantly surprised that it had just a touch of sweetness which was the perfect amount. I also liked the green tea flavor and the creaminess of the milk in it. Made for a great mid day treat. And it was easy to make. Would recommend.

title: Great coffee
text: Great tasting coffee. Love Hawaiian coffee and this didn’t disappoint. Tastes fresh and flavorful.

title: Crunchy snack
text: Great tasting almonds. They are very crunchy and fresh with a slight hint of sweetness. There is stevia in the ingredients but it doesn’t have any of the off taste that stevia sometimes does. Great snack. Took off a star cause I didn’t recognize some of the ingredients.

title: Tastes good
text: These are good breakfast cookies. They have a soft chocolate cream center and a somewhat crunchy and soft outer cookie. The filling reminds me of Nutella consistency. All in all tastes good and is a good snack of small breakfast. The expiration date is less than a month out which isn’t ideal since there are a lot to eat. They were packaged well and no cookies appear damaged.

title: Smells fresh
text: Great rubbed sage. Usually use sage for roasted chicken, turkey and in homemade turkey sausage. Seems to be good quality  and fresh.

title: Good salsa
text: We normally buy pace or the store brand version to dip chips and frozen rolled tacos in. This is comparable and will definitely be put to good use. We go through a lot of salsa.

title: Tastes great
text: I really like all the Lily's chocolates I have tried. These almonds taste great. The chocolate is rich and creamy with just the right amount of sweetness and the almonds are extremely fresh and crunchy and perfectly roasted. Perfect sweet treat. I love that there is no artificial sweetener taste or weird aftertaste. Would recommend.

title: Great tasting!
text: These are definitely a great tasting protein/energy bar. I like the combination and flavor of the crispy rice, peanut butter and chocolate. They are like a treat, but filling and not overly sweet. The ingredients look good and nothing too unrecognizable.

title: Tastes great
text: Great energy bars. These bars taste great. They are hearty, flavorful and have just the right amount of sweetness. The coffee flavor goes great with it as well. If you are looking for an energy bar that also provides a dose of caffeine this is perfect.

title: versatile
text: Great versatile peanut powder. Seems to be great quality. Very peanutty and easy to add to smoothies, pancakes, protein balls, or many other items. Great source of protein.

title: Tastes good
text: I've seen PB2 powder in recipes and at costco and been wanting to try it. It is great for smoothies, protein balls, baking, pancakes.... I have only tasted it as is and it tastes good. Less sweet but very peanutty. Looking forward to experimenting with it. Seems like a quality product similar to the one they sell at costco.

title: Tastes great
text: Flavor is 5 stars. Tastes just like toffee should, sweet and buttery, with white chocolate coating and cashews. The toffee could be a bit softer, but similar to what you might expect.

title: Great tasting chocolate
text: Great tasting chocolate. Comparable to high end chocolate like See’s or Ghirardelli. Some of the pieces were a bit broken once unwrapped but still tasted great.

title: Great chocolate
text: Great tasting chocolate. Comparable to See's chocolate quality. I like the mouse filling as well as the outer milk chocolate. Both are perfect texture and taste. Would recommend.

title: Great product
text: Love Chia seeds and these didn’t disappoint. Easy to add to a variety of foods. Perfect for smoothies, oatmeal, baked goods, chia seed pudding.

title: Tastes great
text: Great decaf loose tea. Perfect for fall, before bed or to warm up during the day.

title: Tastes good
text: Great dark roast coffee. Great value as well.

title: Great grain-free granola
text: Excellent grain free granola. All the good stuff. Crunchy, perfect amount of sweetness, nice large clusters to snack on, great flavor. Would recommend!

title: Very dark
text: We normally prefer light or medium roast and if we go the dark roast Newman’s own is usually a good one. I didn’t find the taste of this one very appealing, but found once it cooled and I added some ice and half and half it was great as iced coffee. It’s a very rich flavor.

title: Tastes great
text: Not sure if some people got a bad batch, but mine just tasted like coffee. I have only had it iced. I mix some with water, add a little half and half, and add some ice and it’s a great low carb treat.

title: Great granola
text: I like clif brand products. This cinnamon almond granola tastes just as you would expect. Crunchy, cinnamon flavor, whole almonds, nice large clusters to snack on out of the bag. Would be great on top of yogurt. Tastes fresh. While this flavor tastes good I usually prefer regular flavor granola.

title: Great nuts
text: Great, fresh, lots of whole pieces. Not bitter at all like some walnuts. Seem fresh and good quality.

title: Great on the go
text: Great snack to keep on hand for kids that doesn’t require refrigeration. Easy to grab and go. All the flavors taste good. I think our favorite is just the plain apple or apple cinnamon. Never had a bad pouch in all the years we’ve purchased these.

title: Tastes great
text: Great plant based protein bars. They don’t really taste like cookie dough to me, but more of a chocolate caramel chocolate chip crunch. They have a great texture and flavor and are a great snack. The ingredients look good and it seems to be a quality product. Nice change from some of the other protein bars out there.

title: Everybody loved them
text: Everybody in our family loves Oreos and was excited to try these Dark Chocolate Oreos. The verdict: tastes just like the original white filing ones. Only difference seems to be a slightly richer flavor and the cookie and filling are darker in color. There might be a more noticeable flavor difference if you tried these and the original side by side. Overall just as good as the original. Especially dipped in milk or crushed up in ice cream.

title: Great pasta
text: Great tasting and great quality pasta. I am normally not a big fan of Rotini noodles but these were great. They cooked perfectly and had great texture. Versatile for lots of different recipes. Kids love the shape as well. Tastes better than other generic brands.

title: Versatile, low carb snack
text: If you like pork rinds, you will like these. They seem to be great quality. Taste really fresh, light and crispy. They are a great substitute for chips for someone on a low carb diet. Great for dipping and scooping. Can also crush them and use them as breading for chicken or top salads or casseroles.the chili flavor is just the right amount. They are not spicy at all, just the right amount of flavor.

title: Great sugar substitute
text: Great for keto or low carb diet. Easy to use as a sugar replacement. Looks like sugar and tastes close to sugar. Has a bit of the cooling taste like xylitol and other natural sweeteners. So far I’ve used it in coffee and an Asian stir fry and it worked perfect.

title: Great chili
text: Great chili. One of the better chili brands. Tastes homemade and hits the spot if you want chili. Great for chili dogs as well. Hearty and great flavor.

title: Fast hot meal
text: Great basic beef stew that heats up quick and is an easy meal when you don’t have a lot of time or energy. It is filling and satisfying. Good amount of meat and vegetables and tastes just like you would expect. Was perfectly hot after 1 min on high in the microwave and letting it sit 1 min. Was surprised how little time it took to heat up.

title: Great popcorn
text: Great microwave popcorn. We eat a lot of popcorn. It is what I make the kids when they are still hungry after dinner. We usually make it from kernels in the air popper. But these are nice to have on hand for the kids to make themselves or when you don’t want to do dishes. I followed the directions and microwaved on high for 2 minutes and it came out perfectly. Taste is great, just the right amount of saltiness. Only downside is the bag is a little tricky to open, but once open the bowl is great for sharing with others instead of reaching in a regular bag and getting your hand all greasy.

title: Great ketchup
text: I tested this ketchup side by side with the regular hunts ketchup. It is slightly darker in color, appears a bit thicker and has a slightly richer flavor. I probably wouldn’t be able to tell a difference if I were blindfolded. Most importantly the kids like it. We go through a lot of ketchup and prefer hunts over other brands, so this ketchup works great for us.

title: Tastes like Starbucks
text: If you like Starbucks coffee and a good dose of caffeine, you will like this. Starbucks is usually a little too acidic for me but this kcup taste just like it and has a great coffee flavor. The honey caramel flavor is very subtle and tastes natural. It reminds me of the chocolate with little prices of honeysuckle in it. I would prefer vanilla or hazelnut over it.

title: Smells good
text: My bottles arrived with a broken cap, and majority of it spilled. But smelled good and seemed like a good product.

title: Some people liked them
text: These chips were just ok for me, but others really liked them. I feel like they didn’t agree with my stomach. They had a good texture but had a strong vegetable taste but not in a good way. I would rather eat actual Brussels Sprouts and kale. But others found these really good and liked the taste and would recommend them.

title: Could use more almonds but still great
text: Our family loves these brand of snack mixes. This mix is really good. Mostly large coconut chips, a few almond pieces, little dried cherry pieces and a dash of cocoa nibs all coated in a sweet coating that creates clusters. The amount of cherry and cocoa pieces is perfect. Would be great with more almonds though.

title: Okay coffee
text: Makes an okay cup of coffee. I prefer a stronger cup of coffee and this seemed on the weak side with little flavor.

title: Great cup of Decaf Joe
text: Nice large bag of decaf whole coffee beans. Similar to the size of bag you would buy at Costco. I ground some and used my French press to make a cup and it turned out great.

title: Great protein balls
text: Great protein balls. I prefer balls to bars so you can just grab one or a few depending on your appetite or needs. These taste great, pretty close to a chocolate truffle with just a hint of sun butter and healthiness. Softer on the inside. They also look appealing and fresh. The ingredients look like quality ingredients.

title: Tastes great
text: This chocolate tastes great. I wouldn’t have known it was sugar free based on its taste and texture. It tastes just like a high quality extra dark chocolate bar. It has just the right amount of sweetness to make it a great treat. I also didn’t have any issues with it upsetting my stomach. It has about 4 net cabs for half a bar. I saw them on sale at Whole Foods for 2 for $6 this week. Great option if you are trying to avoid sugar.

title: Good cup of joe
text: Good hazelnut flavored coffee. These are a good backup for when I run out of my normal kcups. Nice smooth and mild cup of coffee. Not extremely bold or rich, but does the job. Haven’t had any problems yet with grounds coming out of the kcup seal.

title: Good cup of joe
text: Good coffee. Smooth and mild. Smells fresh upon opening.

title: Good if you can’t have corn
text:
I would only get these if I couldn’t eat corn since they have a similar texture and taste to corn and needed something for salsa or nachos. Plantain chips are much better tasting to me though and acceptable on more diets. I’ve tried other beanito flavors in the past and liked them better.

pros: perfect crispness
Thin but sturdy
Good if you can’t have corn
Perfect for dipping
Similar texture to corn chips
Cons: taste is a bit off for me, has a weird after taste, so best to eat with salsa or another kind of dip

title: Taste great
text: Exactly what you would want in a caffeinated peanut butter filled chocolate. Just the right amount of sweetness. The peanut butter is creamy and the amount of caffeine is perfect at half a cup of coffee. The quality is great and ingredients look good.

title: Taste great
text: Great tasting cookies that everyone liked. Soft, chewy and chocolatey. Taste fresh. Took off a star for having Red food color in the ingredients which seems unnecessary and they are a bit expensive. But they are packaged well to keep the cookies whole and not messed up.

title: Good coffee
text: This makes a pretty good cup of coffee. It reminds me of what you would find in a hotel room, but it tastes much better than some of the hotel room coffees I’ve tried. Not as good as coffee made from freshly ground beans or many other grounds out there and I don’t think it will replace what I normally drink, but it’s a good backup. Nice mild coffee with good hazelnut flavor.

title: Tastes great
text: Really great sweet snack. Great especially if you like coconut, which I do. It tastes similar to a macaroon but with a chewy and crispy cashew butter center. I could eat the whole bag. Seem to be good quality and good ingredients.

title: Granddaughter likes them
text: My youngest granddaughter (3) really likes these. My older ones prefer the plain apple or cinnamon apple ones. But I’m glad she likes them since they have vegetables. They taste like grape apple sauce to me and I can’t taste any vegetables. Great for on the go.

title: REALLY GOOD
text: I could easily eat the whole bag in one sitting. They have a chewy banana center with a chocolate peanut butter covering. They are the texture of a truffle to me. The perfect sweet snack treat for me. I don't eat a lot of sweets and I felt like this was the perfect treat. Not too sweet, but perfectly chocolatey, with the sweetness of the banana and subtle saltiness of the peanut butter. Mine came perfectly fresh and in excellent condition.

title: Tastes good but much sweeter than soy sauce
text: This seems like a good quality product, but I’m not sure if all my family members will jump on board with it as a soy sauce replacement. It might work well as a substitute in sauce or marinade recipes, but straight from the bottle it is more sweet and syrupy than soy sauce so probably wouldn’t taste great with sushi.

title: Works well
text: Use in place of salt before cooking meats. Works well to tenderize meat. Brand seems to be a quality brand as I have tried several other of their spices and they have all been great quality.

title: Tastes good
text: Good quality chocolate covered espresso beans. I prefer chocolate covered nuts or just plain chocolate, but these taste like quality chocolate and ingredients. The chocolate is rich and creamy and the bean is fresh, crunchy and full of coffee flavor. Would make a nice gift for a coffee lover.

title: Lots of health benifits
text: Interesting berry that I had never tried or heard of before. Looks like it has a lot of health benefits and is great for your immune system among many other things. I will probably just eat them straight from the bag as is, put in my oatmeal, baked goods, or salads. They are indeed tart like a cranberry but not as sour. Only negative was that it says on the bag to wash before eating but I would assume they cleaned them before bagging them, so hopefully washing isn’t necessary.

title: Tastes good
text: Tastes like a cross between ranch and tzatziki sauce with a lemony flavor. Would taste good with gyro meat or other middle eastern flavored meat. Also tasted good as a dip with vegetables.

title: Great tasting full flavored coffee
text: This coffee smells great! I’ve had a few cups and it has a nice flavor that stands out from my normal k cup coffee life. Over all very satisfied with this whole bean coffee.

title: Great seasoning
text: Great for chicken, fish and shrimp. Works great when grilling too. Adds a lot of flavor. Seems to be a quality brand and all their spices I have tried have been fresh and flavorful.

title: Kids like it
text: Good product. While I would prefer it have live cultures like regular yogurt, it’s nice that it doesn’t need to be refrigerated. If your kids like regular yogurt they will like these as well. They taste good and have a good flavor and consistency. They are also not overly sweet like some kids yogurts tend to be. My kids prefer strawberry flavor but the berry and blueberry tastes good too.

title: Great brand
text: Great brand of spices. All the spices I have tried from this brand have all been high quality, fresh and flavorful. This parsley is great for soups, meatballs, lasagna, sauces... adds a bit of color and subtle herby flavor.

title: Quality spices
text: One of my most used spices. Seems to be a quality brand. I have tried several of their spices and they have all been fresh smelling and flavorful.

title: Good spices
text: I have tried several spices from this brand and they have all been great quality. These parsley flakes seem great as well. I used some in chicken soup recently and they did their job well. Added some color and a bit of an herby flavor.

title: Tastes great
text: Great if you like flavored coffees. Flavor is sweet, creamy and chocolatey. Would recommend.

title: Great alternative
text: Good sugar alternative. Works well in coffee and tea. Comes in a nice little Altoids like tin. It seems it can be bitter to some people and perfectly sweet like sugar to others.

title: Great for cooking and cleaning
text: Usually buy white distilled vinegar from Costco since we use it for many different purposes, but this seems like good quality and suitable for cooking and cleaning as well.

title: Great product
text: I use onion powder frequently for roasts, chicken, and marinades. This product smells fresh and it tastes good.

title: Great quality
text: We use crushed red peppers frequently, in sauces, pizza, stir frys...And these seem to be great quality. They smell good and fresh.

title: Tastes like a thin mint
text: This junior mint hot chocolate tastes just like you would expect a minty hot chocolate to taste like. Just the right amount of sweetness and mint flavor. Works well in my keurig.

title: Good spices
text: I use cumin frequently and this seems like a good product line. The cumin smells good and fresh.

title: Quality spices
text: Seems like a quality brand. I use Chili Powder a lot and this seems like a good product. Smells good and fresh.

title: Great egg noodles
text: Great tasting egg noodles. Perfect for beef stroganoff or to add to chicken soup. But versatile and can be used in place of any pasta or noodle.

title: Sweetens well
text: Good sweetener if you need something sweetened and can’t have sugar. It has a bit of a bitterness like stevia if you use too much. Just a couple drops works for me. Convienent little squeeze bottles.

title: Makes an easy, inexpensive and tasty meal
text: For a quick, inexpensive  and tasty meal, lunch best, this works fine for me, with an easy salad and drink.

title: Tastes good
text: I am a big tea drinker and usually prefer unflavored teas. While this may not be something I drink regularly, it tastes good and seems like a quality tea.

title: 5 stars
text: Everything beef jerky should be and more. It is perfectly sweet and salty. The texture is perfect and it has so much flavor. I was a little put off by it having raspberries in it, but I can't taste them, just the sweetness, which is just the right amount. It has a bit of heat, but again, just the right amount to be enjoyable.

title: Great
text: This is a great beef jerky. Perfectly sweet and spicy. At first I was a bit turned off by it being raspberry flavored, but all I taste is a mild sweetness from them. It is no sweeter than regular beef jerky. It has a bit of heat to it, but not too much to make it unenjoyable. The beef also has the perfect texture. Not too tough and not too soft. Would recommend and hoping to try some of the other flavors.

title: Quality mustard and ketchup
text: Staple condiments in our house. Usually buy French's mustard and Hunt's or Heinz ketchup, but this ketchup was just as good and would consider buying if the price was comparable to the others.

title: Good flavored syrup
text: Works well to sweeten beverages, hot or cold, and give them a vanilla flavor. Some of my grandkids liked it mixed in with their milk and some did not. I thought it tasted good.

title: Tastes good
text: Great taste, nice energy boost. I like the natural ingredients. Convienent cans to take on the go.

title: Not natural flavors
text: Although these may taste good, I prefer tea without artificial flavors in it. Tea should taste good without any additional flavors, even natural ones.

title: Works great in tea
text: Sweetens well and tastes similar to sugar. Have only used to sweeten tea and it worked great. Looking forward to trying it out in recipes.

title: Tastes good
text: Good black tea. Smaller tea leaf pieces. Smooth tasting, not bitter. Perfect for in the morning. Only takes a couple minutes to brew, but I usually forget about it and let it brew longer and it still tastes good.

title: Tastes good
text: Expensive, but tastes good and comparable to wheat pasta.

title: Great snack
text: Great simple snack. Very flavorful for an item with 1 ingredient. Tastes similar to other fruit strips, but seems less hard and chewy which is nice. The texture is perfect.

title: Tastes good
text: Seems to be quality garlic powder. This is one of my frequently used spices. I use it in spaghetti sauce, salad dressing, marinades, eggs and lots of other things. Seems comparable to the jar of organic McCormick’s garlic powder I have.

title: Quick and tastes good
text: Perfect for when you want rice quick. I normally by regular rice just because it is less expensive, but this tastes just as good and comes out perfect every time. I like the Jasmine flavor and find it goes well with Indian, Thai and Chinese dishes.

title: Tastes good
text: Good drink mix. Easy to use and tastes sweet and flavorful. Low calorie. Convenient single use.

title: Versatile side dish
text: Convenient, healthy product. There are similar items to this in the store and if you like those you will probably enjoy this. Mild flavors that make it pair well with a lot of different foods.

title: Tastes good
text: Great set of coffee and teas. I really like this brand and all the coffees and teas taste really good with added probiotics and superfoods. The energy boost one gives me the jitters, but other than that it tastes really good. Seems to be a quality brand

title: Great cold cereal
text: Great tasting cold cereal. Convientent single serve cups. Tastes good with and without milk. Crunchy and sweet with lots of flavor. They also have yogurt chips in them.

title: Great as expected
text: Great tasting vanilla Oreos. Everybody likes them. They also like the extra cream filling. Nice individual packages for on the go and also nice for keeping the rest fresh and sealed.

title: Kids like them
text: We generally buy honey nut Cheerios, shredded wheat, Cinnamon Toast Crunch, raisin bran and granola as our cereals. This cereal tastes pretty good for being “healthy”. It has a nice crunch to it and tastes good plain and with milk. It was also fun for my 3 yr old grandaughter to use to make necklaces. She liked snacking on them as she made it. Would also be nice for smaller kids as a finger food.

title: Tastes great
text: I usually prefer a lighter roast, but the French roast makes a great cup of coffee. It tastes fresh and rich. Like that it’s organic. Seems like a quality coffee.

title: Spicy, salty and crunchy
text: These weren’t as healthy as I was hoping, so I’d probably rather eat regular chili seasoned peanuts, but they taste good and are almost like a flaming hot Cheeto with a peanut inside. They are really crunchy and have a good amount of heat to them.

title: Tastes like molasses
text: At first I didn’t think I liked it because it had such a strong molasses like flavor, but it’s growing on me. I like it now plain out of the jar and in tea. My 3yr old granddaughter also likes it and asked for more after having a spoonful. Seems to be a quality honey and definitely lived up to its deep robust flavor description. The buckwheat honey is supposed to have the most enzymes out of all the other types of honey.

title: kids like them
text: Grandkids liked them, but I can't say they are my favorite. Seem to be made with quality ingredients and taste good, just a little too sweet tasting for me.

title: tastes great
text: Great oatmeal raisin cookie bars. I followed the directions for adding vegetable oil and water and cooked according to directions and they came out great. They tasted good right out of the oven, but I thought they tasted even better once they cooled completely. They were more chewy and dense once cooled. They have just the right amount of sweetness and subtle cinnamon flavor. I'll probably try making them in individual cookies one time. Great product with quality ingredients.

title: Classic Coffee-Mate Creamer
text: Great non-dairy creamer. This has been around for a long time and it is a classic powder creamer that most people enjoy in their coffee and tea. It dissolves easily and makes coffee creamy and rich. Doesn't need refrigeration. Great to have on hand as a backup when out of refrigerated creamer or just for everyday use.

title: Tastes good
text: I think if you like diet type sodas and drinks, this is pretty good. The directions on this say to mix with 16.9 -20oz of water depending on your taste preference. So each packet makes a lot of this beverage. If you use more water like it suggests, it is not overly sweet and if it is still too sweet you can add more water. I thought the sweetness level was just right at about 20oz. It doesn't taste as artificial as I expected, but I prefer to drink beverages without artificial sweeteners, flavors and colors.

title: Good product.
text: Easily one of my favorite hops. Good price and well packaged. Trusted craft brewing brand.

title: Tastes good
text: These carnation mixes are as expected. Similiar to ovaltine and nesquik. They taste good and like you would expect. They have a malt flavor to them. All the flavors taste good and the kids enjoy drinking them. Will use on occasion as a treat.

title: Fresh and crunchy
text: Taste fresh and crunchy. Perfect amount of saltiness. Have tried several Fisher nut products and they all have been high quality. Would recommend.

title: Great caramels
text: Great tasting caramels. Was expecting them to be hard and chewy, but they are really soft, don’t stick to your teeth and taste exactly like you would want caramel to. Would recommmend.

title: Tastes great
text: Tastes great. Exactly what you would expect for  an iced vanilla latte from a quality coffee shop. Creamy, great coffee flavor with just the right amount of sweetness and vanilla flavor. Good over ice or straight from the bottle at room temperature or chilled

title: Quality spices
text: Quality spices. Have several mccormick spices already in my collection which I really like so these were a nice addition. Use the garlic powder the most. All of them smell fresh.

title: Easy and healthy
text: Great tasting, healthy and convienent oatmeal. Followed directions, filling with water to the line and microwaving for 90 seconds and the oatmeal came out perfect. I like that it is sweetened with maple syrup and the protein comes from nuts, sunflower seeds, hemp hearts and flax.

title: Great salty snack
text: Great tasting plantain chips. I normally buy the plantain chips from Trader Joe’s. These ones are much thicker, wavy and a bit saltier, which is good because when you are craving something salty it really hits the spot. Remind me of wavy lays potato chips.

title: Sweetens well
text: Sweetens tea and coffee well, with a slightly vanilla taste. Container is easy to open and use. Although it's not pure stevia, it is probably one of the safer  and better tasting sugar alternatives.

title: Adds flavor and sweetness to coffee
text: Similar to the Torani brand syrups. Flavors coffee great. The hazelnut flavor tastes good and tastes similar to hazelnut flavored items at Starbucks. Pump works great to control the amount needed.

title: Honey with a kick
text: Tastes like a good quality honey with a kick. It mostly tastes like honey and you only really get the heat of the chili pepper, not really the flavor. Would probably be best with some fried chicken, Added to bbq sauce or stir frys.

title: Nice mix
text: A nice mix of nuts, seeds and sesame sticks. Similar to the kind I purchase from our local health food store in the bulk bins. Hits the spot when you are looking for a little salty snack.

title: Tastes great but small bags
text: This dried fruit tastes fresh and is very flavorful. We were excited to try jackfruit and it tasted good but wasn’t as good as the mango and pineapple. It is hard to find dried fruit in the stores that doesn’t have sugar added. The only downside was that each bag is pretty small and only has a small amount of fruit in it.

title: Covienent yogurt topping
text: Nice addition to yogurt and smoothie bowls. I usually add my own toppings, but this makes it more convenient. The blueberry ginger is a good flavor. The ginger gives it a peppery taste and I had to look in the ingredients to see if there was actually pepper in it.

title: Great chocolate
text: Perfect chocolate snack. They are sweet and some have a bit of salt which complements the chocolate great. All three flavors are delicious, my favorite are the pretzels. Would highly recommend to anyone who likes good chocolate.

title: Tastes just like a cucumber
text: The cucumber flavor tastes just like biting into a fresh cucumber. This could be good for some, but I didn’t find it appealing. I liked that it was lightly sweetened and very crisp and bubbly, but couldn’t get past that it tasted like a cucumber. Several of the cans exploded and leaked during shipping and most cans were dented.

title: Great trail mix
text: Great trail mix. Nice variety of crunchy cashews and almonds as well as chewy sweet cherries cranberries and big chunks of pineapple. Satisfying snack. Would recommend.

title: Great trail mix
text: Great trail mix that didn’t last long in our house. The variety in it is perfect. All the nuts were crisp and fresh and the dried fruit was very flavorful. The cherries were tart and sweet and the pineapple chunks were surprisingly large and really good.

title: Tastes good, but where is it made
text: Tastes good and sweetens tea well. Tastes like sugar to me with a slightly cooling sensation. I usually by xylitol mints and gum for its anti-cavity claim. I don’t like that it doesn’t say anywhere on it where this is made.

title: Excellent
text: My test involved pancakes made from this flour. They tasted so good, I liked them plain, without any syrup. The taste was enanced due to their heartiness, rather than being light and fluffy.

title: Tastes good
text: Ready to use turkey gravy that tastes good when you don’t want to make some from scratch. Tried it with some mashed potatoes and rotisserie chicken and it did the job. Ingriedients seem straightforward.

title: Grandkids liked them
text: Pancakes and waffles are a staple in our house with the grandkids. All 3 kids approved of these. They didn’t notice a difference. I also thought they tasted good and couldn’t tell they were gluten free. I made them as directed and also made them once with milk instead of water and added an egg. They came out great both ways. I’ve also made them as pancakes and waffles. As a note, they taste best hot. If they cool down I recommend microwaving them or toasting them. Would recommend as they were a easy change from making from scratch.

title: Great decaf
text: Great tasting decaf coffee. I used it in much keurig with a reusable kcup and it came out great. Smells and tastes fresh.

title: Delicious
text: I actually can say I love this marinara sauce. It has a rich heartiness to it, with a nicely subtle spicy taste. It is so rich and tasty, there is no need to add meat. It definitely can pass for homemade and thus perfect for a quick and easy complement to any Italian dish.

title: Great in Chinese chicken salad
text: Taste great and are as expected. I typically toast them and add them to Chinese chicken salad. They would also be a great addition to homemade granola, granola bars or ice cream sundaes.

title: Very tasty, but China listed as one of the producers
text: I like this combination of dried cranberries, nuts and seeds. However, I am wary of food which China is listed as one of the producers. So, I can only recommend this trail mix to those who don’t mind the China connection.

title: Delicious
text:
I've always loved Peanut M&M's and these tasted just as good. That these have natural colors, is a bonus. But, personally, I would only buy them if they weren't more expensive than the original. I did like the zip lock packaging since it does make it easier to keep fresh longer.

So, I recommend these and if not more expensive or if the buyer is not price sensitive, I recommend them over the original ones.

title: Nice rich flavor
text: Added some to some beef vegetable soup and it gave it a nice boost in flavor. I could see this coming in handy for a variety of uses when cooking.

title: Smells amazing!
text: Smells amazing! Like butter and caramel. I received the butter and the oil to try. I like that the oil is in liquid form so I can use it in things like homemade pancakes and waffles. I've recently read about all the benefits of grass fed ghee and butter, especially how its good for helping teeth stay nice and strong and cavity free. So far I really like cooking with it. I cooked pita bread in a skillet with it and normally whatever oil or butter I use starts smoking or burning, but neither of these products did. It also has a nice neutral flavor that goes well with all foods I've tried. I used it to cook eggs over easy and it worked great for that. Also spread the butter on my toast and it tasted great. The deep yellow color is a sign that this is high quality and from grass-fed cows.

title: Great product
text: Product is as expected and makes a good healthy addition to recipes. Looking forward to using it in baked goods and energy balls.

title: Great honey roasted peanuts
text: Perfect snack. Not too sweet not too salty. Lots of nice sized whole peanuts. Nice and crunchy as well.

title: Excellent
text: Excellent. Completely shelled walnut mostly halves, natural, dry, un-salted, non-GMO, and made by Fisher, a quality brand. They can be used anywhere walnuts are used, like snacking, added to salads, cooking, and baking.

title: Good creamy peanut butter
text: Meets my expectations for a creamy peanut butter. Tastes good out of the container and all my grandkids approve of it.

title: Great chocolates
text: Great milk chocolates that remind me of the taste and texture of See's chocolates. No complaints.

title: Salty snack
text: Crunchy, salty, whole food snack. Something different but addicting.

title: Great gift
text: Pleasantly surprised by this huge KitKat box filled with fun sized KitKats. Fun packaging that would make for a great gift.

title: Great easy mix
text: Great biscuit mix. Easy to make just add butter and milk. Makes roughly 9-10. Biscuits. Just as good if not better that what you'd get at a restaurant. Nice comfort food.

title: Good trail mix
text: Nice large resealable bag of trail mix. Nice variety of fruit, nuts and yogurt chips. Raisins are surprisingly large and moist.

title: Great Muesli
text: Great healthy alternative to sugary granola. Tastes great right out of bag, but also good with milk and banana. Perfect Muesli combination.

title: Quick cup of hot or iced decaf
text: It's no Starbucks, but it makes a super quick cup of hot or iced decaf. Not too strong or bitter. I usually buy a box of these at the 99cent store to keep on hand.

title: Great product
text: Great tasting coffee creamer. I used 4 in my 10oz cup of coffee. I would prefer regular half and half over this, but think this is a great alternative for something that doesn't need refrigeration. Also good in tea and oatmeal. I tasted one plain as well and it tasted very similar to plain regular half and half.

title: Good canned chili
text: Next best thing to homemade chili. Just would prefer it not have pork in it. Other than that a good can of chili.

title: Great tasting drink
text: Great tasting low calorie drink. The label says it has as much caffeine as green tea, which is normally less than coffee and black tea. It has 5 calories and is sweetened with stevia and eurythritol which is a non-caloric sugar alcohol. I could definitely taste the added sweetener and I would have been happy with a bit less of it, but as is it is still a great tasting drink. A great alternative to Gatorade for rehydrating.

title: Excellent
text: Lipton is a quality tea brand and I think it delivers here. With just a pinch of sugar, I love it. I found it having a smooth and pleasant taste.

title: Great product.
text: Wonderful product. I have never had goji berries before and was pleasantly surprised by how they taste and by how nutrient rich they are. They are loaded with vitamin A which is really important but also hard to eat a lot of for most people. They also have a good amount of protein, iron, vitamin c, calcium, and fiber. The taste is very mild. They aren't extremely sweet, but not sour or bitter at all. Maybe slightly comparable to a dried cranberry in taste and texture but without the tartness. Will be adding to kids smoothies in the future. But also great for snacking on. It's says product of China on the bag which had me a little conceited, but when I googled where Goji berries grow, it says they are native to China.

title: Tasted good and great texture, would recommend
text: I like the texture better than Rosarita refried beans and the taste is pretty similar except I found there to be a slighty tin-ey taste. I would buy this brand again if the price was the same as the Rosarita Beans that I buy at Costco for 69 cents per can. My single can arrived severely dented, but I would think this shouldn't be a problem when ordering a whole 12 pack.

title: Very flavorful and filling
text: I had a hard time finishing all four biscuits. They are very hearty and sweet. Finishing the whole pack made me feel like I had just eaten 4 cookies. While they taste great, I will probably only be having 1 or 2 as a snack in the future. They remind me of a very thin, crisp oatmeal cookie with a very strong blueberry flavor.

title: Great taste
text: Great tasting chewing gum, but taste not long lasting although some lingering subtler nice flavor. So, I recommend it.

title: If you love coconut, you'll love these!
text: Great treat for anyone who loves coconut. Sweet, salty and perfectly crunchy. I would be curious what they would taste like without the sugar.

title: Very Spicy, but Great Product
text: Much spicier than I expected, but overall no complaints. They had a nice smooth smokey flavor and tasted great on a whole wheat roll.

title: Perfect
text:
I ate it with tomato sauce and meatballs, and it tasted great, plus the right firmness - al dente. I assume it would also be great for its more normal use as mac' and cheese. I don't care that it is gluten-free, but for those who care, the feature didn't detract from the taste, etc.

So, I recommend it for anyone who wants elbow-style pasta.

title: Interesting taste in a chip
text: I am pleasantly surprised with these Popchips. They make for a nice snack. They taste kind of like popped corn in the form of a chip, slightly flavored with both a sweet and salty edge. Not bad. Nice if you want some variety in your snacking

title: Tastes fine, but the ring is stupid
text: The candy/pop tastes fine, but the ring is a stupid gimmick. It would be better to have either nothing but the candy/pop or made as a lollipop with just a stick attached to the candy/pop. The ring is stupid, both that it is an inconvenient way to handle the candy/pop and also that it is so close to the candy/pop that drippings from sucked-on candy/pop messes up one's finger(s).

title: Not colors advertised
text: Poor color pigment! Not at all what was advertised.Disappointed.

title: Coma inducing
text: What flavor and creaminess with a tiny touch of salt. I have diabetes and ate the entire 11.5 ounces in one day. I kept going back to the container like an addict.The coma and medical bills were well worth it.Will buy again now that I’m on daily insulin.

title: A burst of ginger flavor.
text: Just what I was looking for. I love Whole Foods ginger seltzer but have a soda stream and wanted to make my own. I add ginger juice to my preferred level of flavor. I gave up soda years ago but missed ginger ale. This satisfies my ginger craving.

title: Tastes great and is refreshing.
text: I quit drinking soda years ago due to the sugar content, but I missed the fizz so I started drinking seltzer. Ginger ale was one of my favorites. I love the ginger flavor of this seltzer.  It has more ginger flavor than most ginger ales but is not overpowering.  In fact I think the ginger tastes better without all the added sweetness a soda would have. I have recently tried adding a little orange juice to it and that is a great combination.

title: These elevate caramel to a whole new level.
text: These caramels are deliciously simple.  They have wonderful flavor and the touch of sea salt added to each caramel adds that little bit of extra delight. The quality ingredients are evident in the flavor and texture. These are not like the hard to chew version of caramels that you find in the grocery store.  These almost melt in your mouth with just the right touch of creamy saltiness. They are pricey in comparison with those others, so for me they are an occasional treat but well worth it.

title: The Best Brand of Shortbread Ever!
text: Simply the best brand of shortbread there is! Don’t ever waste your money on anything but Walker’s, it is out of this world delicious.!  Delicious buttery treat that is so good with coffee or hot tea.  I had this box shipped to a friend as a gift and the seller got it out very swiftly.  Perfect transaction.

title: Surprisingly delicious!!!
text: I am a huge fan of Walker’s shortbread, being a Scottish dissent myself. Recently, I realized I need to go gluten-free because of an allergy and have been searching out good gluten-free products for the past few weeks. Being as shortbread is one of my favorite treats, I ordered these right away to give them a try and I could not be more pleased. They are buttery, the texture is good, and I love that they come packaged in individual servings. This is good for maintaining freshness as well as portion control.  Not all gluten-free versions of products are passable, let alone actually good, but these cookies are winners!

title: A flavorful alternative cookie for gluten free diet
text: So generally I prefer a thicker, chewy and soft textured cookie. I like the ones that seem slightly under baked. So these wafer thin, delicate and crispy cookies were startling when I pulled out of the package. But I need to go gluten free so wanted to give these a fair try.  Once I got past the crispy, delicate, somewhat mildly gritty texture, the flavor is quite delicious.  If you are looking for a gluten-free sweet snack, give these a try and I think you will be pleasantly surprised too.

title: Never know it’s gluten free, good chewy texture

title: Barilla for GF
text: Barilla has the best tasting GF pasta. 11 minutes in boiling water and this comes out perfectly without falling apart or making the water all goopy like some other GF pastas.

title: Best GF mix we've tried
text: We have a celiac in the house and this is the best GF pancake mix we've tried so far, even better than others that are a lot more expensive. Note that Amazon will lie on its website -- it said there was only one box left and if I wanted more I'd have to buy a 6-pack at a higher unit price. So I placed three orders for three individual boxes instead and they were all delivered, in three separate packages, within two day at the lower unit price.

title: Really good
text: This rising crust pizza was really, really, really good. One of the best frozen pizzas I've had. Follow the instructions and put it directly on a hot, preheated baking pan and then in the over for 20 minutes and it comes out great. Recommended.

title: Love this stuff

title: Feels artificial
text: Has guar gum and locust bean gum in it, which right away is a big red flag. Tastes like a cheap version of ice cream, but at least it qualifies as ice cream, unlike other brands that put some much junk and fillers in their product that they have to call it frozen dairy dessert. But this is bland and unsatisfying and feels artificial in your mouth. Threw half of it away.

title: Best GF frozen pizza we've tried
text: We have a celiac in the family and have therefore tried lots of different frozen GF pizzas. This is by far the best of the bunch. Big, cheesy with good flavor and good crust. Recommended.

title: Nothing special

title: Pez refills galore
text: If you need Pez refills this seems to be the best deal on Amazon.  They're bulk-packed, likely by hand, and include an assortment of grape, lemon, raspberry, strawberry and orange.  The candies were fresh.  Each pack weighs 0.29 ounces so there are about 55 in a pound.

title: Good GF cookies
text: My son who has celiac loves these cookies.  I think they taste a little like coffee, but he would eat the whole bag if he could and he's the gluten free expert.  They're even smaller than they look on the bag.

title: Good GF mac and cheese
text: My son is celiac so we know a lot about GF products.  This is the GF mac and cheese that most closely resembles the classic Kraft dish, though being Annie's it has less garbage in it.  If you've had the Kraft stuff then you know what this tastes like.  And it's nice to be able to offer a healthier GF version to my kid -- mac and cheese is now one less thing he can't eat.  It cooks up quickly and is easy to make.  So no complaints.

title: Cheddar Popcorners are amazing
text: These things are great and gluten free too.  And inexpensive.  And great.  We keep them in the house all the time.  My son loves them and even my 71yo mother-in-law when she visited ate almost a whole bag, so they're good for young and old and anyone in between.  Try them.

title: Pretty good for gluten free
text:
My son is celiac so we know all about gluten free products in our house. We also buy Glutino pretzels by the case, plus sometimes cookies, frozen pizzas, etc. The only Glutino product I'd describe as superior are the pretzels, and these pastries are no exception.

They're good enough and my son likes them. But they skimp on the filling and the crust is lacking any distinct flavor. They're also not frosted if you're into that kind of thing. We'll buy them again as a treat but they won't be on our regular shopping list.

title: Good for GF pancakes
text:
My son is celiac so we know all about GF products. He also loves pancakes, so about twice a month we use GF Bisquick to make them. It blends up nicely and mixes easily with the other ingredients. It doesn't have a very distinctive taste -- some might even call it bland -- but it's perfectly fine for gluten free, and the pancakes have a good consistency and texture. I tried giving my kid GF pancakes made from Bob's Red Mill mix and he likes the Bisquick more.

The Amazon price is pretty good since one invididual box of this stuff goes for over $5 at my supermarket. The only real complaint I have is that one individual box contains just a little less than the amount you need to make three batches of pancakes. It's like they purposely did that so you'd have to buy another box just to complete that third batch.

title: Barilla comes through
text:
My son is celiac so we know a lot about GF products. I've tried probably a dozen GF pastas and this is maybe the best. I was really surprised that a mass market product like this would be so good.

It cooks up nicely and has a good firm texture and good taste. It doesn't overcook quickly like a lot of GF pastas. It's not much different than regular Barilla pasta.

It's made from a corn/rice mix. Our usual GF pasta is a corn/quinoa mix, and probably has better nutritional content. But at least the Barilla isn't all rice like a lot of other GF products. It's relatively inexpensive too, and the box has 12 ounces instead of the 8 ounces you typically get with other GF pastas. We will buy this again.

title: Good GF pasta
text:
My son's celiac so we know a lot about gluten free products in my house. We've tried many gf pastas and this one is very good, though these days we prefer Barilla. We go through a few cases of Barilla a year.

I really can't think of much bad to say about this except that you need to be careful that you don't overcook it. But when you cook it right it's good. I've even made baked pasta dishes with these. This is much better (and more nutritious) than any brown rice pastas out there.

title: My son's favorites
text: I have a three-year-old celiac who knows more about GF cookies than most adults, and these are his favorite cookies.  I like them too.  They really taste just like regular wafer cookies.  Totally worth the cost.

title: Good Oreo substitute
text: We know a lot about GF producs in my house and my son really likes these cookies.  They are good Oreo substitutes.  The only reason I'm giving it 4 stars instead of 5 is because the cookie part is very hard and brittle.

title: I really wanted to like them but...
text: We know a lot about gluten free products in my house, and we've tried a lot of GF cookies.  I really wanted to like these but I've had many better products before.  I was turned off by the texture and the taste.

title: Good but there are better
text: We know all about gluten free foods, and while Pamela's products are pretty good I find that they're too sweet and usually more crumbly than other brands.  Not that I wouldn't eat them, just that there are better products often at lower prices.

title: Very good gluten free pasta
text: We know all about gluten free foods and this brand is the best gluten free pasta I've had so far.  It has a much better flavor and texture than just plain old brown rice pasta and the nutritional content is better too.

title: Best brown rice pasta I've tried
text: My son is celiac so we know a lot about gluten free foods.  I'm generally not a big fan of brown rice pastas but Tinkyada is the best I've tried.  It has good taste and texture and stays together better than other brown rice pastas.

title: A good Cheerios substitute
text: My son's celiac so we know all about gluten free foods.  These are a good Cheerios substitute.  They stay crunchy in milk for a long time.  However, they're not as tasty as Cheerios and are a tiny bit bland.  But overall a good product.

title: My son's favorite snack, and I like them too
text: Five stars all the way for these.  My son's celiac so we know all about gluten free foods and these bars are the best.  I even eat them myself when my son's not around.  Highly recommended.

title: Bland

title: I like them much more than regular pretzels

title: Delicious Popcorn
text:
Its great to eat a healthier snack with no unnatural food additives. I have noticed that I get migraines from MSG and other crazy stuff they put in some of our food so I am always happy to find and eat "clean" food.

This popcorn is yummy. It comes with two pouches to sprinkle on it after it is popped. One is oil and one is buttery seasoning. I prefer to use a bit of the oil and then sprinkle some sea salt on it. I find the buttery flavor pouch a bit too grainy--tastes good though.

I have cut off the oil pouch corner, sprinkled on a little bit and then propped up the pouch to park until I am happy with my oil ratio. However, twice I have spilled the oil pouch with this maneuver. A bit messy if you are not careful. That is my only negative. Not enough of an issue to turn me off from buying it.

title: A great deal on a tasty and somewhat healthy snack
text:
This item is worth every penny if you're a garlic lover!

I tried this fried garlic snack for the first time while on a trip to Maui finding a small bag of nearly identical garlic chips for about 7 dollars. I was hooked! These things are delicious though you might want to limit your intake unless you like the idea of driving everyone around you away who doesn't like the smell of garlic.

That said, it seems that eating garlic has potential health benefits around blood clots that you're not going to get eating potato chips or other snacks.

The product arrived quickly in what is essentially a giant vacuum sealed "coffee bean-like" bag. And when you open it you're going to need a plan. I've got it divided into large freezer bags and stored in a dry pantry.

The quality is exactly as good as the ones I had on Maui, perhaps just a touch saltier - which is also good!

I don't think it'll take me too long til I need to reorder!
