title: A Surprise !!
text:
The big surprise is: They taste Really Good !!
I've been eating Sugar Free for many years and without a doubt this is one of the best Caramels I've had. They have a really good taste and unlike many other sugar free candies, this does not have that sugar free after taste you get with some sugar free foods.
Yes, some do come in a bit melted but they are all sealed in their container and even though some of the caramels have oozed out of their wrapper, they don't stick to the wrapper so it's very easy to peal back some of that wrapper and then enjoy each piece. That happens because they are really nice and soft and like another person said, they don't stick to your teeth.
Like everything else in life, some people won't like these but look at how many people left positive reviews while most of the negative ones are only about some of the pieces being melted. But like I mentioned, that's no big deal because they all still taste the same as the perfectly wrapped ones and it's easy to eat the ones with a bit outside their wrapper. And FYI, every one I've received have had almost a year left on their 'best buy' date.
I usually don't write reviews this long but after re-ordering these 6 times, it was worth it....

I am only giving it three stars because the picture of the fruit cake as shown on the Amazon website shows a cake with many large chunks of candied fruits and nuts. In fact, based on that image I chose this cake from the many different ones offered on Amazon.

But after receiving the cake, much to my disappointment, I realized that the chunks of fruit and nuts where much smaller than they were pictured in the photo. title: TO DIE FOR! THE BEST CARAMELS EVER!!
text:
Authentically DELICIOUS! You can taste the REAL Butter and Vanilla! The flavor is SOOOO GOOD! They do not get stuck in your teeth! I consider myself a Caramel Lover Expert! They are not overly sweet! No artificial or added flavors! These are pure Vanilla Real Butter Flavored Caramels! The first time you taste one it is OMG!
They are soft and can be put on apple slices or wedges and dipped in nuts if desired. You can easily insert a pecan or your favorite nut inside. They can be cut up and put in ice cream! These caramels have the BEST flavor and right amount of softness ever! TASTE IS AMAZING!

title: FINEST CINNAMON CHOCOLATE COFFEE PERFECTION!
text:
This is my FAVORITE ORGANIC K CUP EVER!! The cinnamon chocolate coffee flavor is DELICIOUS! It tastes wonderful with full bodied coffee gourmet flavor and zero bitterness and not overly strong! It is a medium strength BALANCED flavorful brew. It stands up to cream, whipped cream, and milk.
The value for the money is pricey and expensive, even on subscribe and save; the only reason for value less than five stars. I would like to have a larger quantity, twice the size or more available at a cost savings!
CERTIFIED ORGANIC IS HUGE AND MANDATORY! No pesticides, fungicides, herbicides, insecticides, etc.! All natural delicious tasting clean flavors! THANK YOU!!
I also enjoy many flavors of organic naturally flavored and always organic herbal teas and SERIOUSLY I am shocked and annoyed by anyone who says this coffee tastes like tea! They are obviously not tea drinkers!
My only disappointment is when it is sold out, unavailable, and I have to wait a long time to get it back in stock!
This is the BEST GOURMET COFFEE EVER!! It is a decadent dessert coffee for special times or a treat anytime and every time.

title: MY FAV BEST DAILY BREAD EVER “LIKE DAVE’S” AT A GREAT SAVINGS
text:
I LOVE sandwiches and this AWESOME HEALTHY TASTY BREAD! It is my Go To for healthy carbs, with whole and sprouted grains, seeds, and protein for Great sandwiches and toast! It is comparable to Dave’s without the killer price!
The only problem is when it sells out, I can’t always get it at the time I am shopping at Whole Foods. So now I just buy it when I see it, and keep the extra loaf in the freezer so I don’t run out.

title: AMAZING BEST BLTs EVER! TASTES JUST LIKE YUMMY LEAN MEATY BACON!
text:
I Love BENEVOLENT BACON! it is a STAPLE in my house! Make a FABULOUS BLT anYtime in no time!
Here's how I make mine in my Air Fryer: (Can use toaster oven)
Set to 400 degrees. Place 4 slices of Bacon on perforated parchment paper liner (optional) for 11 minutes. After 6 minutes, blot with paper towel and flip over. continue to cook remaining 5 minutes, and blot again when finished. FOR CRISPY BACON: Let Bacon REST for 20 min. or longer at room temperature. Adjust time to your liking and oven and place a small label or sticky note on air fryer to remind you for the next times.
You can cook in advance and store in refrigerator 4 slices per sandwich or snack bag, to have ready to make additional sandwiches. Serve on toast with tomatoes , lettuce, and mayonaise on both slices of bread.
Did you know that Pigs are MORE INTELLIGENT than Dogs, and play with their toys just like Dogs do. Pigs make wonderful pets to many people.
This GUILT FREE HUMANE Bacon is HEALTHY, a great source of protein, low cholestoral & SO TASTY! It tastes just like pork Bacon! it is great on grilled cheese and other sandwiches also. YOU WILL BE AMAZED!
I get Two meals out of 8 hefty slices per package. That is a reasonable value for me. The slices are big and make a hearty filling sandwich.

My normal review would be 5 stars, I always sing it's praises and give out samples to family and friends to encourage them to buy it. If this new darker color and added spices is the way this will be made from now on, then sadly Thomas Douglas (and Amazon) will have one fewer customers.

title: Great heat and flavor without burning your tongue off.
text: Nice heat and flavor, which we love whether as a dip mix or for cooking.  Nice size for keeping it fresh and not too much that it would take you ages to finish before expiration date.  The heat is good, but not burning and necessitate a glass of milk! Love it.

title: Lovely snack and breakfast.
text: The puffs are light and cinnamon is light too and works well with plant based milk.  Neglible sugar, which is what we were looking for.  Small packet, but nice as snack too.  Cinnamon is good for health too!

title: Has a lot of heat, but clean flavor. Love it.
text: We love their halanero sauce [without the xxxtra hot] and taht always works great.  This extra hot is HOT, and try with a few drops to your dish to test the heat.  Believe me, we over added and this sauce has a lot of heat.  Clean flavor and just adds heat.  It will take a while to get through one bottle.

title: Yum with hot herbal.m
text: Very rich honey taste and not quite the taste for other brands’ manuka honey.  Taste great as hot honey drink or add to herbal tea.  Had a seal,,important in my view.

title: Wasn’t that hot.
text: Wasn’t that red hot.  The injector was helpful, and we injected chicken breast as well as using sauce to marinade wings.

title: Super creamy from starch
text: A lot of starch and hence made the risotto very creamy. Don’t pre washed the rice, but you can to get a less ‘creamy, texture.  Nice texture , worked great with porcini mushrooms or seared scallops.

title: Strong smooth flavor.
text: Very strong olive flavor.  I compared this with another brand we like and this has similar and equivalent strong taste: great with brad or making focaccia.  Dark glass to help with slowing down deterioration..just keep in cool, dark place.  The stopper is strong plastic plug that seals well with the glass bottle. Happy to support small businesses.

title: Tasty on its own or lightly roasted and tossed in sea salt.
text: Nice to lightly roast and use Delia’s recipe to finish off with lovely rosemary and sugary coating.  Nice crunch.  Great for many baking recipes.

title: Not overtly salty
text: Not overtly salted at all.  Easy to crack. The nuts are dry and a little hard.  Nice little snack.

title: Great for seasoning and tasty without any extreme notes
text: Yum. You don’t needed additional salt unless you need salty.  The mixes aren’t that salty, but it’s the other spices that you want to come through.  We tried the tangy with salmon, sprinkled generously and cook slowly in oven: so deliciously.  We tried the spicy with ramen: hits a warm spot [not too hot for those who might not like heat.].  The combination suits almost anyone as none are ‘overwhelming’ or extreme.  Great seasoning and I didn’t have to work hard in kitchen to deliver the flavor.

title: sweet than sharp tart
text: not bad and more sweet than sharp tartness.  worked great with sprouts as it took some of the bitterness that hub notices with any sprouts!  nice little bottle as we dont use a lot and the size matters.  nice thickness as expected of aged balsamic vinegar

title: Small sized raw nuts.
text: Great halves [small] and I roasted them with some spices: yum.  There is a seal to keep the nuts fresh if you prefer to eat them raw.

title: Tasty, but high in sodium
text: Great soup, but high in sodium: beware for those who have to watch their sodium intake.  Lots of lentils and very thick.  Enjoyed their quality.

title: Mild coconut flavor, decent rice.
text: Not bad for ‘pre’cooked’ rice.  Coconut flavor is mild and works great with stronger curry flavors.  Great for quick weekday, post work, prep.
